subject: re: Jamie Raskin DESTROYS the Supreme Court!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Don’t lose your signature spot >>

TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for standing up against the MAGA Justices on the Supreme Court!_**

First, Justice Clarence Thomas was EXPOSED for accepting luxury vacations and bribes from GOP mega-donors. Then, he and fellow far-right Justice Samuel Alito REFUSED to recuse themselves from January 6th cases despite their EXTREME bias. **But now, you’re taking a stand to FINALLY hold the Supreme Court accountable for their blatant misconduct!**

[**I know Republicans are already plotting their revenge against you, so today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my support for this bill and keep electing amazing Democrats like you! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85211?t=9&akid=18114%2E878179%2EDXVsXm) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85211?t=10&akid=18114%2E878179%2EDXVsXm)

Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18114%2E878179%2EDXVsXm). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18114%2E878179%2EDXVsXm).**

name: Mike Haridopolos
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE HARIDOPOLOS FOR CONGRESS
body:
My special message for you...
| | | | Dear Peter,

As we gather this week with family and friends, I wanted to take a moment to extend my warmest wishes to you and your loved ones for a very Happy Thanksgiving.

This is a time to reflect on the blessings we share—our health, our community, and the freedoms that make our great country strong.

We are so fortunate to live in a nation that allows us the opportunity to give thanks for all that we have, and to be surrounded by the people who mean the most to us.

---
| [](https://link.support.mike4congress.)
---
Thanksgiving is also a reminder of the importance of service to one another. Whether we are volunteering our time, lending a helping hand, or simply being kind to those around us, we each have the power to make our communities stronger.

I encourage each of you to find a way to give back, to uplift someone in need, and to make the world a little brighter this holiday season.

As your Congressman-Elect, I am incredibly grateful for your trust and support. I will continue working every day to serve our community with integrity and dedication.

Together, we can accomplish great things and ensure that the future is bright for the generations that follow.

__**[If you would like to donate today, I’d be thankful!>>](https://link.support.mike4congress.)**__

May your Thanksgiving be filled with peace, joy, and cherished moments with those you hold dear.

Thank you,
Congressman-Elect Mike Haridopolos

PAID FOR BY MIKE HARIDOPOLOS FOR CONGRESS

|
---
| | [Unsubscribe.](https://link.support.mike4congress.com/click/e14644/VaHR0cHM6Ly9taG4ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/Sc3VwcG9ydF9taWtlRk9VUmNvbmdyZXNzX2NvbTI0MTEyOQ/LbmNsVzFrQzc0/qP2hpZHM9bmN5bmxTUWJTeXlscw/gZ0kPTA/s6m58e1a342)
---

name: Steve Friend
subject: From Special Agent to FBI Whistleblower
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=a21853872a9d489284136a4ffba11563&_e=4Tf9cdaLqD1mLL9HoilFQVuN02qGZthL-IbYTLVNFSOluYAjfzm0yPPZiZqz7hXvBYyxN2P-fEy-88z6wb5mqDkSIgqJJNDOaApNU1X1eioL0SFUgetI6DAd_tfq2r5Jt6mDShoh9Oy86D7suVzQo9u7Nebd810f0WgpqzsmidP7uyR2RkmfYyOk7ilDfPd5_y_irpTWk6qx7RVXmbUcSgLE2NJ_O39-PPLOMIP2uy-YV9LTGX-qZTEo6PNisZ5HIyyJiarZOac0ISx5yUZcNaEuNrXIQBn8OgUI2wrYT6H06DPg7WvyZ02y1lG5pqz0azOB9KSCuqlxOgLJ_GGi7PS8lseqB5XutDcKtFhD9OPbVA9fTDgFfXazwv1EIKYITU1lYTu7V3JG8_oE44BS0w%3D%3D)

Peter,

Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job. But when I became an agent, I swore an oath to protect and defend the United States Constitution against all enemies -- both foreign and domestic.

When I discovered the FBI's National Security Branch had refocused counterterrorism from legitimate foreign actors to political opponents within our borders, I knew I had to say something.

In August 2022, I made protected whistleblower disclosures about my concerns regarding the January 6th investigations assigned to my office.

**My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath._However, it nearly cost me everything._**

Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to stand up to the Deep State and expose their efforts to villainize patriots. The Kash Foundation offers legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots who come forward with evidence against the Deep State's actions.

To thank him for his efforts, I told Kash Patel that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the week to help the Kash Foundation take on the Deep State.

[You can help the Kash Foundation support whistleblowers and expose Deep State corruption by donating today.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=a21853872a9d489284136a4ffba11563&_e=4Tf9cdaLqD1mLL9HoilFQVuN02qGZthL-IbYTLVNFSOluYAjfzm0yPPZiZqz7hXvBYyxN2P-fEy-88z6wb5mqDkSIgqJJNDOaApNU1X1eioL0SFUgetI6DAd_tfq2r5Jt6mDShoh9Oy86D7suVzQo9u7Nebd810f0WgpqzsmidP7uyR2RkmfYyOk7ilDfPd5_y_irpTWk6qx7RVXmbUcSgLE2NJ_O39-PPLOMIP2uy9lCxQZYYAr7kdGQ-HEBN6Lgbmlob8ERYnlsq2Hcc6UG5GyprmLPKTzFLY5BxJc1CbOSJb6MS2LynIl3Rx_q40Hn-93xIGVljIhWTFWWGgS3sRL6RzO87MqCHKWbZviqtmwSjPISWBymLDGq4Y5VJJpguaRsqchne1BmQHzE16nmakQ-nqUj0TRGMm_0n3sB8k%3D)

[Donate](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=a21853872a9d489284136a4ffba11563&_e=4Tf9cdaLqD1mLL9HoilFQVuN02qGZthL-IbYTLVNFSOluYAjfzm0yPPZiZqz7hXvBYyxN2P-fEy-88z6wb5mqDkSIgqJJNDOaApNU1X1eioL0SFUgetI6DAd_tfq2r5Jt6mDShoh9Oy86D7suVzQo9u7Nebd810f0WgpqzsmidP7uyR2RkmfYyOk7ilDfPd5_y_irpTWk6qx7RVXmbUcSgLE2NJ_O39-PPLOMIP2uy8Q8dihWrA-tiLuyJSHhXcPW81r7dUTSX5hYqA-mfi6KP1_eNuuUROI4PkMReVZHAxJJ0MX94gaY5Kqjp-JgwubZUad0pIqF76sty3QeWbDyO16keaAvZ2Ayt_5bd_VpSzi3E6ARkYJTlL8hNXfGI69_pci8RSG6Jp5E7dh715mBpi4lqssycwJJyZP42l00xY%3D)

I was a special agent for the Federal Bureau of Investigation for eight and a half years. During that time, I investigated approximately 200 violent crimes, such as aggravated assaults, murder, child abuse, rape, robbery, child molestation, child pornography, and human trafficking.

**Eventually, I was reassigned to the FBI 's unprecedented investigation of the political unrest at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021.**

It didn't take me long to uncover efforts by the FBI and Department of Justice to manipulate statistics and exaggerate the nationwide threat of domestic terrorism. I witnessed overzealous practices to harass American patriots and realized the FBI was turning its investigative processes into a punishment.

_I had no choice but to blow the whistle on the politicized FBI_.

At each level of my chain of command, leadership cautioned that despite my exemplary work performance, whistleblowing placed my otherwise bright future with the FBI at risk.

I knew my decision would ultimately cost me my dream career. As a married father of two, I knew it would affect my family, but I also knew this was important, so I stuck by my convictions.

The FBI cynically elected to close ranks and attack the messenger.

Within one month of my disclosures, the FBI weaponized the security clearance processes to remove me from active duty.

I was an unpaid, indefinitely suspended man trying to feed his family when Kash Patel reached out to me and said he wanted to help support my efforts to fight back.

[Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to speak about against the weaponizing of our justice system. clean_body: Peter, Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job. But when I became an agent, I swore an oath to protect and defend the United States Constitution against all enemies -- both foreign and domestic. When I discovered the FBI's National Security Branch had refocused counterterrorism from legitimate foreign actors to political opponents within our borders, I knew I had to say something. In August 2022, I made protected whistleblower disclosures about my concerns regarding the January 6th investigations assigned to my office. My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath.However, it nearly cost me everything. Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to stand up to the Deep State and expose their efforts to villainize patriots. The Kash Foundation offers legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots who come forward with evidence against the Deep State's actions. To thank him for his efforts, I told Kash Patel that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the week to help the Kash Foundation take on the Deep State. I was a special agent for the Federal Bureau of Investigation for eight and a half years. During that time, I investigated approximately 200 violent crimes, such as aggravated assaults, murder, child abuse, rape, robbery, child molestation, child pornography, and human trafficking. Eventually, I was reassigned to the FBI 's unprecedented investigation of the political unrest at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021. It didn't take me long to uncover efforts by the FBI and Department of Justice to manipulate statistics and exaggerate the nationwide threat of domestic terrorism. I witnessed overzealous practices to harass American patriots and realized the FBI was turning its investigative processes into a punishment. I had no choice but to blow the whistle on the politicized FBI. At each level of my chain of command, leadership cautioned that despite my exemplary work performance, whistleblowing placed my otherwise bright future with the FBI at risk. I knew my decision would ultimately cost me my dream career. As a married father of two, I knew it would affect my family, but I also knew this was important, so I stuck by my convictions. The FBI cynically elected to close ranks and attack the messenger. Within one month of my disclosures, the FBI weaponized the security clearance processes to remove me from active duty. I was an unpaid, indefinitely suspended man trying to feed his family when Kash Patel reached out to me and said he wanted to help support my efforts to fight back. The FBI was hell-bent on suppressing me from exposing the truth. In addition to an indefinite, unpaid suspension, the FBI initiated a campaign of humiliation and intimidation to punish and pressure me to resign. Individuals at the FBI leaked my private medical information to a reporter at The New York Times. The FBI denied my request to seek outside employment in an obvious attempt to deprive me of the ability to support my family. Finally, the FBI Inspection Division imposed an illegal gag order in an attempt to prevent me from communicating with my family and attorneys. But thanks to the support provided by The Kash Foundation, I was able to withstand these attacks and stand up to the Government Gangsters who are weaponizing our government. The Kash Foundation has also helped Kyle Seraphin, Garrett O 'Boyle, and Marcus Allen expose the weaponization of the FBI for political purposes. name: Byron Donalds
subject: Cool as a cucumber
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9whV/?__vbtrk=MjYyMzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyMzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9whV/?__vbtrk=MjYyMzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyMzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|
---
I’m as cool as a cucumber.
You have to be when the Fake News is calling our MAGA Movement “evil” on national television.
This is Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds.
I got real tired of seeing them lying about us with no repercussions whatsoever.
So I thought to myself, why not just go on their shows, dismantle their lies, and set the record straight _**one-on-one**_?
That’s exactly what I did. This whole election, I’ve been one of the few MAGA Congressman to destroy their narratives LIVE - all thanks to folks like yourself.
But I just went on MSNBC & what I heard made me realize we still have _**[so much work to do.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9whV/?__vbtrk=MjYyMzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyMzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
They interrogated me, demanding to know if I thought that President-Elect Trump was too dangerous to be in the White House, then even hinted that he wasn’t qualified to be President.
**I kept my cool and picked their phony narratives apart piece by piece like clockwork.**
Problem is, they’ll keep trying to push this nonsense every single day until he’s inaugurated, and if no one challenges them, their lies could seriously get out of hand.
I know the election is over, but we have to remain on the offensive all the way through the inauguration, and it’s your generous support that keeps me in the fight.
_**[So please, can you chip into Fake News Offensive Fund today?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9whV/?__vbtrk=MjYyMzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyMzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_ _**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9whW/?__vbtrk=MjYyMzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyMzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9whW/?__vbtrk=MjYyMzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyMzA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

name: Patti
subject: Thanksgiving Thoughts ⏰
body:
Some final thoughts on the campaign. | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8eea1b7c5ce3/countdown-to-victory-11561245?e=0f456155ff)
---
[](https://pattiforgeorgia.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8b4d0ba6402550309dbd7c06a&id=b946c5564c&e=0f456155ff)
| | | |
---
| Peter,
I’m very grateful to have been the Democratic nominee for Congress in the 1st District. It was a unique opportunity to connect to the diverse, strong, and resilient communities across this region.
Some of you, I got to know well and others quietly supported me, often asking “You’re a Democrat?” and that’s all they needed to know. Such confident and strong people never failed to inspire me.
Which inspiration we will need now, more than ever, as we face uncertain and perhaps dark times ahead. Let’s reach out to one another. Watch over our neighbors. Connect a little closer. Be aware, but caring towards everyone.
On a day dedicated to giving thanks, my heart is full. Thank you my friends, for everything you did for me. It was a life-changing experience and one that has not ended.
Happy Thanksgiving!Patti

---

# [Thanksgiving: Mourning, Gratitude, Love, and Justice](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=152305517&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyMzA1NTE3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzI4NDY5ODMsImV4cCI6MTczNTQzODk4MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.DjTqmIg4rFzOpBObCZAyJUFoLQgzDu1wV3wGpOnyKHo)
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Nov 29
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=152305517&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyMzA1NTE3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMjg0Njk4MywiZXhwIjoxNzM1NDM4OTgzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzI2MDExMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pPUEb4rDR9f3d6R4HiBy1MxJNFHA_BwaCmpalCAKE7c&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=152305517&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyMzA1NTE3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzI4NDY5ODMsImV4cCI6MTczNTQzODk4MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.DjTqmIg4rFzOpBObCZAyJUFoLQgzDu1wV3wGpOnyKHo&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=152305517&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyMzA1NTE3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzI4NDY5ODMsImV4cCI6MTczNTQzODk4MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.DjTqmIg4rFzOpBObCZAyJUFoLQgzDu1wV3wGpOnyKHo)
---
| | [](https://substack..6ww2IHelADySnatvAN05fmpvm5qO3hDXh0Yfd3ttfxQ?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/thanksgiving-mourning-gratitude-love?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

On a day such as this, it's helpful to remember that Thanksgiving was first designed to inspire unity and solidarity for justice in the face of violent supremacy [during the Civil War](https://open.substack.com/pub/heathercoxrichardson/p/november-27-2024?r=3zafez&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web).
Otherwise, the cognitive dissonance might be too much.
"It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tZWxpc3NhNGNvbmdyZXNzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.TxHEHmrKcvAgKujQQxBNcVKxZA1R7gvQ6cC-D0iLQK8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=152305517)
In an era of rising ethnonationalism, ongoing war for private profit, the abdication of climate goals (despite clean energy continuing to [set records](https://substack.com/redirect/7d405395-dc83-408d-b2d0-eeed52c0593b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for low cost and rapid scalability), and the re-election of Donald Trump - let alone ongoing colonial violence and dispossession against indigenous people the world over, seen most brutally in Gaza - what can we honestly be thankful for?
Much, of course. Family, friends, peace in our lives; comfort, companionship, a good meal. And more - solidarity in service, the awakening vigor of action, a renewed sense of the [value of our own happiness](https://substack.com/redirect/71ad96e9-f72b-4efb-a203-b4d537b3b0b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) even in the midst of the fight against forces far bigger than ourselves that benefit from ecocide and human suffering.
Today, I choose to be thankful that I can still be moved to tears by the [poetry of a mother in Gaza](https://substack.com/@sermonsatthecourt/p-149359067) who lost four children to Israeli violence and still chooses to persevere in wisdom and patience, honoring the memory of what her prophet endured -- much as Christians might find steadfast endurance in the memory of Christ on the cross.
And I choose to be thankful that my home is full of love, a healthy child, peaceful land and a garden, and an abundance of food. Yes, I still think many times per day about famine, siege, and bloody bombardment my country is deliberately funding, and the ongoing [sadism and dehumanization](https://substack.com/redirect/fe0e15c2-8c9d-4e7c-8aa0-135ef65d690b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) perpetrated on innocent people unjustly detained, and - as one example - the remarkably callous cruelty of [replacing food aid with bags of sand](https://substack.com/redirect/182e7c61-64f2-475a-ab2e-900c31070992?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) destined for people who are starving. And still I give thanks for the goodness in my life, because it is within the nourishing cradle of that goodness that I can bring my words and my attention to bear to speak against injustice and to nourish life.
What will we be, as humanity, when my children are grown?
Who will they be within that world?
I don't know.
But I know that all of our actions, collectively, will determine the answer to the first question --
_and my actions, in particular, will shape the outcome of the second._
Who must _we_ become, in order to bring about a world of justice, equality, beauty, and peace? Where no child goes hungry, shelter and food are abundant, and peace makes prosperity and opportunity rich in the lives of all people? Where no one launches bombs, wars are a thing of the past, and we've outgrown the notion that some people's lives are [worth more than others](https://substack.com/redirect/ba73c17a-24c4-4bd1-b5ba-668360d8a60c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4fc8b328-a5cf-4bab-8311-8d1540a16534?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
How can we parent - individually and collectively - such that our children grow up believing such a world is possible, and possessing [the traits required](https://substack.com/redirect/4ab694c1-cdb3-47a0-a80b-121bb04028cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to help bring it into being?
(The best resource I've found on that last question is the book [Parenting for a Peaceful World](https://substack.com/redirect/83fbcb00-9257-4086-8563-314387e37659?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by Robin Grille. Highly recommended.)
If you are blessed with peace, plenty, and beloved people this Thanksgiving, I wish you rest and joy with them.
And if you are in mourning for the genocide of your people - or other people - and fiercely committing to solidarity and courage in the fight for justice, I wish you power and clarity, and that you remain steadfast - and still find joy.
And if you are lonely, may your heart find purpose, and peace.
If all of the above - I raise a toast, from my family and my heart to yours.
In the meantime, this is your friendly reminder to drink water, get fresh air, talk to someone you love, and eat a healthy meal --
and to take action for justice through whatever means call to you -- especially including **[grassroots activism](https://substack.com/redirect/949b283a-062f-45fd-b94f-2fa43aafe35e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **and political engagement in movements that can strategically [work for life-giving changes in US politics and policy](https://substack.com/redirect/33e13eda-da4c-43d0-9e1f-e45d0198eb11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Together, we can stand firm for justice and bring about an end to all forms of fearful and aggressive war on the "other"... and the birth of a lasting peace.
Happy Thanksgiving.
"It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.

And I choose to be thankful that my home is full of love, a healthy child, peaceful land and a garden, and an abundance of food. Yes, I still think many times per day about famine, siege, and bloody bombardment my country is deliberately funding, and the ongoing perpetrated on innocent people unjustly detained, and - as one example - the remarkably callous cruelty of destined for people who are starving. And still I give thanks for the goodness in my life, because it is within the nourishing cradle of that goodness that I can bring my words and my attention to bear to speak against injustice and to nourish life. What will we be, as humanity, when my children are grown? Who will they be within that world? I don't know. But I know that all of our actions, collectively, will determine the answer to the first question -- and my actions, in particular, will shape the outcome of the second. Who must we become, in order to bring about a world of justice, equality, beauty, and peace? Where no child goes hungry, shelter and food are abundant, and peace makes prosperity and opportunity rich in the lives of all people? Where no one launches bombs, wars are a thing of the past, and we've outgrown the notion that some people's lives are ? | | ---|---|--- How can we parent - individually and collectively - such that our children grow up believing such a world is possible, and possessing to help bring it into being? (The best resource I've found on that last question is the book by Robin Grille. Highly recommended.) If you are blessed with peace, plenty, and beloved people this Thanksgiving, I wish you rest and joy with them. And if you are in mourning for the genocide of your people - or other people - and fiercely committing to solidarity and courage in the fight for justice, I wish you power and clarity, and that you remain steadfast - and still find joy. And if you are lonely, may your heart find purpose, and peace. If all of the above - I raise a toast, from my family and my heart to yours. In the meantime, this is your friendly reminder to drink water, get fresh air, talk to someone you love, and eat a healthy meal -- and to take action for justice through whatever means call to you -- especially including and political engagement in movements that can strategically . Together, we can stand firm for justice and bring about an end to all forms of fearful and aggressive war on the "other"... and the birth of a lasting peace. Happy Thanksgiving. "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. body:

---
In 2022, I sent Liz Cheney packing.

She turned her back on the Republican Party, President Trump, and most importantly, the AMERICAN PEOPLE.

So, on Election Day that year, I took her office.

_**This is Congresswoman Harriet Hageman.**_

For years, I’ve stood by President Trump - and the MAGA movement showed up for him this November with the greatest victory in American History!
We’ve got a REPUBLICAN HOUSE, SENATE, AND WHITE HOUSE, **all thanks to Patriots like YOU!**
America is one step closer to returning to the powerhouse it once was. Already, we’re seeing promises being kept, and a future that’s hopeful for us, our children, and our grandchildren.
This Holiday season, I wanted to show my appreciation for YOU.
Without you by our side, we couldn’t have pulled off the Greatest Comeback in American History. If you would like to donate to show your support,**[I’m including a link here.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjg06ccnlspct3a7t874it0up2u8uias9hvu2730_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm2ob5c9h2bs)**
If you're struggling to make ends meet right now, please disregard this and go about your day.

Rest assured, I will keep fighting tooth and nail against the Democrats in D.C. to put an end to the Biden-Harris inflation that’s hurting hard working Americans like you.

Together, we will make America Strong, Safe, and Healthy Again. The Best is Yet to Come!
Thank you & God Bless.
Congresswoman Harriet Hageman

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Officially APPEALED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
I will continue to fight this injustice.

I will continue to fight this injustice.
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z18osisk7d51465tmatbnjis0c391vpov582epso_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm2ob2cph2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
The Democrat Deep State wants **$146 MILLION** from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections.
---
To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up **_everything_** I own – including my dignity.
---
That’s why I have **officially _APPEALED_** this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets.
---
_As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us._
---
Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_ more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.”
---
**And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too!**
---
_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Friend._
---
Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t!
---
[**But if you can fund my battle to appeal this unjust ruling, please make a contribution of any amount to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund now that I’ve officially appealed this unjust ruling.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmlc4rbu7mld5jfhlv945l14jcgu1qk88omtfmo0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm2ob2cph2bs)

#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvqbtv7vftmshb5b8l6bsg0d6a3icjjo4aks0ffo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jmapj2clh2bs)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjukl77vnse1gvmol7cha8uc5tbgrja375lulr6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jmapj2clh2bs)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zek610juf38evf1jri0i9876j578kv6gpknvh2fg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jmapj2clh2bs) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7nvg9hivkuohnlf8be2ilvqikhke97u7nrag9b8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jmapj2clh2bs)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5c62uht05gc5jgp9l5egbkp2ekird4frkr6f310_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jmapj2clh2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5va7dvj05be479hd5e9pf91e03fe3c857f22800_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm6oj4cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfe4g25sb9uotpdnkuuf5odishp1ood7k65h05bg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm6oj4cjh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqe3jveaqat829ip8q6sl633m5481fchhegd1feg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm6oj4cjh2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh4nv3vjn20io3ih5dmd1e5vigf6o7ch3reqnhv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm6oj4cjh2bs)

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments. CRT has been around for decades. Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just another crazy fringe academic theory." Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse. Now , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege." To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse... What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists." This should NOT be happening in America. Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education. But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT. Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action. Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now: When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles. When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift. Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes Imprimis , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles. We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you. Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link: | | Real American Reporting PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zib4kebb2l3fth893nfgjhs4ohklumjko3dvento_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm1o36cjh2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zj72vh9n3kiknss9l6sfi0a5v3ppadopjjfou360_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm1o36cjh2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4s3aud2iam3m03tgdlpch2evitv7u9t1v0rqar8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm1o36cjh2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmh49pelm0t6ebb36oe4nr43d7q4cl5shudc14j8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm1o36cjh2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zshq2qih7iasnbo4s4qmlmgor8qsousg4rrtncqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm1o36cjh2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Help us understand CRT’s influence
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3uj2dqofa7jgq1r09o4ut589tra22j96hm4jd20_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm1o31c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj7pk3ugphhv9vd9t6jbotp37k3j9cqhhehp7ht0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm1o31c1h2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd5ccjv8hjdrr0jnfoncd58dmqckitju09cljem0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm1o31c1h2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z78dti47t5dbchal56cce5rfn1rvo0bec1klf5po_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm1o31c1h2bs)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood has done enough
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlo98j2o34aaj80pd0ghg3rcer750r4jih2hakc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm1o37cdh2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuv22r97om5q9blmbj2nq038239serietaib1660_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm1o37cdh2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7r9fdejj82eeregatnv8uk1vd46s10rednre5f0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm1o37cdh2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm3jjdmujgm0bboc74ipup1n68ibq8s1nc09uae0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm1o37cdh2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbqv6pdl55of1s00j1lrj3dda8btror3rvegumj0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm1o37cdh2bs)

name: Kari Lake
subject: The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.

| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn8sq6higcashoanqgqvpdoum6ltqh0rsm7m27pg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm9o74c5h2bs)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdbq2ba5c971q75qkuk791f68rr638kmnqhn0ueo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm9o74c5h2bs)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5eiobl8gs1brttaalc1klprqraomvrselnkq8do_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm9o74c5h2bs) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoqmesnc0r2ua60am4oeor6dn5lf5q3a0fpenvp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm9o74c5h2bs)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
|
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
| | P.S. It all started when Alvin Bragg indicted President Trump in New York. Then they bankrupted Rudy Giuliani. Threw Peter Navarro in jail. Arrested Pro-Life protestors. **And sued me for defamation.** Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi941v8dbldkbbfe3h4qoj4lo9t0lcei5gnt3j98_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3jm9o74c5h2bs)**
---

---

| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6ttfstflj3e31ghq1tif43fknif6o3qsd89mh78_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3ge0pr6chh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege." To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse... What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists." This should NOT be happening in America. Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education. But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT. Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action. Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now: When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles. When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift. Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes Imprimis , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles. We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you. Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link: | | ICYMI News PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: No More Blue’s Clues Pride Parades
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z649vf752vldo0ldfn17g54l46b57fptrb79h4m8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3ge8or1clh2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf8fmq721jn3712t00jpkqvc7q3l7njru47bc7q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3ge8or1clh2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc9q9kjktde5nnpui02cqvcet263bduv20jopnk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3ge8or1clh2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7svr9keqt4dta0m6040njinkmac42na3a2m8t1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3ge8or1clh2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Help us understand CRT’s influence
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqbrv6rpsmrvaicu4djinarke2qh25u5pb3pi4og_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3ge8or1clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9l5qgc3gaucv39snnofge98vv3kbkpn6p9a3oc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3ge8or1clh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zthuc7qls86p8msjb6950f3gkthq60flie4oar08_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3ge8or1clh2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmg6cscp7pn3d0gmtnubkprvab9am4fgaqs4toc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3ge8or1clh2bs)
---
| |
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1inf4oqckufvta7pef6mngqbmrn058jfnruc2h0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3ge8or1clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj3cljm0or24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5o6mttu855pn03vcudihcel5mb03dggn5brddr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3ge8or1clh2bs)_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd525sr3s3ghnfeell686e9ddtuuaj3ehe60mvt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3geaoj3c5h2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq9u1hkh4ts7vg7sbvd8rjf36lkap2t5oarstbs0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3geaoj3c5h2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg3rh4g52ngdl3c1lbhtm9lsj7spr9lq2ejliumg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3geaoj3c5h2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9uv8c3a37s8dvv88d43obscdt2f9uqth1kpphmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c3geaoj3c5h2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---

---

name: Concealed Carry
subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19242/6374453/da1751150cde939587e430e23b74eae123945c83/351c4bbfa00dcf769d3e62ae6bc5785e60c7bc97)
---
| | |
---
_November 29th, 2024_
---
| | |
---
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19242/6374453/da1751150cde939587e430e23b74eae123945c83/351c4bbfa00dcf769d3e62ae6bc5785e60c7bc97). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19242/6374453/da1751150cde939587e430e23b74eae123945c83/351c4bbfa00dcf769d3e62ae6bc5785e60c7bc97).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19242/6374453/da1751150cde939587e430e23b74eae123945c83/351c4bbfa00dcf769d3e62ae6bc5785e60c7bc97)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

name: Kari Lake
subject: The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.

| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a866505eb12440b09943b7ef2a22db9a&_e=W2x0zpkeOtI9gfiHUr-RFl9Be5mwq-sKTFxL7ah5fk04VcQxHXLUnKg4DxG8-d9jqfWNyJzF-2KT3PgJRYy5GxC5NgkvXJyaDMpnYaFqV4a9i8b_FtNSks-QetyePuzi1FRq4pMJMisPFB_tGxsnjkQ0FXOIDNcUrBPHZcUO444EzK6AyEzSfcYFI0H5htcoTF2AqPYvEL7xOOy8Xe73KlQZSWDnQ9qM9pGgeShINYhasdqCYN8p3xwA8sAM8JBeekNFxw1J4wJ89-A5e6Fx8JVs2SiUPYPgx7rlHAp6BTCYfSUZ4iOWUtTrOvrFB1K5bB3QrAup5BnqobwcU-iHgXREpmJWtDMdZF4fkENRYsDxYGeAI6sGkkS4d6RLFOHre7uriwvRggbaGAYdxgK-ySB-trBbV1kOrgjqD63TBG8%3D)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a866505eb12440b09943b7ef2a22db9a&_e=W2x0zpkeOtI9gfiHUr-RFl9Be5mwq-sKTFxL7ah5fk04VcQxHXLUnKg4DxG8-d9jqfWNyJzF-2KT3PgJRYy5GxC5NgkvXJyaDMpnYaFqV4a9i8b_FtNSks-QetyePuzi1FRq4pMJMisPFB_tGxsnjkQ0FXOIDNcUrBPHZcUO444EzK6AyEzSfcYFI0H5htcoTF2AqPYvEL7xOOy8Xe73KlQZSWDnQ9qM9pGgeShINYhasdqCYN8p3xwA8sAM8JBeekNFxw1J4wJ89-A5e6Fx8G_bdINEGPamwcN6U2QimfNjCgj7F49QERLCH4BC8DSZWKew3JMqMxxtlf4DOke7oCGbk7hMeFFfbRHpTK3nOp9wWPNRJjmyNutRsJQDNZXGsHWqQUfg7OtVNtVspt4ZF-_YJQmDpwNp1tmrMwT3mGY%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a866505eb12440b09943b7ef2a22db9a&_e=W2x0zpkeOtI9gfiHUr-RFl9Be5mwq-sKTFxL7ah5fk04VcQxHXLUnKg4DxG8-d9jqfWNyJzF-2KT3PgJRYy5GxC5NgkvXJyaDMpnYaFqV4a9i8b_FtNSks-QetyePuzi1FRq4pMJMisPFB_tGxsnjkQ0FXOIDNcUrBPHZcUO444EzK6AyEzSfcYFI0H5htcoTF2AqPYvEL7xOOy8Xe73KlQZSWDnQ9qM9pGgeShINYhasdqCYN8p3xwA8sAM8JBeekNFxw1J4wJ89-A5e6Fx8M7Z97pvrW1_Hj5LPMUh_QQRb68vGozRjTosJsem52mkP6LoGVpYlNC0Smj95HBmlfw9qit5wKJ-UFU02Fn0HVOpC2xyfu2ncmKC6yj8xSvCjW-kk33uMfG3bd1yuNZQaozu6RSjxQTOMqBuRlDTeM0%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a866505eb12440b09943b7ef2a22db9a&_e=W2x0zpkeOtI9gfiHUr-RFl9Be5mwq-sKTFxL7ah5fk04VcQxHXLUnKg4DxG8-d9jqfWNyJzF-2KT3PgJRYy5GxC5NgkvXJyaDMpnYaFqV4a9i8b_FtNSks-QetyePuzi1FRq4pMJMisPFB_tGxsnjkQ0FXOIDNcUrBPHZcUO444EzK6AyEzSfcYFI0H5htcoTF2AqPYvEL7xOOy8Xe73KlQZSWDnQ9qM9pGgeShINYhasdqCYN8p3xwA8sAM8JBeekNFxw1J4wJ89-A5e6Fx8Ngw-vk4Ge0gJkIaJ_jJ5Ehb80v8GJirYEuQD6B4VLy5KJnEyBcwi0Grhdo1gR16st8VAMcWz2MKNg4D0iKsqzR8iGb-TX6WiRRzNhGc_SggxEubWOnejaTGRkMcG6rtm9IPCVjLLHTVrHlJzIg2OJQ%3D)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

|

Kari Lake

| | P.S. It all started when Alvin Bragg indicted President Trump in New York. Then they bankrupted Rudy Giuliani. Threw Peter Navarro in jail. Arrested Pro-Life protestors. **And sued me for defamation.** Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more.
