clean_body: Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. | | | | | | | From the Desk of | | | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to “Make life hell” for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. And he fights on. So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, then they know nothing about me.And they know nothing about you , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new“First Amendment Fund” to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy. Every dollar given to this “First Amendment Fund” will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. It all started when Alvin Bragg indicted President Trump in New York. Then they bankrupted Rudy Giuliani. Threw Peter Navarro in jail. Arrested Pro-Life protestors. And sued me for defamation. Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the “First Amendment Fund” that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. | | Paid for by American Media Council American Media Council PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602 Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee3631be72cb4ccfad5cc510f5afaa89&_e=S3eJAJMFD7dXKlmFYqGEnnedo2-o2GLzwLeC_XSrOcGynKaVxefGs9fQsa6_G4gthj76xuj4GUsqoE2wVb8Gsnr667b4eAPYR89iNNZkEHwLuP-Xk4z076WXxl4PUgOO3-yff36Tw5ZgJn49wrA2QBMUJG1Q0EiRZI_B5plJaiQ7cwYceXJK2iHKNv_y1aTqIaYqg3etzF7kQKi5uqIE_hUNACNXxlC5JIvmeu7Z4RdcuZdQr3W2-iC3xDwdp2cJXE5JvESNkETX5pI4S5-5V1x6MIXthNNmQYSqtoZ1Lea4NHfkeZEZsrUEFWFF3owBjWUPblT8alwZtRufWmPzyQH6fVAzbAu0BXGgxNOdgqEhGH6ynh5nW4XRYLZgolMg)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee3631be72cb4ccfad5cc510f5afaa89&_e=S3eJAJMFD7dXKlmFYqGEnnedo2-o2GLzwLeC_XSrOcGynKaVxefGs9fQsa6_G4gthj76xuj4GUsqoE2wVb8Gsnr667b4eAPYR89iNNZkEHwLuP-Xk4z076WXxl4PUgOO3-yff36Tw5ZgJn49wrA2QBMUJG1Q0EiRZI_B5plJaiQ7cwYceXJK2iHKNv_y1aTqIaYqg3etzF7kQKi5uqIE_hUNACNXxlC5JIvmeu7Z4ReCaavVm8b1I75vIhvoNxRC55FWIJu0TPmNQK6Pc1EFkMjWfdkinCw2LvHAFBoqtKU8qv4zsNgoVxzpOqcRNU_aWgymYkcaVoHiHTsIEkWWhyRiVrdlc8AQvqaTI7jc5ZMeOYkcrhkwL_lJbKrkMwsx)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee3631be72cb4ccfad5cc510f5afaa89&_e=S3eJAJMFD7dXKlmFYqGEnnedo2-o2GLzwLeC_XSrOcGynKaVxefGs9fQsa6_G4gthj76xuj4GUsqoE2wVb8Gsnr667b4eAPYR89iNNZkEHwLuP-Xk4z076WXxl4PUgOO3-yff36Tw5ZgJn49wrA2QBMUJG1Q0EiRZI_B5plJaiQ7cwYceXJK2iHKNv_y1aTqIaYqg3etzF7kQKi5uqIE_hUNACNXxlC5JIvmeu7Z4ReKOCCQG2MiDI7bzX7x6bObUd4gR0O_T-IK2F4oCa2CLbugK5f7IS-IWBte0P-pDHEZ7fTCs5sJCac0hjyocI41lTeU5qO-QiUnb6ouXZYxICDok01qoknSGTDlDA-ROkSzBvNmAiwrlhF0_JnVds1h)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee3631be72cb4ccfad5cc510f5afaa89&_e=S3eJAJMFD7dXKlmFYqGEnnedo2-o2GLzwLeC_XSrOcGynKaVxefGs9fQsa6_G4gthj76xuj4GUsqoE2wVb8Gsnr667b4eAPYR89iNNZkEHwLuP-Xk4z076WXxl4PUgOO3-yff36Tw5ZgJn49wrA2QBMUJG1Q0EiRZI_B5plJaiQ7cwYceXJK2iHKNv_y1aTqIaYqg3etzF7kQKi5uqIE_hUNACNXxlC5JIvmeu7Z4RdykRwxC3mx2h_3-yrz-lkEsiFYL8gUT_dS-vHPn8KBOlmZu_rHDDFGTfVvZqcPdSWccfvE6lE7TlwOjq5304oKBhzesmbi4LPavtdVv5mHtJC1U3cwjlGQsOl0cA7W-gHGhDJjYTC7T61knzqILnNK)
---
| |

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=ee3631be72cb4ccfad5cc510f5afaa89&_t=sbK8FtjTcjaiwF_zZKbNe61ykgopuNARw_O7GuQHIo_BalVxOoLYr4jcppG7pkR7GuJaKK64DgJTlK09rYMN1IttBlsWDJp0VWTYEN10OKSWzlYXPd9S-kEd_sgWcw1DAMsDCs_OGLayxXRdcKcz7YYRhNzD4llzi60YiL2FnVY%3D)

She's a reminder that our work is not over and sometimes the fight takes a while. We wanted to thank her for taking a stand against Trump's extremism and showing us that we can have a bright future ahead of us. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=11a0550d19854a0185a57d063c0d5d9f&_e=r16NzxHZ3I6zVebD0naispigrUFBh5IBSTL4h4PwRc-81DHlFqyJNJyCzjbaaLu4KwnGiY0pXH2WAL2UDpeQ-pZfhfL4y5xzkBL1A6lyK14cybCXVc-ehACGnhmpIpBMyIdseg0xrU-lZy-Fa58maJqs0duqNt7FrOFDax_y69u4aw8NL9sFEBKupEySXHwWElapsIvdPNLRT6hi5uV51quJfHtTCDchlZiVVxHSShYlH-KG4EY4G-HGQNub8489U7CDv812iC7f_uz0niRN9aMymQsGs6eNyuJe3SGzDTtWwu4Ar_BuGDxr6dloIrEyMK7VVD4loXSmjGY8MXRjgpgRoUzw65xZFY-ZboW6sK93fC-7JIo9ovixnw4i_Mh4)

| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=11a0550d19854a0185a57d063c0d5d9f&_e=r16NzxHZ3I6zVebD0naispigrUFBh5IBSTL4h4PwRc-81DHlFqyJNJyCzjbaaLu4KwnGiY0pXH2WAL2UDpeQ-pZfhfL4y5xzkBL1A6lyK14cybCXVc-ehACGnhmpIpBMyIdseg0xrU-lZy-Fa58maJqs0duqNt7FrOFDax_y69u4aw8NL9sFEBKupEySXHwWElapsIvdPNLRT6hi5uV51quJfHtTCDchlZiVVxHSShbMqnyRv2CfQDPS-2Xy_Ql3jmUGl0xJ26vTqkAkzqUH0RrvUNm60u1xqs-hAoQH-XANjI14udR8NVAvk92t_bn8fMm9pvIwMMDaWunZqxv8R__HbEa-H9Ogp7an3N3VYLC-3R2qASdruuhe6puR-MSw)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=11a0550d19854a0185a57d063c0d5d9f&_e=r16NzxHZ3I6zVebD0naispigrUFBh5IBSTL4h4PwRc-81DHlFqyJNJyCzjbaaLu4KwnGiY0pXH2WAL2UDpeQ-pZfhfL4y5xzkBL1A6lyK14cybCXVc-ehACGnhmpIpBMyIdseg0xrU-lZy-Fa58maJqs0duqNt7FrOFDax_y69u4aw8NL9sFEBKupEySXHwWElapsIvdPNLRT6hi5uV51quJfHtTCDchlZiVVxHSShYn0rCmzlm5szCwhUQUd2ZvvNLY4UqOPJZ7oZbX_k9SyCjV9aOvBIEeiQ7nRI0l2Ht1gEbkpdtCm5vW4SwOjAKVMHARs9Hu19io1oSoyE1sVWu303oHrg8YGcS2JXkMtwcv_xIri_oLhv4M9RVtDl3m)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3882745db5cd48c99331f01edeabd252&_e=qyQXoM3tx-2iaPm7BOXPTRDPivLHSgJk7jABTJK0KCRGGo4H3cFMleM6JU-OnP9Uhy3bV85BGounYNNSCQZgTtlsg2hw8LGLdRmLDzjuO86skhAhd5cHEyFUlpjpLqGQN6KshXQ7UNS-BdC13-LGeiO1FfxTLkLReYZYQBRCDkNVPgsGbZQRKmxdeJa2SBJbpM6h3qy4I5bXozXbmam1cGWbVCnoJx6jKPhCFOi8bnsRam1Nw-pxTiCXmTzQ0iFeLkXyDGbQ2QC3x0jBkbAcF-dNDIKqJcluYYRMEqxAWf4kTm7duZOC-k7cFMcnlQM1hpRGZIFTIq2-TUZKYtfvjd8KM8-NvtLtZSrKy-BDtgVMSOhRQ7Id2xEGCUNHCpx_)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3882745db5cd48c99331f01edeabd252&_e=qyQXoM3tx-2iaPm7BOXPTRDPivLHSgJk7jABTJK0KCRGGo4H3cFMleM6JU-OnP9Uhy3bV85BGounYNNSCQZgTtlsg2hw8LGLdRmLDzjuO86skhAhd5cHEyFUlpjpLqGQN6KshXQ7UNS-BdC13-LGeiO1FfxTLkLReYZYQBRCDkNVPgsGbZQRKmxdeJa2SBJbpM6h3qy4I5bXozXbmam1cGWbVCnoJx6jKPhCFOi8bnuYgwXQHwLeGfYuRXvNC54h217WxAmc-OPUK_SlKB4v3W0K40QRmozOTwx_Qx4XpqYkr-qEgG1mIbDZQ7NBRTUnMQwueFvL329YCekqLn8yjvzT28AjvZeH7aMMou7-8nLGZeUYzGKWZmr4X7wKg46K)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3882745db5cd48c99331f01edeabd252&_e=qyQXoM3tx-2iaPm7BOXPTRDPivLHSgJk7jABTJK0KCRGGo4H3cFMleM6JU-OnP9Uhy3bV85BGounYNNSCQZgTtlsg2hw8LGLdRmLDzjuO86skhAhd5cHEyFUlpjpLqGQN6KshXQ7UNS-BdC13-LGeiO1FfxTLkLReYZYQBRCDkNVPgsGbZQRKmxdeJa2SBJbpM6h3qy4I5bXozXbmam1cGWbVCnoJx6jKPhCFOi8bnsGo88uP4RkOPssIacPlp_jC_mEnBQT2MXYhvhbGfblFkUeYXNAuoSi-_I7AVhCKUHYYEqt_Ed0cJI7lT0yL-H5p_wxRXYEdjGh4R9ns3R3PV0RXBqaCkGEvICg9lYWPYFkVe-zM6U4VycsghEKqHNI)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3882745db5cd48c99331f01edeabd252&_e=qyQXoM3tx-2iaPm7BOXPTRDPivLHSgJk7jABTJK0KCRGGo4H3cFMleM6JU-OnP9Uhy3bV85BGounYNNSCQZgTtlsg2hw8LGLdRmLDzjuO86skhAhd5cHEyFUlpjpLqGQN6KshXQ7UNS-BdC13-LGeiO1FfxTLkLReYZYQBRCDkNVPgsGbZQRKmxdeJa2SBJbpM6h3qy4I5bXozXbmam1cGWbVCnoJx6jKPhCFOi8bnthlC2lFDkYLrOpme_FvMjSxpf0ZkwAREhtbaPDkDT7N2cHYcnSUQffOWqEF2MbmgNhaIjNzPxk9ezqcU9sWUklEXIn4wXUyHUi4WcPu3EQBeG_mj8d6OYzhB-13iEt4RhMZoAMpKpsO1se9tI_buFS)
---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution

_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FgJHUncQS1_mIMSPWchP3w~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLDR8P0S2aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy80ZWIzOWNmZS00N2U0LTQwODQtYjBiZS05OWZkYzkxMjVkYjY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTE0X0JER19CUkFWRV9JR0dZMl9FTV9SRVZfUEEtQ0ImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q0ItMjAyNDExMjlXA3NwY0IKZ0brnUlnE14hvlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FgJHUncQS1_mIMSPWchP3w~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLDR8P0S2aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy80ZWIzOWNmZS00N2U0LTQwODQtYjBiZS05OWZkYzkxMjVkYjY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTE0X0JER19CUkFWRV9JR0dZMl9FTV9SRVZfUEEtQ0ImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q0ItMjAyNDExMjlXA3NwY0IKZ0brnUlnE14hvlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FgJHUncQS1_mIMSPWchP3w~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLDR8P0S2aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy80ZWIzOWNmZS00N2U0LTQwODQtYjBiZS05OWZkYzkxMjVkYjY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTE0X0JER19CUkFWRV9JR0dZMl9FTV9SRVZfUEEtQ0ImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q0ItMjAyNDExMjlXA3NwY0IKZ0brnUlnE14hvlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FgJHUncQS1_mIMSPWchP3w~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLDR8P0S2aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy80ZWIzOWNmZS00N2U0LTQwODQtYjBiZS05OWZkYzkxMjVkYjY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTE0X0JER19CUkFWRV9JR0dZMl9FTV9SRVZfUEEtQ0ImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q0ItMjAyNDExMjlXA3NwY0IKZ0brnUlnE14hvlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Officially APPEALED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
I will continue to fight this injustice.

I will continue to fight this injustice.
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f2e6e6edb01a460189de0c058b57296d&_e=NZL0B3Hu__ukXyzKIsZXmTYPAEu6eVudsfaQrWX5flIgNhvUvyrXKTxP6kPXN3E3QmHFgftYfnSiz-mfy_Z1_cnUvu63GX4MVbSFPTVH_zy1Ebel4pcaZDKvv_HbMuKqS3vx1mKlu2YDG4AVd_QxVa6tVtiBr6zcqRutXgN5KA9yOEWOdGzZIDtVTwV70pigjN2Bs9j8vQLS4pa9g5-y7BkzTU6Q9ut8k8RqnzUPzbv-UJYKB5T8DIf_DZyF8Tze3H4uF7cOG73QEry1yCP8bwlH9VsA6epAhcoanXq3Ok5JWT6r6iDH7V_oBWxBkEfPxYgxiwmSmDyx5Pz-pkU8w9bJvs8EjOr-MOpiBt_hpbPZXTUbHRWaSQLOnxQbnBAJC9giB8sqPEEga9OAHIdfaQ%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
The Democrat Deep State wants **$146 MILLION** from me - all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America's elections.
---
To comply with such a frivolous demand, I'd have to give up **_everything_** I own - including my dignity.
---
That's why I have **officially _APPEALED_** this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets.
---
_As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater "heavenly treasures" await us._
---
Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_ more... They are the "heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value."
---
**And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and "delayed indefinitely," I have hope that I can win mine too!**
---
_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Friend._
---

As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater "heavenly treasures" await us. Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth infinitely more... They are the "heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value." And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and "delayed indefinitely," I have hope that I can win mine too! But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Friend. name: Scalise, Steve
subject: Election results should be tabulated within 72 hours AND EVERY voter should present a photo ID
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you agree this should be required, I'm asking you to sign my petition:

| |
---
| | | It's been over THREE WEEKS since Election Day and ballots are _still_ being counted in multiple House races.

**This much is clear:**

We must require election results to be tabulated within 72 hours AND for EVERY voter to present a photo ID at the ballot box. This is the only way to ensure our election integrity.

So if you agree this should be required, I'm asking you to sign my petition right here and right now:

| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b1afc706272c48ddacfd535785d84e57&_e=zMILsUTK0QUmDLmhlTElP-Ps_Q_8MyeWwJ65Q-wfFG5vMewofBsfCPJxfjwT3bessbVKWVhNtX4mMSlEoArwtrX8Zp060C3EJYg8246nVDCc39ULhIMNVRkiNngx31YuLtNCNqIsaH9y2hQoCNBvWHKjD1Ued4QG_1KgIIuSA-yH3usrT0WCZeqHw-wrXqEw9MTxervBmFxz6pfePKucEUMGpFkaRC-Vi699aUZnlsEc4080yIPS7gDtFo9i8ivzThupSoU75Pgkxbzys25zPheZuNMCGq3SAJdFmdXeYratO7wejn3s77xlTWot91xFUO1fJmCWEMi-TAuZlefacziWAa3MqeB_2Qv6Wt-MADABF6eM4CyLS32e_GNrVsRjW6zLx04csdMmfnLzdGIeB_hu3_fyFwJVZhwdXbXS_Ko%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b1afc706272c48ddacfd535785d84e57&_e=zMILsUTK0QUmDLmhlTElP-Ps_Q_8MyeWwJ65Q-wfFG5vMewofBsfCPJxfjwT3bessbVKWVhNtX4mMSlEoArwtrX8Zp060C3EJYg8246nVDCc39ULhIMNVRkiNngx31YuLtNCNqIsaH9y2hQoCNBvWHKjD1Ued4QG_1KgIIuSA-yH3usrT0WCZeqHw-wrXqEw9MTxervBmFxz6pfePKucEUMGpFkaRC-Vi699aUZnlsEc4080yIPS7gDtFo9i8ivzr7rfswYR0FWEUDvJaa5MFfBYgguJVhemzPK_CcqKKKwdK_6kXun_rddRk2Qluq_I51gD_l4MaEWZ9-q5SxL80MpLRgVygxTdlPCe3VV8y_B_pmr_6M5DUl_ZLgL4ahQFuYk2Wt6SzCiUbn9NJ8yVgSCNNyjS2TiHM8ltuF51iSM%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b1afc706272c48ddacfd535785d84e57&_e=zMILsUTK0QUmDLmhlTElP-Ps_Q_8MyeWwJ65Q-wfFG5vMewofBsfCPJxfjwT3bessbVKWVhNtX4mMSlEoArwtrX8Zp060C3EJYg8246nVDCc39ULhIMNVRkiNngx31YuLtNCNqIsaH9y2hQoCNBvWHKjD1Ued4QG_1KgIIuSA-yH3usrT0WCZeqHw-wrXqEw9MTxervBmFxz6pfePKucEUMGpFkaRC-Vi699aUZnlsEc4080yIPS7gDtFo9i8ivz7Z_CBYA26Qo5ct-AMVaukqpIpKto2H9TKCUgbCzOkRMRMjBpFGImdZGERd_13fQi3J9HhTKjTFAKnrZvQoG7DVlTvCrkKuqHJWwDpTCM32jNl7b2ABL5CWq5rrZzzf1ytdDeLnXbs71ZMNbClRJwuQFAHa1MJZiFh45dmk-w-jk%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **

clean_body: Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you** all ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a Founding Supporter. | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron**Actor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

## Black Friday Sales Approach $1 Trillion
Total Black Friday revenues this year are projected to grow 2.5-3.5% to $985 billion, with online shopping alone expected to rise 8-9%, reaching approximately $296 billion. [You can see a full analysis here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFy8yAQhJ8GOjwcYJ9UUPyNO_9tSg0Sh30JForAzujtM1aTSZHqiu92Z3ffLsMlcOb5-j_cybdUBqONUwDK9EMMnLfByegTkSEryQNa02Hf607efNKnMOJ4RKMBJ41ENgG4kTDiCS1K9i83ANMDWHDHQxdH53rsonaWjhCF0xS5lfXwXnhuN0p5K09aD1O5y-xvrS1V2H_CnIU5fz7oQYrbCwpzHnO57idMHyqtHMOmaguNa-Op7hL7C-7Nfj6UWlaKPDUuc5Wrj8sX58z1hMLp6z1w3lO0v1Z5evMdAAD__6f2ZIY). The analysis shows that last year, consumers preferred online shopping and mass merchants, with 63% of shoppers favoring online-only retailers and 53% choosing retailers like Best Buy, Walmart, and Target. Over $222 billion was spent online in 2023, with 65% of the total revenue coming from electronics, clothing, furniture, groceries, and toys.
## List: 42 Ideas for Those Thanksgiving Leftovers
_Taste of Home_ has put together [a list of 42 recipes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FyhCAUheGngU4HLrhAQZHGbtOmdFi5rCQojt6s49tnTL_9me_M_3Uf7iGXvDw_w4yeUh1AgG6kbMANMeRyDppHnxABFUcvjQJrnBOWT95ZNVpMCZ01nQs2wS2ZDrWNwTwMdjz7S5MSnJRK6q618aG1MzYKrbCTkWmBMVPd2u-aF5owlbO-cGvHOvPiJ6J1Z-qDQc-gP46jpbAT1jTVGa8Ng36speBIuS4MeqprI0VDv9sPnk3BRJe2M-j55uN65FLyfjNMi-cccvm_oXfZLw9_AQAA__-o-Vqe) for the second-best part of Thanksgiving—the leftovers. Each recipe features turkey and ranges from basic sandwiches to soup and casseroles, and there’s even a tip for repurposing bones for [homemade turkey stock](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FyhCAURb8GOh3egxUoKNLYbdqUDspjJYuLo2Qd_z5j-rR37pwz5-s-3H3K6fX49Au5GsuAAlUD0KAdgk_5HBQPLhIhSU4OtESjrRWGzy5KPVphOw8mdrdujBKs197Y2CkZo-LJXTQAtAAS1K01YVTKahOEknSDwJSgkGrZ2u-SXnWmmM_ypq2dysKzm2tddyY_GPYM--M42ur3SiXOZaHrw7DfaEor7Qz7a1x8oKb-bE86m72W6cmw55sL65FyTnunmRKPxaf8Z6j_Fb8d_gYAAP__ivpYjw). Travel in your 80s? We can’t reverse aging, but we can age better. Starting in your 30s, the mitochondria, responsible for 90% of your body’s energy, take on damage with time and your cells slowly lose the ability to repair it. This decline wears down our physical strength and endurance, lowering quality of life over time. But, recent discoveries have revealed a way to restore this process and support healthy aging. [Mitopure®](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2uozAQhZ_GdEH4J4ALF9ll3SXbRNoSGTyEWdkYwRCUt1-x4pa3PeebbzTz597eHQacXg8XwdCQWlEIdeH8InTrHYZPqzJvBgABMgPDKynqSuuizkajPC-V09euHwTvVV13FZdaD0Nf1U4Cz9AcNs6F5lxydc1r3ymlq9oXSsKVe6YK8Ehpyf8mnGiEIXzSG5a8TzELZiSaVyZvTFgm7L7vOWGEgBMcABM2zEzYbricY0zajWK7pm3pgcnmOYI9G1EeTQSPW2Sy-RUdhjPsXZwdviYmmx_25_1MCZYDfP62X1iaCCZisnlstCBhmpgo3boCtR7o8Mnmli3GzzuGgGtZMVW8jkX_z6Hv3vs24l8AAAD__7jjfds) is clinically shown to trigger a cellular recycling pathway to give our energy generators new power. When taken daily, Mitopure replaces aging mitochondria and helps to rebuild new ones, increasing cellular energy. The results? Studies found participants saw muscle strength and endurance increase without any changes to exercise. Ready to experience renewed energy for yourself? clean_body: Total Black Friday revenues this year are projected to grow 2.5-3.5% to $985 billion, with online shopping alone expected to rise 8-9%, reaching approximately $296 billion. | | | | | | Friday, November 29, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1972, Atari launched , a simple table tennis-themed arcade game. It was the first commercially successful video game and helped establish the video game industry. Welcome to our post-Thanksgiving Friday edition—a bit shorter than usual, to join you in enjoying the holiday. Later today, we'll be sending you a special message featuring our sponsor, , offering exclusive Black Friday savings on their world-class language learning platform. Ready to transform your language dreams into reality? ## Experts Warn Texans To Watch Out For Scams
The holiday shopping season is officially upon us, and while some retailers are offering eye-popping deals, experts warn to [be on the lookout for scams](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8Gb0QGjAkDQxdv6drRuuFeYlQMlqFx8vZV0rnz96Oj83WZLxBTzLdPWMm1Ryiz7OXAheDSzggxPeehQ3ft0YqOnDBKno2149gtTqsAiJrIaDiHYGyvPGmPGq6BTO-76F5nQkgrhJKDPBmrIIAOvR5JIZ7Z0BPGVvZTW6jRA2pIz3Kn_eTL2iW3tLZVpj6YnJic_LXCT20xv1Imp0xHZXJKxUNicnrveV3KttFe-QF7JuQl8JJTzMSrh7VyqHwpKSI8_6ox3_hB9E0ZeSbYa7c73I6YUqyjYUN_WyGmN0_7V9Ddyd8AAAD__-qRbH8). "Especially this time of year, don't let your guard down," said Jason Meza of the Better Business Bureau. According to the BBB, Texans' losses from scams jumped from $2 million in 2022 to [$9 million 2023](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAURb8Gb1jwjLEZGLp4S9eO1iM8EiQcLKBx_PdVsne_ukfn_FzWC8YUH7dv3Mi2V8grCFBcSg5m9RjTuarOWye8kR1ZOQ0wT8Zo3d0tIqF2iuQc5KQG70dNQZAgp0c1zqKL9n0mJRgpB1DQT2bAgGMQo6bB-5kpQT62XPp2p0YvrCGd-Umlv-atS_be2l7Z8MVgYbAcx9GH_Jrwt7b4eE8YLA86KoPFOccLJcJKlX8Utuj5SVh4oT2Xxlveeb3iVrti_X7ElGLVE1PitmFMH2D7t8DTwl8AAAD__x-_Xuc). This year alone, the Federal Trade Commission received reports of online shopping scams totaling more than $300 million nationwide. Kathy Stokes with AARP warns shoppers to be [wary of gift cards](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQxvGnMRsIH7aJBw9d2NK1I7pw52DJjpFxQ3j7Ku3c_dP3k_5f1_mKIYbH_RMTu_ryeYYeVCtlC3YmDPGcVUPu1pOVDTs5DnAZrTWmWd1igLSxylijNWjNyizyhprkKL02SxPc-0xKsFIOoKAb7YAete-14YHoIlTPFGouXV258gt3H8_85NItOTXRrbVuuxg-BEwCpuM4OsSydbncBUwpP_gUMO0Lpr31Bb9JwBQePrdvVsC05hgIz7ZwxMrU_i0Lb7nUbq0pNsXRdoQYw25Gofp7whB_7fpvjKeDnwAAAP__XRphsw) and to avoid using peer-to-peer banking services like Venmo or CashApp with retailers since they have fewer protections than credit cards. Although detecting scams has become more challenging in recent years, Meza offered this timeless advice: "If it sounds too good to be true, it probably is."
## _Landman_ Explores Life in the Permian Basin
_Landman_ , a [new Paramount+ series](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uwyAUQOGngY0ILn9mYOjiLV07WthcYiRsLEPT-O2rdO98pE86X_fpHnLJ--MzbOj7K9UJOCgmBAM3xZDLNSka_cyjExS9sBIG65wxdPVaJa6ltCgUH6RGqyEtKS6zSdwMEWn2b0wIcEJIUHCzToYUdOLaoIxxIIpjzL2et75ix1doqVz1iedtqRstfu39aER-EBgJjAfWo-A7ERhzYyXscQs7m0PDyOrOAuvnN7LW63mxwSqhrKKnj8dPLiU3Y4nijy3k8sf3f3-fHn4DAAD__wJJV0g) created by Taylor Sheridan and starring Billy Bob Thornton, Jon Hamm, and Demi Moore, will explore the modern oil boom in the Permian Basin of West Texas. Inspired by the [2019 Texas Monthly podcast _Boomtown_](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GurCAQxvGngW4NDIpSUNzGbm97SjPKuJKgGJms69ufuP3pvuKfX_L9PIcnxhS3139cyfNnzgMoqB9aP8ANAWO6hloGP6rgtCSvWwNd65y1cvGtphmss8p1qhudxWlyY4MKDKpOTY2M_sa0Bqe1gRqq1hmcsZlVY8mE0IlaUYicj4oXYvpgmdOV33RUU15l8gvzXoT5J6AX0J_nWX2jNW-8pOuOBPR7DhMWLgL6Qkeke4w5r5zPTUAvDx_2M6YUi21FrV4rxvT1-c_Dbw-_AQAA__-Htli0), the show follows Thornton as crisis executive Tommy Norris, navigating the challenges of land acquisition and crew management in the volatile oil business. Most of the filming for the series took place [in and around Fort Worth](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQgOGngY0IDoJhYOjiLV07WmdzxEjYjgDFydtX6d75lz7p_7lNN8wl7_dv3Cj0VzomkGCEUgL8FDGX92R4DLOMXnEKatDgBu-t5WuI6IlAJpAEZnYOnbZEQ1ILwOxs4jl8MKXAK6XBwGXwGhNek7xa0jE6ZiTF3I966St1emFL5X08qV6WY-MlrL0_GtNfDEYGY1sq0V5x75_MYDxXqiRObKLgHjfcRVuPU6RcNooMRl5DfJy5lNzswIy8b5jLH93_fX0G-A0AAP__Sx9Xdg), the site of the elite Petroleum Club and the headquarters for the American Association of Professional Landmen, both of which are featured in the show.

Scenes were also shot on the campus of Texas Christian University, where the daughter of one of the characters competes in track and field. The show debuted last week. **➤ Did you miss our donation opportunity yesterday?** I checked our revenue numbers last night, and we're in danger of missing our target for November. Forget DIY renovations. [Co-ownership could do to real estate what Uber did to taxis](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8kL-O4yAYxJ8Gd7H4ZzAFxUlRulx7JfpsPmwksC0gueTtV87Wu-3MT6OZ-Xd3d4gpbstfyGjbK-yOUy4vjF24cR5iejvZeTtRb1iHlmnBR22MUt1qJ5QTcDMGFWDAWSELQZtAJ6RhFgProj3DGOOGMcEl77UREGAIdFAovB-JpOhj20vfVmz4ghrSe39i6ec9d8murR2ViD-E3wi_xe2JtfUHzFD3kzhlcXu07Or-KDMScfW5fPsJNh-35YAFCVcnk9HHRybiekBpG5a6xoON9CKpdp-9hKu2Qcb6C-MY1cMoBB2p6Yr1x_-YUqxKE0mXDDF9mrcfr3xa_hUAAP__LhV1gA). It's simple: buyers share ownership of a high-value asset, splitting costs while enjoying all the benefits. And it's spreading like wildfire - growing 21% per year. Take vacation homes, for example. They're expensive to own and vacant most of the year. Co-ownership lets people fully utilize these properties at a fraction of the cost. Companies like [Pacaso](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8kL-O4yAYxJ8Gd7H4ZzAFxUlRulx7JfpsPmwksC0gueTtV87Wu-3MT6OZ-Xd3d4gpbstfyGjbK-yOUy4vjF24cR5iejvZeTtRb1iHlmnBR22MUt1qJ5QTcDMGFWDAWSELQZtAJ6RhFgProj3DGOOGMcEl77UREGAIdFAovB-JpOhj20vfVmz4ghrSe39i6ec9d8murR2ViD-E3wi_xe2JtfUHzFD3kzhlcXu07Or-KDMScfW5fPsJNh-35YAFCVcnk9HHRybiekBpG5a6xoON9CKpdp-9hKu2Qcb6C-MY1cMoBB2p6Yr1x_-YUqxKE0mXDDF9mrcfr3xa_hUAAP__LhV1gA) are already leading the charge. Through their digital marketplace, users buy, sell, and finance vacation home shares. It's been a huge success. They've already handed keys to 1,500+ happy homeowners, earning Pacaso $100m in gross profits. And for the first time, everyday investors can own Pacaso stock. clean_body: | | | | | | Friday, November 29, 2024 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1838, Methodist preacher crossed the Sabine River into Texas at Gaines Ferry. Over the next few years, he established a 500-mile preaching circuit that included 20 congregations. We hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving, and now we welcome you to our post-Thanksgiving Friday edition, a bit shorter than usual, while we join you in enjoying the holiday. Later today, we'll be sending you a special message featuring our sponsor, , offering exclusive Black Friday savings on their world-class language learning platform. Ready to transform your language dreams into reality? Check out the newest trend in real-estate investing with today's sponsor . Abilene ⛅ 56/32° | Amarillo ⛅ 52/39° | Austin 🌥️ 61/40° | Brownsville ☁️ 66/59° | Corpus Christi ☁️ 66/52° | DFW ⛅ 57/36° | El Paso ☁️ 62/44° | Houston 🌥️ 62/47° | Lubbock 🌥️ 53/31° | San Antonio ☁️ 62/43° | Texarkana 🌤️ 56/34° | Experts Warn Texans To Watch Out For Scams The holiday shopping season is officially upon us, and while some retailers are offering eye-popping deals, experts warn to . "Especially this time of year, don't let your guard down," said Jason Meza of the Better Business Bureau. According to the BBB, Texans' losses from scams jumped from $2 million in 2022 to . This year alone, the Federal Trade Commission received reports of online shopping scams totaling more than $300 million nationwide. Kathy Stokes with AARP warns shoppers to be and to avoid using peer-to-peer banking services like Venmo or CashApp with retailers since they have fewer protections than credit cards. Although detecting scams has become more challenging in recent years, Meza offered this timeless advice: "If it sounds too good to be true, it probably is." Landman Explores Life in the Permian Basin Landman , a created by Taylor Sheridan and starring Billy Bob Thornton, Jon Hamm, and Demi Moore, will explore the modern oil boom in the Permian Basin of West Texas. Inspired by the , the show follows Thornton as crisis executive Tommy Norris, navigating the challenges of land acquisition and crew management in the volatile oil business. Most of the filming for the series took place , the site of the elite Petroleum Club and the headquarters for the American Association of Professional Landmen, both of which are featured in the show. Scenes were also shot on the campus of Texas Christian University, where the daughter of one of the characters competes in track and field. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Your 2025 Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs2u5tXWNA

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os2u5tXWNA

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your
2025 Hillsdale College calendar.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025.
But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to
make sure you had this chance to get the 2025 calendar.

Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before November 30
by clicking on this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63899345:s2u5tXWNA:m:3:2532013465:E20802E478E871D103A917850EDB51D1:r

As you know, we live in an era of increasing bureaucratic
despotism. You've seen it, and you understand. More and more, we
are ruled by an administrative state that operates without the
say of our elected representatives.

It is, therefore, completely unaccountable to "we the people."

This collapse of the separation of powers has spread far beyond
the federal level into our states, our cities, and maybe even
where you live!

One particularly disturbing example is in our K-12
schools…

At these schools, swarms of administrators impose dangerous
ideologies and actively undermine parents.

In higher education-especially at taxpayer-funded state
universities-bloated administrations push ideologies that teach
young Americans to disrespect or even hate their country.

But thanks to our supporters, we remain free of this corrupting
influence. We stay true to our mission…

…to provide "sound learning" that preserves "the
blessings of civil and religious liberty."

Indeed, as the crisis in our nation has deepened in recent
years, we have redoubled our efforts to extend this mission
nationwide. But we've only been able to do so thanks to
supporters like you.

Just in the last year, our dedicated supporters have helped
to…

Teach 4 million Americans in Hillsdale's free online
courses, including "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of
the Constitution," "The American Left: From Liberalism to
Despotism," and our newest course, "Marxism, Socialism, and
Communism."

Distribute hundreds of thousands of free copies of the
Constitution to citizens nationwide-especially younger Americans,
especially thousands of K-12 students.

Provide an American classical education to young students
nationwide through K-12 education programs, returning excellence
and proper civics instruction to K-12 classrooms.

Expand the circulation of Imprimis, Hillsdale's monthly
digest of liberty, to more than 6.7 million households and
businesses.

I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar so
that when you use it next year, you'll remember how you can
advance the important work of defending liberty through
education.

Remember, your support is especially crucial because we refuse
every penny of government funding-even indirectly in the form of
federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY-to
remain INDEPENDENT!

Your generosity, and that of tens of thousands of people like
you, reaches and teaches millions of Americans nationwide. You'll
help enroll millions more Americans in free online courses,
expand the readership of Imprimis, and restore excellence to K-12
education.

Please show your support today by making your best
tax-deductible gift of $50, $75, or $150-or the best gift you
can-by clicking the secure link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63899345:s2u5tXWNA:m:3:2532013465:E20802E478E871D103A917850EDB51D1:r

And when you do, you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College
calendar. But you must act before November 30.

Thank you for being a steadfast Hillsdale supporter. Your
generosity is needed now more than ever.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01

Vice President

Institutional Advancement

Hillsdale College

P.S. Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before November
30 at the secure link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63899345:s2u5tXWNA:m:3:2532013465:E20802E478E871D103A917850EDB51D1:r

When you do, you will defend liberty and help us accomplish our
mission year after year. Everything we accomplish is only
possible due to your continued generosity, so thank you for your
support of our mission!

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/is2u5tXWNA

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os2u5tXWNA

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left's "lawfare" before they can financially destroy my family. All I ask is that you **[Rush a"FIRST AMENDMENT FUND" Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0d25d0036eed46dfa7ba816086c2458c&_e=4iMqLjpezuqMEwLy4LMW60ZGiK76MzltJQNtXJcKDa8-zNeVxgDOPv-qIicMPuu_VIb0BtK2W6fgCPG3_FReWHN0DKcJZDyGUGKCc8Fz11HHUroc-dmrzk2uH9R3mqq8SxmeBqBlmpq78pHfjbhrbSB-3mUQJlLDVXJUcaYCRkn75xQxXYXceLBN9fiIWsEiV6RHSF2uvJPCjOehfOWX7pfkTozSFohpFoe1pkVSovOLx4JEmlXMoLJsgFLh1wu2_wT7-B9UVzYLD54Ts4YnoZGyl6Zq-rhzwvSh0oTl3GtobYIjZERuv4JGFxFX6hZt-9caEr0rBOtq4sfNMqspqxOONDVMUuEHqU3qGxqa1DFFqXCOIVOJbcl3WFaHD1E1G-WCoNLC1-_t0nxeSg58aCCCRw7Ye1pD7n_okG3LInA%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _" Make life hell"_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad... I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case - and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud. Everything I've done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It's a national embarrassment. We have to change it. But if standing up and demanding change means you're going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That's what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down. Just think about what's happening to him. Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.** And they know nothing about _you_ , too. I'm in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff. This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name. To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family. Not the Left's lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors. Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth. Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses. So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new** "First Amendment Fund"** to help me defeat the Left's sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0d25d0036eed46dfa7ba816086c2458c&_e=4iMqLjpezuqMEwLy4LMW60ZGiK76MzltJQNtXJcKDa8-zNeVxgDOPv-qIicMPuu_VIb0BtK2W6fgCPG3_FReWHN0DKcJZDyGUGKCc8Fz11HHUroc-dmrzk2uH9R3mqq8SxmeBqBlmpq78pHfjbhrbSB-3mUQJlLDVXJUcaYCRkn75xQxXYXceLBN9fiIWsEiV6RHSF2uvJPCjOehfOWX7pfkTozSFohpFoe1pkVSovOLx4JEmlXMoLJsgFLh1wu2_wT7-B9UVzYLD54Ts4YnoZirpANlJvP4Qv9nrvzeyffO-CZNyPPXvJcSQdbn5IKaC4V_A6hIuyIQ-diJHRRgj-fiKNuQsiB7tm0mmjkyxnyMvym5HfZI0zTcLIbZU4EtwJ472ENtLsHWF7qwuuKeZ7zCikpB4LZUtOv8IhbneR4%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE ** ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0d25d0036eed46dfa7ba816086c2458c&_e=4iMqLjpezuqMEwLy4LMW60ZGiK76MzltJQNtXJcKDa8-zNeVxgDOPv-qIicMPuu_VIb0BtK2W6fgCPG3_FReWHN0DKcJZDyGUGKCc8Fz11HHUroc-dmrzk2uH9R3mqq8SxmeBqBlmpq78pHfjbhrbSB-3mUQJlLDVXJUcaYCRkn75xQxXYXceLBN9fiIWsEiV6RHSF2uvJPCjOehfOWX7pfkTozSFohpFoe1pkVSovOLx4JEmlXMoLJsgFLh1wu2_wT7-B9UVzYLD54Ts4YnoW1IMAixv8zoHvHd6H7NX_rSeqkj6-mVocEJYPRkp2Ob5aE1oX7EjTskec80gCtQ5m9QT1PrzJgCGmwiP58wSCUTga_NLCQqwrDiC-RcSr_c4G_X7AHMnbjJRggN23ZRK8iAuDvVhg5oeyW72VpvBgs%3D)

Every dollar given to this **" First Amendment Fund"** will help me finish this fight - without financially destroying my family. Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left's lawfare will not crush us. Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I'm still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America. Yours Truly,

name: History Facts
subject: A surprising fact about the Wright brothers
body:
The Wright brothers made aviation history on December 17, 1903, as Orville Wright piloted the groundbreaking Wright Flyer aircraft for the world’s first powered flight while Wilbur Wright ran alongside. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68c7rgcn1kc5js22zbp2z4sd0kitj7tklfvpvb7fuaxd6qrzof2uk6zp2v1mfk5rsogxi80vdc8xkll9e22tgpzmiy35uvgw5v1v5498wmnycw51ua7gm2m17bwf0spzb7uisvl5is66y7hjy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snpo2d&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Wilbur and Orville Wright flew together only once.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snpo2d&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snpo2d&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snpo2d&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T he Wright brothers made aviation history on December 17, 1903, as Orville Wright piloted the groundbreaking Wright Flyer aircraft for the world’s first powered flight while Wilbur Wright ran alongside. This event marked one of many instances where one brother took to the skies while the other remained on land, as the pair flew in an aircraft together only once. It was a conscious decision stemming from a promise that Orville and Wilbur made to their father, Milton Wright, vowing to [never fly together](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snpo2d&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) because of the risk of a plane crash. The safety measure also ensured that if one suffered an accident, the other could continue their pioneering aeronautical work. Such an incident nearly occurred on September 17, 1908, during the world’s first fatal plane crash. With Orville at the helm, the flight tragically claimed the life of a passenger on board, U.S. Army Lieutenant Thomas E. Selfridge, though Orville survived the ordeal.
---
On May 25, 1910, the Wright brothers flew together for the first and only time in their lives. That day, Milton Wright permitted his sons to conduct a six-minute flight together near Dayton, Ohio. With Orville piloting the plane and Wilbur as his passenger, the duo ascended into the sky and landed without issue. Orville then took his 81-year-old father aboard the plane for the first and only flight of the patriarch’s life; as the plane gained elevation, Milton excitedly shouted, “Higher, Orville, higher!”
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snpo2d&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snpo2d&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Pieces of the Wright Flyer went to the moon in 1969.
As a pioneering aviator and fellow Ohioan, Neil Armstrong long admired the Wright brothers and their contributions to flight. In July 1969, Armstrong paid homage to his heroes by stowing [several pieces](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snpo2d&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of the original 1903 Wright Flyer aboard the Apollo 11 lunar module. During the Apollo moon mission, each astronaut was permitted to bring a “personal preference kit” containing items of significance. Buzz Aldrin’s kit was filled with wine and bread that he used to perform the first known communion on the moon. Armstrong, meanwhile, carried pieces of muslin fabric and wood from the Wright Flyer propeller, which he had acquired as part of a special agreement with the U.S. Air Force Museum. These relics traveled all the way to the surface of the moon aboard the lunar module Eagle and were donated to the Smithsonian upon the astronauts’ return, though Armstrong kept several of the artifacts for his personal collection.

clean_body: The Wright brothers made aviation history on December 17, 1903, as Orville Wright piloted the groundbreaking Wright Flyer aircraft for the world’s first powered flight while Wilbur Wright ran alongside. | T he Wright brothers made aviation history on December 17, 1903, as Orville Wright piloted the groundbreaking Wright Flyer aircraft for the world’s first powered flight while Wilbur Wright ran alongside. This event marked one of many instances where one brother took to the skies while the other remained on land, as the pair flew in an aircraft together only once. It was a conscious decision stemming from a promise that Orville and Wilbur made to their father, Milton Wright, vowing to because of the risk of a plane crash. The safety measure also ensured that if one suffered an accident, the other could continue their pioneering aeronautical work. Such an incident nearly occurred on September 17, 1908, during the world’s first fatal plane crash. With Orville at the helm, the flight tragically claimed the life of a passenger on board, U.S. Army Lieutenant Thomas E. Selfridge, though Orville survived the ordeal. On May 25, 1910, the Wright brothers flew together for the first and only time in their lives. That day, Milton Wright permitted his sons to conduct a six-minute flight together near Dayton, Ohio. With Orville piloting the plane and Wilbur as his passenger, the duo ascended into the sky and landed without issue. Orville then took his 81-year-old father aboard the plane for the first and only flight of the patriarch’s life; as the plane gained elevation, Milton excitedly shouted, “Higher, Orville, higher!” | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Estimated cost of building the first Wright Flyer (about $35,000 today) $1,000 | | Length (in seconds) of the Wright brothers’ inaugural flight 12 | Length (in seconds) of the Wright brothers’ inaugural flight 12 | | Year the Wright brothers opened a bicycle sale and repair shop 1892 | | Fastest speed (in miles per hour) ever achieved by an aircraft 4,520 | Fastest speed (in miles per hour) ever achieved by an aircraft 4,520 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Pieces of the Wright Flyer went to the moon in 1969. As a pioneering aviator and fellow Ohioan, Neil Armstrong long admired the Wright brothers and their contributions to flight. In July 1969, Armstrong paid homage to his heroes by stowing of the original 1903 Wright Flyer aboard the Apollo 11 lunar module. During the Apollo moon mission, each astronaut was permitted to bring a “personal preference kit” containing items of significance. Buzz Aldrin’s kit was filled with wine and bread that he used to perform the first known communion on the moon. Armstrong, meanwhile, carried pieces of muslin fabric and wood from the Wright Flyer propeller, which he had acquired as part of a special agreement with the U.S. Air Force Museum. These relics traveled all the way to the surface of the moon aboard the lunar module Eagle and were donated to the Smithsonian upon the astronauts’ return, though Armstrong kept several of the artifacts for his personal collection. name: Amanda Chase
subject: Meet & Greets This Sat & Sun
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Come meet Amanda
| | | | Greetings!, I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving.
Can you believe it's less than 2 weeks until the Republican Mass Meeting, when we will choose our Republican nominee for Senate District 10?
Please join me this Saturday and Sunday for a number of meet & greets across Senate District 10.
Busy this weekend? Then please check out our full list of meet & greets and join us at your convenience.
I would also like to personally invite you to a Meet and Greet at my home in the heart of historic Appomattox this Sunday.
Afterwards, you can join us for the parade and tree lighting ceremony, which are just steps from my home in Courtland Festival Park.
The annual Christmas Parade goes right by our house beginning at 4pm and the tree lighting ceremony at Courtland Festival Park is at 5:15pm, which is within walking distance.
I hope you will join me.
There is no cost to attend these events.
If you are interested in sponsoring any of these events, please click the sponsorship button below.
Please RSVP within 24 hours of the event so we can get an accurate count for refreshments.

---
| |
---
I'm running for state senate in a Special Election to fill John McGuire's term in the Virginia Senate District 10 to represent Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties.
Please vote for me at the Republican Mass Meeting to be held Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex. Registration begins at 4:30 pm and ends at 6:30pm.
Please make sure you check your email for the next several weeks for the latest information.
Hope to see you this weekend! For God & Country,

clean_body: Come meet Amanda | | | | Greetings!, I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving. Can you believe it's less than 2 weeks until the Republican Mass Meeting, when we will choose our Republican nominee for Senate District 10? Please join me this Saturday and Sunday for a number of meet & greets across Senate District 10. Busy this weekend? Then please check out our full list of meet & greets and join us at your convenience. I would also like to personally invite you to a Meet and Greet at my home in the heart of historic Appomattox this Sunday. Afterwards, you can join us for the parade and tree lighting ceremony, which are just steps from my home in Courtland Festival Park. The annual Christmas Parade goes right by our house beginning at 4pm and the tree lighting ceremony at Courtland Festival Park is at 5:15pm, which is within walking distance. I hope you will join me. There is no cost to attend these events. If you are interested in sponsoring any of these events, please click the sponsorship button below. Please RSVP within 24 hours of the event so we can get an accurate count for refreshments. | | I'm running for state senate in a Special Election to fill John McGuire's term in the Virginia Senate District 10 to represent Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties. Please vote for me at the Republican Mass Meeting to be held Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex. Registration begins at 4:30 pm and ends at 6:30pm. Please make sure you check your email for the next several weeks for the latest information. Hope to see you this weekend! For God & Country, | | | mailto:craig@chaseforva.com | | == | UPCOMING MEET & GREETS | TOMMORROW | | | | mailto:craig@chaseforva.com | Greetings!You're Invited to the home of Senator Amanda Chase This Sunday | | | | | | mailto:craig@chaseforva.com | WESTERN HANOVER COUNTY | | | | mailto:craig@chaseforva.com | | == | | == | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811 | Midlothian, VA 23112 US | | | | | | |

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/06G8BRyfuE56LhwyT5Mb5A~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLEn4P0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyOVcDc3BjQgpnRlyxSWcdomKKUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/06G8BRyfuE56LhwyT5Mb5A~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLEn4P0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyOVcDc3BjQgpnRlyxSWcdomKKUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/06G8BRyfuE56LhwyT5Mb5A~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLEn4P0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyOVcDc3BjQgpnRlyxSWcdomKKUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/06G8BRyfuE56LhwyT5Mb5A~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLEn4P0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyOVcDc3BjQgpnRlyxSWcdomKKUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---

Restore Our Nation
