name: Neil Parrott
subject: Emergency Spend - Can you help us now?
body:
I hope you had a nice Thanksgiving with friends and family.On Thanksgiving, with friends and family, my wife, April, asked us to write down one thing | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us2.campaign-archive.com/?e=5a45ee1154&u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=c3c711501c)
---
|
---
| | Dear Peter,

I hope you had a nice Thanksgiving with friends and family.

On Thanksgiving, with friends and family, my wife, April, asked everyone to write down one thing we were thankful for in this last year. I wrote that I was thankful for you and for the many people who helped us during this past election.

The picture to the right was taken about a week after the election. We had driven down to visit our daughter in college. The change of scenery was good for us all.

The day before Thanksgiving I wrote to you about a significant, unexpected campaign expenditure, just days before the election. Keep reading for the details, but essentially, we now have $30,000 of campaign debt.

We have been so thankful for your partnership with us. At this point, I could really use your help. _Would you please make an immediate donation of_ _ $10, _$____25__ __, $____50__ __, $____100, or more ___to Parrott for Congress to help us take care of this amount?_
---
| [CLICK HERE TO HELP US WITH THE LAST MINUTE EXPENSE](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=e3ddc96d40&e=5a45ee1154 "CLICK HERE TO HELP US WITH THE LAST MINUTE EXPENSE")
---
| Late on Saturday night, after the Tuesday election, the AP called my race in favor of my opponent. I wanted to wait for every vote to be counted, so we carefully watched the opening of the mail-in ballots in each of the five counties during the week following the elections.

After many hours, and vast numbers of straight-Democrat ballots, it was clear that we would not win. A week after Election Day, I sent out a press release that indicated how thankful I was for the huge amount of grass roots support throughout the district, but that it had, "become clear that April McClain-Delaney will be elected to this Congressional seat. I wish Mrs. McClain-Delaney all the best as she executes her duties to serve the people of Maryland’s 6th Congressional District over the next two years.”

While the race did not go in our favor, I want to say that I am extremely thankful that President Trump won the election. I am thankful for the election of 53 Republican US Senators which gives us control of the Senate, and I am very thankful that the Republicans kept control of the US House.

Right now, the AP shows that the Republicans have 219, seats with 3 U.S. House races still undecided, where 218 seats are needed to have the majority. One of the reasons I ran for Congress was to try to increase our majority by flipping a seat from Democrat to Republican. With Republicans controlling the committees, we can get much more done to help the American People. It is going to be tough having a Congress that is so split, but thankfully, we did maintain the majority.

For my Congressional race, we were in a solid position to win. In fact, our internal and external polls showed us ahead as recently as three weeks out from the election. We developed a powerful ground game led by fantastic volunteers in all five counties.

The excitement on the ground was there. In addition to mailers and radio, we were able to spend more than $500,000 to air four, targeted, fantastic commercials. Thanks to fiscal discipline, over half of the funds raised went directly to airing these commercials.

So, what happened? In the last 2 weeks, my millionaire opponent figured out that I was ahead.
---
| [PLEASE HELP US WITH THE LAST MINUTE EXPENSE](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=25ce77c7a8&e=5a45ee1154 "PLEASE HELP US WITH THE LAST MINUTE EXPENSE")
---
| With two weeks left, she injected an additional $1 million of her own money into her campaign to air really horrific attack ads lying about me. In addition, Maryland’s Governor, Wes Moore, spent $200,000 in separate, slanderous attack ads directly against me, fearmongering to independent voters.

The Democrat polls were obviously showing what our polls were also showing - our campaign was in the lead. They knew they needed to seriously increase their spending on commercials in order to win. At this point, what my race needed was an injection of funds of about $1 million from a national group, like the National Republican Congressional Committee, to help us keep our lead.

We had worked with the NRCC all summer and fall, and they split the cost of two polls that showed we were in the lead. At each conversation, they set a goal for us, promising help if we attained the goal (financial or organizational). We met each goal that they set, then they would set a new goal. We reached out weekly to let them know that we were doing what they asked, but no help came...until very late.

Six days before Election Day, on the last day of early voting, after many mail-in ballots had already been turned in, the NRCC finally indicated that they would help financially. Six days before the election, they offered $50,000 to pay for airing a commercial for us... but only if we would match that same amount.

Knowing that our opponent had just placed advertisements of over $1 Million, we were so excited that the national Republicans were finally willing to help us financially! Our team created the hybrid ad that same day and committed to the $50,000 required match. That ad started running on Friday and continued to election day.

April is a retired CPA, and I am an engineer. We are practical people and were very careful with our finances during this campaign. Earlier that month, we had done a careful accounting and had already purchased as many advertisements as possible with all of the campaign funds remaining to us.
---
| [PLEASE HELP US PAY FOR THAT LAST COMMERCIAL](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=bbcbf8f2f5&e=5a45ee1154 "PLEASE HELP US PAY FOR THAT LAST COMMERCIAL")
---
| We wanted to win, and, fully understanding that we were being outspent by about $1.2 Million to $225,000 on commercials in just in the last two weeks, we agreed to spend more.

We are thankful for the help from the NRCC, and the commercial was fantastic, but as a result of this last hybrid commercial, we now have $30,000 of debt that we need to take care of right away. You have helped us so much. Could you please help us by making a donation _of _$10, $25_ _, $50_ _, $__100, or more_ to Parrott for Congress today?_

This story isn’t complete without thanking one national group, the House Freedom Fund, who came in with a $100,000 ad buy 1 week before election day. While that amount was half of what Governor Moore was spending against us, it was a huge boost in the final days of the campaign.

Had the NRCC invested in this race in a significant way, like they did in other races in other states, many of which they ended up losing, there is a good chance that we would have won this race and flipped the seat from Democrat to Republican.

For now, as I look back on the campaign, I am so thankful for all of the volunteers and donors who brought us to a place where we almost won this race. People from all over the district joined our campaign to mount a huge grassroots effort that was winning the race.

I am thankful for state and national leaders who strongly supported my campaign, like Maryland’s former Governor Ehrlich, Congressman Andy Harris, House Majority Leader Steve Scalise, Congressional members in the House Freedom Caucus, and many others.

I am thankful for my family who supported me all the way through this huge effort. Campaigns are hard on families, and I am so thankful for my three great kids and my gracious wife. Also, I am thankful to God for giving us this opportunity to work to make a difference in our country.

On this Thanksgiving weekend, while I ask for your continued help, I want to say thank you for all of your support to April, me, our family, and our country during this last campaign. Thank you for your consideration, and I look forward to talking with you soon.

Sincerely,
Neil

---
| [PLEASE HELP US PAY FOR THAT LAST COMMERCIAL](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=0c6941ee31&e=5a45ee1154 "PLEASE HELP US PAY FOR THAT LAST COMMERCIAL")

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Officially APPEALED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
I will continue to fight this injustice.

I will continue to fight this injustice.
| [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkU-LnTAURz9N3CnmJiZm4WKKCF1MKZ3FLCUmV98FNZI_ffTbF8vrfrbnwuF3uJ_v87ulnc7thz1woJTmmOb4THMs_k8d1pUc2X2GFmTNeQ1m5pUfOuD92lc4cC2g7w3nunoMctFWG706re3aAyxS8UVjp03XaQV9RcPt4RwMB9lL1UjFuVJecdG1aBfDZFsubzM2dCbymFwI1xV2yuRSE-JW7cMj5ysx8cZgYjAldCVi86Qzom9cOBhM_6ZvVHayJ9VrRPThqNdy-lobK6xfLYMJF4XGGeetdtJ07e0TU8nH7OxxWdpOJsbXXs1A3ZcDPZWDiREPS_sLplCiQybGX5_ztxfLjonx-8dH_T_4xV04M56ZifHnWxUHfz1p3ykpzWS73c47ocpffMTvAf4GAAD__8zMjeA)
---
Dear Friend,
---
The Democrat Deep State wants **$146 MILLION** from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections.
---
To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up **_everything_** I own – including my dignity.
---
That’s why I have **officially _APPEALED_** this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets.
---
_As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us._
---
Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_ more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.”
---
**And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too!**
---
_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Friend._
---
Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t!
---
[**But if you can fund my battle to appeal this unjust ruling, please make a contribution of any amount to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund now that I’ve officially appealed this unjust ruling.**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkU-LnTAURz9N3CnmJiZm4WKKCF1MKZ3FLCUmV98FNZI_ffTbF8vrfrbnwuF3uJ_v87ulnc7thz1woJTmmOb4THMs_k8d1pUc2X2GFmTNeQ1m5pUfOuD92lc4cC2g7w3nunoMctFWG706re3aAyxS8UVjp03XaQV9RcPt4RwMB9lL1UjFuVJecdG1aBfDZFsubzM2dCbymFwI1xV2yuRSE-JW7cMj5ysx8cZgYjAldCVi86Qzom9cOBhM_6ZvVHayJ9VrRPThqNdy-lobK6xfLYMJF4XGGeetdtJ07e0TU8nH7OxxWdpOJsbXXs1A3ZcDPZWDiREPS_sLplCiQybGX5_ztxfLjonx-8dH_T_4xV04M56ZifHnWxUHfz1p3ykpzWS73c47ocpffMTvAf4GAAD__8zMjeA)
---

clean_body: I will continue to fight this injustice. I will continue to fight this injustice. | Dear Friend, The Democrat Deep State wants $146 MILLION from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections. To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up everything I own – including my dignity. That’s why I have officially APPEALED this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets. As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us. Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth infinitely more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.” And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too! But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Friend. Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Inside Scoop Politics PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Kari Lake
subject: The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.

| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xtFk4UGgRkn-JGFlwtO6jw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLFEeP0S-~~)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xtFk4UGgRkn-JGFlwtO6jw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLFEeP0S-~~)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xtFk4UGgRkn-JGFlwtO6jw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLFEeP0S-~~) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xtFk4UGgRkn-JGFlwtO6jw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLFEeP0S-~~)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
|
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
| | P.S. It all started when Alvin Bragg indicted President Trump in New York. Then they bankrupted Rudy Giuliani. Threw Peter Navarro in jail. Arrested Pro-Life protestors. **And sued me for defamation.** Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xtFk4UGgRkn-JGFlwtO6jw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLFEeP0S-~~)**

President-elect Donald Trump faced four criminal cases during the 2024 election, but his risk of imprisonment has vanished after securing the presidency, confirming predictions from several legal experts. Special counsel Jack Smith’s two federal cases against Trump are no longer moving forward,
http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zshmhhkbkja8iqgmlp6fg3u7vs3kg8744h8dun68_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr4cjkmkpj9ctn6ej3fddnk5ob9djlkir7b91lksp7ad1hemgj8d7lk2qj4t9memjn1d1hemgradpk66qqac7gekp72tjlksrr2td2eirj1cblkgp3fdbhemgn4tblm1r7b9hieiqr9ctk66qqcd1mekr7f8h1k8gn48n24hjmcoj4s1j64p33c8iv0

‘This Is A Great Day’: Here’s What Legal Experts Got Right About
Trump’s Criminal Cases

President-elect Donald Trump faced four criminal cases during the 2024
election, but his risk of imprisonment has vanished after securing the

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Official J6 Pardon Petition
body:
| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9wE8/?__vbtrk=MjYyNDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyNDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend – President Trump just won the most decisive **landslide victory** this country has seen in **decades**. The people have spoken, and they want action—real action.
That’s why I’m pushing __**[the Official January 6th Pardon Petition](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9wE8/?__vbtrk=MjYyNDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyNDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__ to the frontlines, demanding a full pardon for every patriotic American who stood up on that historic day—prosecuted by a corrupt DOJ hellbent on silencing us, and crushing the people it should be working for under the weight of a filthy, weaponized government.

[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9wE8/?__vbtrk=MjYyNDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyNDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
On January 6th, 2021, thousands of patriotic Americans gathered at the United States Capitol – __a building they own__ – to _**peacefully, and patriotically**_ protest discrepancies in an Election...
Since then, they’ve had their rights and dignities stripped: _**and they deserve better.**_ This isn’t just a petition; it’s a rallying cry. Every true American who believes in freedom, faith, and a country worth fighting for needs to put their name on this.
Friend — Sign NOW and show the deep state we won’t back down. This is our moment to stand together and reclaim what’s ours.
Will you answer the call? _**_[Add your name now.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9wE8/?__vbtrk=MjYyNDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyNDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**_

[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9wE8/?__vbtrk=MjYyNDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyNDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
__Thank you for joining us on this journey, and thank you for celebrating with us!

_Yours Sincerely,_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9wE8/?__vbtrk=MjYyNDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyNDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Marjorie Taylor Greene
_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9wE8/?__vbtrk=MjYyNDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyNDQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Do people in heaven know what’s happening on earth?
body:
Imagine you’re planning a move to a new country
| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1bd308ec23ea4d078aab2fd4dc75b406&_e=vVAOyXVYgSCarBXUb6XrEcIV4kISjlfN91dIeWLyf3Tb7AuLtyjutEIrLbvpxIDEEeb7JJTZ_PjyB3HMK-lZOG_Fm4Z3YRblVDQiJKWnuxql2EVnN50Q-k_0ft8ILTUJER3pTLWyxtbFrfICQWkZc5h8SZrGX0ZnCNx0PpHhbaGwy1VXaaQMy6DT34ZJK82EpZRuXEekkkSuJ2ccLi6v0ActXL2CqOJozGNc4I2xi__mPjN29VGaYURjoSjMdKX8T3W7-wJekufBea6SDJ68Nut4MfUkae68pJiZvrVmT8tKZwyF-Q_3hhxeKCQM6UziNsqdBaGp-nZuaiBdhTDekqsmykrLBLcr2427gX50ZXQoHsg4S8LVEuSV4PckxUP82k_F55508S0sGpO9iPQMEuIsCJGteUF88K6kjWpiLfI%3D)
---
Hello Peter,

Imagine you're planning a move to a new country--a faraway place you've never visited before. Wouldn't you want to know everything you could about it--what the culture is like, the language, the climate, and most importantly, how to get there? It would make a huge difference in how you prepare for the journey!

As Christians, we know that one day we will leave this world and be united with God in heaven. But surprisingly, many of us know very little about what awaits us in that incredible place.
---
| | In my book _A Place Called Heaven_ , I dive into Scripture to answer 10 surprising questions about heaven, including:

* Is heaven a real place or just a state of mind?
* Will we know our loved ones when we get there?
* Do people in heaven know what's happening on earth?
* What difference does a future heaven make in our lives today?

---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1bd308ec23ea4d078aab2fd4dc75b406&_e=vVAOyXVYgSCarBXUb6XrEcIV4kISjlfN91dIeWLyf3Tb7AuLtyjutEIrLbvpxIDEEeb7JJTZ_PjyB3HMK-lZOG_Fm4Z3YRblVDQiJKWnuxql2EVnN50Q-k_0ft8ILTUJER3pTLWyxtbFrfICQWkZc5h8SZrGX0ZnCNx0PpHhbaGwy1VXaaQMy6DT34ZJK82EpZRuXEekkkSuJ2ccLi6v0ActXL2CqOJozGNc4I2xi__mPjN29VGaYURjoSjMdKX8i8YrNLk4G02-m4iRawykJwO74APfgZ0L8xRgZcXp7KG54bEDw8Hfe5uYyCWfaB0ljQq6HGHNRy8QYGmrUcrCHiVcT3IrUpOOaiMu7i1CWcCuWLNMllfXgmryWDfdAwrMq_q4L1SYXj-tpQBCnZa8hVFr7554-4U060Q3TPaPsM8%3D)
---
| | I know many of us have asked these questions at some point. Understanding what the Bible says about our eternal home doesn't just satisfy our curiosity--it transforms how we live today. By shifting our focus from the temporary struggles of this life to the eternal glory that awaits us, we can live with greater hope, purpose, and peace.

To thank you for your generous gift to _Pathway to Victory_ today, I'd love to send you a copy of _A Place Called Heaven_ , [https://secure.ptv.org/a-place-called-heaven-generous-gift-1](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1bd308ec23ea4d078aab2fd4dc75b406&_e=vVAOyXVYgSCarBXUb6XrEcIV4kISjlfN91dIeWLyf3Tb7AuLtyjutEIrLbvpxIDEEeb7JJTZ_PjyB3HMK-lZOG_Fm4Z3YRblVDQiJKWnuxql2EVnN50Q-k_0ft8ILTUJER3pTLWyxtbFrfICQWkZc5h8SZrGX0ZnCNx0PpHhbaGwy1VXaaQMy6DT34ZJK82EpZRuXEekkkSuJ2ccLi6v0ActXL2CqOJozGNc4I2xi__mPjN29VGaYURjoSjMdKX8gn1Mz-z49iWLFdG7dT66imphFkFlrKqPgMvWNKiq0g807fDJQtbgAoNZCiE76Ln0Xp5QXyDni5jZD_3Ud8f1OsRO_VBPeXz1hAdkWt9U5rvk90hmU_xRcs1SsX1paJ4WorycUOqM-tLozFZTsoTjPYRFkTgNvickTvMHYK_zl8A%3D)

I hope this book will give you a clearer picture of the future God has prepared for you and help you live each day with eternity in mind.

Thank you for your continued support, which helps us spread the gospel of Jesus Christ to a world in need of hope.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - For your gift of $75 or more, we'll send you _A Place Called Heaven_ , the beautiful gift book _Encouragement from A Place Called Heaven_ , our exclusive ministry brochure, and the companion message series on DVD and MP3 audio. Click here to get a copy of this spiritually uplifting bundle: [https://secure.ptv.org/encouragement-from-a-place-called-heaven-large-kit-1](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1bd308ec23ea4d078aab2fd4dc75b406&_e=vVAOyXVYgSCarBXUb6XrEYBXT9OyEMPTNz4KIEazktx6ifGQDuMp1H8DXwEgqlYCCZjWo3pJQSkl6sBgAV8wd9-8OSdcc4aez8TrhOv5ZBoZM2PHICCsR8WFl7yoy7JODT0u-BfrLv37G2b_hVkOr4zZ0G3j2i7PBe2m78mqTkyzuJCKkahpVXkZxfKsL8FFQSzADXLf6mOu_PW2jnK7XECJqal3PC7a5C0w1Di_H8H_e2WXeZKggz5GE5vu26tuUo41RqbbciZfohTCUEYB7U_YFLuZvMJ6lERf9NATnsFet8F6DrSOvPk7VCB9YOb1fqKYtiMa3T-NlF9Fj4AFBsa1uHaRS2rrF-QWFjy9gceVhR6R_SNcjv8mEz8TO4uE8YjzsXN6MKh-nV4bQ7S8Rw5wpTAC_xpukPl6TTZieY77GD4CebwVnVjJZjFmnqGC)

Thank you for your continued support, which helps us spread the gospel of Jesus Christ to a world in need of hope. Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ. Sincerely, Dr. Robert Jeffress P.S. - For your gift of $75 or more, we'll send you A Place Called Heaven , the beautiful gift book Encouragement from A Place Called Heaven , our exclusive ministry brochure, and the companion message series on DVD and MP3 audio. Click here to get a copy of this spiritually uplifting bundle: PO Box 223609. Dallas, TX 75222

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Invest in transforming the Democratic Party
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We know it’s Black Friday, but this isn’t another email about sales. After
a day of gratitude, we’re now focused on how we can create a better
future.

Today, we’re asking you to invest in transforming the Democratic Party.

Justice Democrats is recruiting the next set of progressive candidates to
run for Congress, reject super PAC money, and fight for the best interests
of working class people instead of corporations and the wealthiest few.

As a grassroots organization that doesn’t take a dime from corporate
interests, we rely on contributions from people like YOU. That means the
number of candidates we’re able to find, endorse, and help run for office
directly depends on how much money we raise from emails like this one.

In the past, we found and supported progressive champions like AOC, Jamaal
Bowman, Cori Bush, and Summer Lee — leaders who took on out-of-touch
establishment Democrats and won.

If we’re going to get the change we deserve in this country, we need to
defend our incumbents — including the Squad — and send new progressive
voices to Washington.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241129?refcode=em20241129-36194&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36194_1203867_bcDEyn&akid=36194%2E1203867%2EbcDEyn ]So, with our November fundraising deadline approaching tomorrow at
midnight, can we count on you to pitch in $5 or more today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241129?refcode=em20241129-36194&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36194_1203867_bcDEyn&akid=36194%2E1203867%2EbcDEyn ]Contribute $5

Your contribution will go a long way in helping us take on the powerful
status quo and create real, progressive change for communities across the
country.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241129-36194-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36194_1203867_bcDEyn&akid=36194%2E1203867%2EbcDEyn

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36194%2E1203867%2EbcDEyn

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

* **Lockable Zippers:** Keep your belongings secure with lockable zippers, offering added peace of mind during transport.
* **Padded Protection:** Your firearms and gear will stay safe and secure, thanks to the bag's padded protection.

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Why GIFFORDS? Why today?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We know you can’t contribute to everyone who asks you for money, and we never expect you to give every time we ask.
#

Friends -
We know that you get a lot of requests for money from different organizations—especially at this time of year.
We know you can’t contribute to everyone, and we would _never_ expect you to give every time we ask. But today, if you’re able, we hope you’ll choose to [**make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC before our November fundraising drive ends tomorrow.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov24.MBs8nS&refcode=em241129-1-30&t=1&akid=9520%2E3935704%2EIlm-aJ)
Right now, our gun violence prevention movement is at a crossroads. In less than two months, a new Congress will be sworn in and Donald Trump will be in the White House.
We know many of this year’s election outcomes are not what we wanted, but this is not the time to give up. This is a time where we must fight harder than ever before to make sure the progress we’ve made in our gun violence prevention movement isn't reversed by the MAGA-right.
[**If you’re with us in this fight, will you please use this link to make your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC? Today is the perfect day to join the community of hundreds of thousands of others who have contributed to GIFFORDS PAC.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov24.MBs8nS&refcode=em241129-1-30&t=11&akid=9520%2E3935704%2EIlm-aJ)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/46177?c0=giffords-em-nov24.-bjOWq&refcode=em241129-1-30&t=12&akid=9520%2E3935704%2EIlm-aJ)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-nov24.ILqYYQ&refcode=em241129-1-30&t=13&akid=9520%2E3935704%2EIlm-aJ)**
---
****
Thank you,
The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=9520%2E3935704%2EIlm-aJ) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: JL Trahan
subject: Small Business is 80% of employment in the USA and the target of the taxman and regulatory. We win when we work together.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texas Vote Now as a public service to all voters | 3355 West Alabama suite 980-ZIMMERN Houston Texas 77098
body:
Our state and federal legislators have targeted the small business owner with the bulk of the tax burden and regulatory. Their lobbyists have big corp
| | [](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/33448?id=1311491.591.1.f21c93ed765fc13fd58c3ca86e039cc2)
---
[](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/33448?id=1311491.592.1.ac7601c210e1e7e8b757ca3d3bc7696d) |
---
Our state and federal legislators have targeted the small business owner with the bulk of the tax burden and regulatory. Their lobbyists have big corps paying almost zero tax and have turned their regulatory into secondary markets where they trade "credits" for cash and stick us with the bill. At BIZPAC, we have organized and are fighting back. Join with us and take control. Together, we are taking control and turning this around for small business owners.
---
## Announcing the VIP Founders Club
---
Join at the VIP Founders Club level and you and your guest never wait in line, pay a fee and you are invited to private briefings and exclusive receptions with only fellow VIP Founders Club Members. **We have 24 Luncheons and Receptions planned for 2025** **PLUS Special Events and trips to the Capital to work with our Legislators** **And** **the BIZPAC Center for Business Excellence Accelerator and PITCH ROOM**
---
|
---
| | Caption goes here
---
Caption goes here
---

---
**It is time to renew your membership and we hope you will take advantage of this amazing offer.** **The small business owner is vulnerable alone, but, together we are strong.** **We are building an effective and amazing organization that fosters our business growth and guides our legislative bodies.** **-JL Trahan,**
**Founder & Executive Chairman**

## When the Polling Is Worse Than ‘Damn Lies’ – RedState
The old saying, supposedly made by Mark Twain (perhaps quoting Benjamin Disraeli), goes – “There are three types of lies: lies, damn lies, and statistics.” Well, statistics can certainly include polling. And so, we have learned this maxim anew this election cycle. David Plouffe, a senior advisor to [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=3a8f0e42b26f4d27a4987b7e04351705&_e=lD-_-TYdgOwti9f55_1RoAkPrHqGeFBYUvgy7dtS2MtY2q8RQJPuPH7nubsSVZFp6_y27Fj-jQQ0WhHeUbqYVL8TLbamlOeXU7yenBr5d_jsLvvKQNUr6SIZp5D4iIkWOIxb08QPXCB8lytLu6OxF0ITGcMUXbo95uxKWFNv-e9n_y2kcQUVKHJC9gvh1gDzCswLuzP-RdDrYEZf7Aa0o9-GXky_IcN5_a42sPjN_iMO_2njOnl3RwDzA06USlRiJatEOLWWdO5EA-1mOyjEvQ%3D%3D)

If these were normal times and the United States of America had a normal functioning president, the idea of arming Ukraine with nuclear weapons to expand its war with Russia would seem outside the realm of reality. “President Putin? Hello! This is President Biden. Thank you for taking my call!” “Of course, President Biden. I would always take your call. Why wouldn’t I?” “President Putin, I’m interested in peace. My country wants peace. The world wants peace, of course. Several divisions of the Russian army are now massing on the Ukrainian border. body:
We won’t sugar coat it: The threats to our rights, freedoms, and shared values under a second Trump administration are real.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97844189/514771446/2013560128?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGU1N2U4ZS02MGFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ttKXiacd87_5W_lkF0xqa_y0thfoHerbMV4Dxl8ji0=)

Peter,
We won’t sugar coat it: The threats to our rights, freedoms, and shared values under a second Trump administration are real.
But as long as Governor Walz is in office, make no mistake: Minnesota will be a state that protects a woman’s right to choose, stands with working people, defends LGBTQ+ rights, and uplifts kindness and decency.
Our team is already working around the clock to make sure we’re prepared for whatever comes our way in the coming year and beyond.
**But to make sure we can keep up the fight, it’s essential that we close the final $12,400 gap on our November budget target by midnight tomorrow.**
[**Peter, will you pitch in $10, $25, $50, or whatever works for you by tomorrow night to help us make up the difference so we can be ready to stand up for our values the moment Donald Trump takes office?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97844190/514771447/2013560128?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGU1N2U4ZS02MGFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ttKXiacd87_5W_lkF0xqa_y0thfoHerbMV4Dxl8ji0=)

But as long as Governor Walz is in office, make no mistake: Minnesota will be a state that protects a woman’s right to choose, stands with working people, defends LGBTQ+ rights, and uplifts kindness and decency. Our team is already working around the clock to make sure we’re prepared for whatever comes our way in the coming year and beyond. But to make sure we can keep up the fight, it’s essential that we close the final $12,400 gap on our November budget target by midnight tomorrow. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Team Walz ********=******

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Truths from Revelation
body:
What do all these signs and symbols mean for you?
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=862523861bce4ad197a0d794e2da12ef&_e=p2qfyHKPcS-YM1XNNK2TbzCkK8CoNsnjpme-50VTo3Ky8HTL3ENH7x6uJaOcPrUOTusvXT4WHpZzCSyChD930GqqHaD0vYGZc0XrBLQDz2mBtNjtpSo_gmEs_TVcOdsdqasNwVbHCDxgQyv3QXI0c7JhDYjsih_eJMoP1kfd303xouOuPbM7OJSmD0lPj_h9acf1_LRxessH2BwYSJtCJlMfJ559MRWJX9hgmO7LuaXQgfdc4TX8BeFudeF-Z7IlesX6LvesKLJhAa-k17dlx7PW2JoyK81S2Edna4xUCqOwR5csNOVrZSp3lwAfyxZ_ITygc8UqyNnE0xlYA2W0lgZvRLKA-EgG3VbUt3q-3KKSeGr_Ezm0HTB2b8u2cLHYzApYByHtLrURuNZX12vavQ%3D%3D)
---
Hello Peter, Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return? _When we all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!_ _When we all see Jesus, we’ll sing and shout the victory!_ The words of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ’s return is going to be glorious! **But between now and then, how should we live**? What does God’s Word say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ... **what should our response be?**
---
| | When I have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation, which I’ve found helps provide answers and strength in these dark days. And today, I’m pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the book of Revelation entitled _Final Conquest._ Final Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It’s all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event in human history. This book will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn’t want you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God’s plan as never before — you’ll be encouraged!
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=862523861bce4ad197a0d794e2da12ef&_e=p2qfyHKPcS-YM1XNNK2TbzCkK8CoNsnjpme-50VTo3Ky8HTL3ENH7x6uJaOcPrUOTusvXT4WHpZzCSyChD930GqqHaD0vYGZc0XrBLQDz2mBtNjtpSo_gmEs_TVcOdsdqasNwVbHCDxgQyv3QXI0c7JhDYjsih_eJMoP1kfd303xouOuPbM7OJSmD0lPj_h9acf1_LRxessH2BwYSJtCJlMfJ559MRWJX9hgmO7LuaWSJvYzOQrNt-AXwoYcxqB8PiM8U4MVXXa-wSdgMyliD7_NccAUcRgH5_3fNBhm6Jy9grTjoNpZxD1LVrIRAL39Q-Rwq3e_RlgqpGMfky96eVhKbGzWXoAvYJ-ZN6waFP5ZPrnvXwYnD9kD2BAqP1AQFvA7AicHxu_xZPDWM8zgcQ%3D%3D)
---
| | With your generous donation to _Pathway to Victory_ \-- to help keep our ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of _Final Conquest_ for free! You can make your most generous donation here: [https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=862523861bce4ad197a0d794e2da12ef&_e=p2qfyHKPcS-YM1XNNK2TbzCkK8CoNsnjpme-50VTo3Ky8HTL3ENH7x6uJaOcPrUOTusvXT4WHpZzCSyChD930GqqHaD0vYGZc0XrBLQDz2mBtNjtpSo_gmEs_TVcOdsdqasNwVbHCDxgQyv3QXI0c7JhDYjsih_eJMoP1kfd303xouOuPbM7OJSmD0lPj_h9acf1_LRxessH2BwYSJtCJlMfJ559MRWJX9hgmO7LuaUYBfBBjQqGsc7Rdnbq3D_VYONn90fZQLbTWl-JpqHqzaWRLUysluAALxh6VihpvOBxFSopTEzZ5hNQvSLqyy3nN61VOmUa-Wnmy_tM6xmT0sJYu8rhk1z5jhyoISaH8peaNrT9bDWtBoPXrgpAv5ZhqRu4o2IKbvuzAb7iCOMVqw%3D%3D) One day soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest. Until that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom. Sincerely, Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

PO Box 223609. Dallas, TX 75222

name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: Bringing loneliness into the light during the holidays
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| _Editor’s Note: This perspective was first published in the San Mateo Daily Journal, Thursday Nov. 28_
**Bringing loneliness into the light during the holidays** By David J. Canepa For some, the holidays can be the most wonderful time of the year but for others it can be a downright lonely and depressing time. The added pressures of being social, expectations from others that you should be jolly and joyful and even the sounds of Christmas music can trigger feelings of loneliness. There’s no cure for loneliness but there are things we can all do to help ourselves and the people around us to connect in meaningful ways. Nearly a year ago, I sponsored a resolution declaring loneliness as a public health crisis, making San Mateo County the first in the nation to do so. The resolution was prompted by U.S. Surgeon General Vivek Murthy after he declared loneliness an epidemic, noting that it can lead to poor health outcomes such as heart attack, stroke, suicide and that it impacts nearly 50% of all Americans. Earlier this month, the New York Times published an article “A New Campaign Against Loneliness Starts With a Potluck.” It detailed Murthy’s work to address the epidemic and his framework to tackle loneliness with the mantra to create a national culture of connection. This past year, I’ve worked closely with nonprofit Peninsula Family Service, academics and experts in the field including UCSF Professor Carla Perissinotto, California Volunteers in Gov. Gavin Newsom’s Office and staff in the county’s Behavioral Health and Rehabilitation Services to see how the county can enact some of Murthy’s many recommendations locally. I’m proud to say the county has invested greatly this past year in mobility options for older adults who are often isolated; peer support for those feeling isolated and others undergoing behavioral health challenges; unarmed mobile mental health support; mental health awareness and suicide prevention. But what about the holidays and our everyday interactions with the people around us? In the New York Times article referenced earlier, it mentions Dr. Murthy’s recently published handbook “Recipes for Connection” and a new private initiative inspired by Murthy’s work called Project Gather. Murthy writes in the introduction, “just as we need food and water, we need social connection to be healthy.” The handbook and Project Gather aims to reintroduce us all to the benefits of eating together, whether it’s a pastry at the local coffee shop, a group visit to a taco truck or a neighborhood gathering cookout or potluck. Murthy’s handbook shares stories from others including one called “Bites at the Bus Stop” by Noreen in California. Noreen discussed her ritual of enjoying a muffin every morning while waiting for the bus. She noticed an older gentleman who took the same bus at the same time as she did every day, so she decided to strike up a conversation with him and offered him a bite of her muffin. That one act of kindness turned into a 7-year friendship between Noreen and Otis until his death in 2019, where she reflected at his funeral that an unexpected friendship can form over the simple act of sharing a bite of muffin. Another story Murthy shares is “Serving Home-Cooked Connections” by Maya in Washington D.C. who volunteered at a program called Community Meals. She thought she would be packaging to-go meals but realized the program provided a restaurant-style experience where everyone was welcome and sat at communal tables. After serving meals, Maya would join a table that created opportunities to connect with people she otherwise wouldn’t have. Sometimes families shared stories of facing unanticipated challenges and other times the conversations were all laughs. Maya said, “before the meal, we were all strangers. By the end, we truly felt connected, uplifted and grateful to be in each other’s company.” These are two small examples of how sharing a bite, volunteering and striking up conversations with strangers can lead to meaningful connections and help to lift loneliness into the light. So, I am encouraging all Daily Journal readers to be sensitive to the fact that this time of the year isn’t always so joyful for everyone. I am encouraging you to be genuinely kind to strangers, to strike up a conversation with a workmate you don’t normally interact with, to call a family member you haven’t spoken with in a while, to get out of the house over the holidays and do a little volunteering and to be reasonable with what you expect of yourself and others. With that, I wish everyone a very happy, healthy and connected Thanksgiving.
_David Canepa is Vice President of the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors._
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---

Sometimes families shared stories of facing unanticipated challenges and other times the conversations were all laughs. Maya said, “before the meal, we were all strangers. By the end, we truly felt connected, uplifted and grateful to be in each other’s company.” These are two small examples of how sharing a bite, volunteering and striking up conversations with strangers can lead to meaningful connections and help to lift loneliness into the light. So, I am encouraging all Daily Journal readers to be sensitive to the fact that this time of the year isn’t always so joyful for everyone. I am encouraging you to be genuinely kind to strangers, to strike up a conversation with a workmate you don’t normally interact with, to call a family member you haven’t spoken with in a while, to get out of the house over the holidays and do a little volunteering and to be reasonable with what you expect of yourself and others. With that, I wish everyone a very happy, healthy and connected Thanksgiving. David Canepa is Vice President of the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors. | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved.

name: Nancy Northup
subject: Our gratitude
body:
Thank you for never backing down | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97848773/514781672/59579377?sourceid=1150062&utm_campaign=25emkge-1113aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=gratitude&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWExYWM5ZS02NGFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SI454Nbeqo88M8bbHsmD3Vlgj9xJ3_LqfZHW96s2UYg=&emci=3471e7cb-92ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=15a1ac9e-64ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237)
---
Peter,

Today, I want to pause and say _thank you._ Thank you for being part of this movement, standing with us, and fueling the critical work we do every single day. Your dedication—your voice, your advocacy, and your unwavering resolve—means everything. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97848774/514781673/1485890129?sourceid=1150062&utm_campaign=25emkge-1113aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=gratitude&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWExYWM5ZS02NGFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SI454Nbeqo88M8bbHsmD3Vlgj9xJ3_LqfZHW96s2UYg=&emci=3471e7cb-92ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=15a1ac9e-64ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237) **Along with my gratitude, I want to share a small reminder: together, we are powerful.** It is only by working together that we have achieved all that we have. Together, we will continue pushing forward step by step.

From all of us at the Center, thank you for all that you do. We're proud and grateful to have you on our team.

With appreciation,

Nancy Northup

clean_body: Thank you for never backing down | Peter, Today, I want to pause and say thank you. Thank you for being part of this movement, standing with us, and fueling the critical work we do every single day. Your dedication—your voice, your advocacy, and your unwavering resolve—means everything. Along with my gratitude, I want to share a small reminder: together, we are powerful. It is only by working together that we have achieved all that we have. Together, we will continue pushing forward step by step. From all of us at the Center, thank you for all that you do. We're proud and grateful to have you on our team. With appreciation, Nancy Northup President & CEO | "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. subject: THIS JUST IN: Americans have reached record-breaking credit card debt, and corporations are raking in the profit
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97849218/514782296/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjY1OWMwYi02NWFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c7D9mEdZtVGaPC9b5m-tiOKFsiVHiPiQPQNoQgTtMa8=&emci=786e8ed7-05a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=06659c0b-65ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=6787172)
---
Folks, it may be Black Friday, but we’re not checking for deals.
**Not when Americans owe a record-breaking $1.17 trillion in credit card debt.**
While hardworking families are going into debt to make ends meet, corporations are raking in record profits from soaring interest rates and bogus hidden fees.
_It’s a system designed to exploit the working class and line the pockets of the ultra-wealthy._
This isn’t just about numbers. It’s about fairness, accountability, and ensuring that our economy works for _everyone_ — not just the elite.
The reality is that no one can thrive when they’re overburdened with credit card debt. And if we don’t break the cycle and confront the corporate greed at the root of the problem, **nothing will change**.
So instead of complaining about it, we’re calling on YOU to do something about it!
[This Black Friday, will you add your name and join the fight against corporate greed? Too many hardworking people are struggling for us to ignore this.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97849221/514782301/-1395283990?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjY1OWMwYi02NWFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c7D9mEdZtVGaPC9b5m-tiOKFsiVHiPiQPQNoQgTtMa8=&emci=786e8ed7-05a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=06659c0b-65ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=6787172)

Living in Jersey has gotten way too expensive. I hear it from almost every person I talk to.

Did you know that every campaign sign I’ve had since 2016 has said “Lower Taxes” on it? I’ve delivered on that promise, helping to expand the Child Tax Credit and bringing millions back to Jersey for essentials like firetrucks, new roads, and clean drinking water. **I meant it then, and I mean it now.**

**I’m running for Governor to make life more affordable, keep our Jersey Values strong, and ensure that everyone has a real chance to succeed here.** [**Donate before our deadline on Saturday to help us show that our campaign has what it takes to win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97850918/514785998/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20241129_FR_EOM_0_3MO_Josh_NA_NA_1.1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjRmZDBiOS02NmFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-T9248RkXCIWWBMQXV9vqUdy-QgCAUxanWGjTOhRPAk=&emci=2bf4f489-f9ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=e64fd0b9-66ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=37438246)

Thank you,

Josh
|
* * *
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: I knew I had a duty to take action.
body:
When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. | | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
| | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a826bb377bf74d378bda48910c49a090&_e=ZXRjz-j36pHe0JkJtsfE9zNgvzGHPIMaEO2ap57XB-CZGx4xRmvk1tNd5uFfBo8o_8a6eHgaGLs1DthU7T9__SBZnoLpUdOhsZCbuXf6z9MbVKFPqt34Iffu5tn5qJc-T-X-a6WwPpq2TKUEUVy3D-US_WaX-ACqfr5MblWD2fUEA44aqqccYIHhW93vTuIU7-YiXqDPOl1ifhzumTFzmmaJg9H4wt6z73DaiH2nnEA2u4E2f3XVdMSnVKaav7d9EScy-jix4EBWafDtY4uRlcAFBtdCNrxjfI-Itdh4HKu9XTvOJFFXlmiLgoWgc-HqJ9r_Bc2YPWqkZ7HRWZIT1l2wlDG-Ncmoom6YzNa6IzoAAoDo0MlTQB_94qLNJF5usHTA24SclTv5KZsbqpMtBQ%3D%3D)

| | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a826bb377bf74d378bda48910c49a090&_e=ZXRjz-j36pHe0JkJtsfE9zNgvzGHPIMaEO2ap57XB-CZGx4xRmvk1tNd5uFfBo8o_8a6eHgaGLs1DthU7T9__SBZnoLpUdOhsZCbuXf6z9MbVKFPqt34Iffu5tn5qJc-T-X-a6WwPpq2TKUEUVy3D-US_WaX-ACqfr5MblWD2fUEA44aqqccYIHhW93vTuIU7-YiXqDPOl1ifhzumTFzmmaJg9H4wt6z73DaiH2nnEDjjLMjJIXq7Zthkj_BKaltGoCitUUeZEgm63eaWpe6OWBIA20I1AkgSNSWol4kyqSF6aNRIjdSO72-SLNs3d-Dr-fv2KIeU_5E3gy30_SjsRXgL-ITVS7qCYITS2RUL8o18j39oFfP8aeuUFYJMCGHsChCrUiJyHwWbXYq7ndvoQ%3D%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $150 or more today._..](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a826bb377bf74d378bda48910c49a090&_e=ZXRjz-j36pHe0JkJtsfE9zNgvzGHPIMaEO2ap57XB-CZGx4xRmvk1tNd5uFfBo8o_8a6eHgaGLs1DthU7T9__SBZnoLpUdOhsZCbuXf6z9MbVKFPqt34Iffu5tn5qJc-T-X-a6WwPpq2TKUEUVy3D-US_WaX-ACqfr5MblWD2fUEA44aqqccYIHhW93vTuIU7-YiXqDPOl1ifhzumTFzmmaJg9H4wt6z73DaiH2nnEA6h2Wy-x0Y2jrnrbHLSSLRVkRI30NgEYAy7Z2waXHU7STEx89UtuQe9QbJ4WsyTGBtAzE73ymX-3LqElhoTaq0u9cU7Nhs-j_GexGcT20viIX9Z2uHwKL4o7y8lN4KyAhGFg2tRWG7o9KR8lgHMCeLckOLLrlZ_ky-5GeOEhtpIg%3D%3D)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **_[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $175._](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a826bb377bf74d378bda48910c49a090&_e=ZXRjz-j36pHe0JkJtsfE9zNgvzGHPIMaEO2ap57XB-CZGx4xRmvk1tNd5uFfBo8o_8a6eHgaGLs1DthU7T9__SBZnoLpUdOhsZCbuXf6z9MbVKFPqt34Iffu5tn5qJc-T-X-a6WwPpq2TKUEUVy3D-US_WaX-ACqfr5MblWD2fUEA44aqqccYIHhW93vTuIU7-YiXqDPOl1ifhzumTFzmmaJg9H4wt6z73DaiH2nnEDq5KLqnWe5S-L-yq-vq3xMk2ymzDdCJv-whhTguhE4kT-xNelAeNtW9txyRoRPZyv_eWbhKp3nDyabHPjCwkHCVR269BkbF22YBHUCAa0uVpy5rI8hCjanvR11lO1zaWis68QIU2cAxNmWDwmoYe3IKORjoCedWY4HJf2yD1UyTg%3D%3D)_** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a826bb377bf74d378bda48910c49a090&_e=ZXRjz-j36pHe0JkJtsfE9zNgvzGHPIMaEO2ap57XB-CZGx4xRmvk1tNd5uFfBo8o_8a6eHgaGLs1DthU7T9__SBZnoLpUdOhsZCbuXf6z9MbVKFPqt34Iffu5tn5qJc-T-X-a6WwPpq2TKUEUVy3D-US_WaX-ACqfr5MblWD2fUEA44aqqccYIHhW93vTuIU7-YiXqDPOl1ifhzumTFzmmaJg9H4wt6z73DaiH2nnEC1m7d9CengY8nmIqe78QOdwgL-eZYPNZOvOrAmBMLYEHJ5TNajyA25kXO5VDT39cZVCZ3Q3OCnUuM8SnGae5P2nmOJ8muwaaeqK0WnEUBUfY8pvQDMg5sW5M54l2GvgZWt5XVYEJVHZMacejZfo6rGrZ5ZkwOh_zFTZ6PoroyIFA%3D%3D)_**

clean_body: When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. | | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. | | | | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true.<\- this is a man leading “drag queen story hour.”< p style="box-sizing: border-box;"> | | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named Brave Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | | ---|---|---

body:

All Gifts for Service Members
MATCHED Until MIDNIGHT
[RUSH A 2X DONATION NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
USO Supporter -- as you enjoy Thanksgiving leftovers and gear up for Black Friday deals, our service members are deployed all over the world, missing all of the activities this holiday weekend with their loved ones.
At the USO, we're committed to doing everything we can for them, which is why we're excited to share huge news: **Our generous friends at Keystone Light are MATCHING all gifts to the USO, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $15,000, to help support our service members. Please, before you shop the latest deals this Black Friday, will you give and have the value of your gift DOUBLED for the heroes in uniform who do so much for us all year long?**
[**Make a donation of $29 (will be doubled to become $58) before midnight tonight to provide support during the holiday season and into the new year for our service members deployed around the world.**](https://links.e.uso.)
Our service members sacrifice precious time with their families by selflessly putting themselves in harm's way all year long. But during the holidays, it can be especially difficult to serve while others celebrate. That's why it's so important for our heroes in uniform to know that we have their backs right now.
**But this opportunity to DOUBLE the value of your gift for service members expires at midnight tonight -- so will you please make a matched gift now?**

---
[$515 CAN HELP PROVIDE ALL OF THESE HOLIDAY GIFTS (BECOMES $1,030!)](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/2dpGh-Yyj9CR/V3hsYkNKMXFia24xS2NRSWx4VTBhWXlWY3hDYjVENmlseFRwZzBROW9XbCtKRVlBVlY1bTM3V3g4V0h5N2NqQXBxbzdVMGg1em95OHZpdGJCem1XYzdCeWpaMlU2TFBhZTErSHpjdU5LQzg9S0/ZUJsTHdlVmM2MXJRWEgrUFMrTTlEVmpJQ1crVXhYQlpNQ3RKNmV1dE11TVVPSU9ua04wTjV3Mm5FQ250WjMwTDRkb0pGSm1pSmpwSExXaEhhTDIza2lqM3JnUEpTMFRsS0)

Today is "Black Friday." The infamous Friday Americans gorge on materialistic things the day after giving thanks for what we already have :)
So on this day, I'd like to make a few requests I hope you consider.
Summary:
* Support small and local businesses in your holiday shopping
* Become a [paid subscriber today to Let's Address This](https://substack.com/redirect/c3c72e22-5795-48e7-8e46-75e00b0651d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the price of a cup of coffee a month
* Uplift marginalized communities

**Quick Note!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need and welcome your support. **Subscribe join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..w7q5xHTcELtvpP5grorY-n1tL3O6jM-9rT5fKtAvo78?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=152309809)
### Buy Local
One, as you shop, prioritize small businesses, locally owned businesses, women and minority owned businesses, and Unionized businesses. Small, local, and union shops built this country, and we should invest our resources in them to continue to strengthen our middle class. (Shameless plug that if you're looking for stylish attire, shawls, or activism wear, my wife's small business [Equal Entrance](https://substack.com/redirect/8281ef20-ec9a-4745-89c3-233cce34bd16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is your spot!)
### Invest in Let's Address This
Two, I'd like to ask you to join the _Let 's Address This_ movement and become a paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..w7q5xHTcELtvpP5grorY-n1tL3O6jM-9rT5fKtAvo78?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152309809)
For those who are paid subscribers, my deepest gratitude to you, and my ask of you is invite your network to also become a paid subscriber. Or, give them a _Let 's Address This Gift Subscription. _
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..w7q5xHTcELtvpP5grorY-n1tL3O6jM-9rT5fKtAvo78?&gift=true)
I launched _Let 's Address This_ just seven months ago and this week we surpassed 80,000 subscribers! Just incredible. I deeply cherish your trust and partnership as we tackle these critical human rights issues that legacy media continues to ignore.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5978f4c8-aef4-4aaa-90ee-a8bcd5379ff8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Recent paid subscribers to _Let 's Address This_ on why they subscribed.
**Since launching Let 's Address This we have:**
* Recorded and aired **33 podcasts** with national thought leaders.
* Published **231 articles** spanning critical topics like genocide, protecting abortion, economic, social, and climate justice, Indigenous rights, combatting antisemitism, the Presidential debates, child protection, immigration, police reform, and more.
* Earned 80,000+ subscribers from all **50 states** and from **139 countries** globally.

Our movement is growing, and we have major plans for Let's Address This. This includes:
* Long form video content.
* A growing podcast repertoire.
* A _Let 's Address This _merch store.
* New and prominent guest voices.

These projects require resources. And with legacy media plummeting due to lack of credible reporting, my ask of you is to invest your resources into _Let 's Address This_. Help better ensure that you, and everyone you know, is more informed on the critical human rights issues that impact us all.
### Uplift Marginalized Communities
Three, and finally, invest in your local non-profits and social welfare programs. Whether it is donating your time, food, clothing, or money -- play an active role in uplifting those individuals and organizations doing the hard work of serving all humanity. For my part, I am donating to [Humanity First USA](https://substack.com/redirect/9fb11523-eb25-4919-b78d-cdca50e363d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a resilient non-profit that provides food, shelter, clothing, healthcare, and education access to marginalized communities here and abroad.
### In Conclusion
Both our country and our world are in precarious times, and that is why we must continue to stand united for the sake of all humanity. You have my promise to stand firm for justice above all else. Thank you for your trust as we continue to fight for universal human rights. I will not let you down.
Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..w7q5xHTcELtvpP5grorY-n1tL3O6jM-9rT5fKtAvo78?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=152309809)

---|---|---

name: Connor Lounsbury
subject: Freeze warning
body:
Friend,

The freeze is coming.

Sure, winter is coming, but — more importantly — our fundraising freeze is coming in January.

We can’t fundraise at all while the Maryland General Assembly is in session, which means we have to start right now.

We have an end-of-month fundraising goal of $15,000 to hit so we can stay on target before the freeze, and a donation of $5 or more would go a long way to help meet it — will you chip in right now? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241129-1?refcode=em20241129-1]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $10 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241129-1?refcode=em20241129-1-el&express_lane=true&amount=10]
Donate $25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241129-1?refcode=em20241129-1-el&express_lane=true&amount=25]
Donate $50 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241129-1?refcode=em20241129-1-el&express_lane=true&amount=50]
Donate $75 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241129-1?refcode=em20241129-1-el&express_lane=true&amount=75]
Donate $100 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241129-1?refcode=em20241129-1-el&express_lane=true&amount=100]
Other Amount [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241129-1?refcode=em20241129-1-el-other]

No matter what happens, we have to be prepared, and hitting our end-of-month fundraising goal is a big part of that. And with fundraising coming to a halt in a few weeks, we have to do what we can now to be ready.

That’s why we’re counting on you, right now: Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help us hit our $15,000 end-of-month fundraising goal?

[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241129-1?refcode=em20241129-1]

Thanks,
Connor

---
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

clean_body: Friend, The freeze is coming. Sure, winter is coming, but — more importantly — our fundraising freeze is coming in January. We can’t fundraise at all while the Maryland General Assembly is in session, which means we have to start right now. We have an end-of-month fundraising goal of $15,000 to hit so we can stay on target before the freeze, and a donation of $5 or more would go a long way to help meet it — will you chip in right now? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Donate $10 [] Donate $25 [] Donate $50 [] Donate $75 [] Donate $100 [] Other Amount [] No matter what happens, we have to be prepared, and hitting our end-of-month fundraising goal is a big part of that. And with fundraising coming to a halt in a few weeks, we have to do what we can now to be ready. That’s why we’re counting on you, right now: Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help us hit our $15,000 end-of-month fundraising goal? [] Thanks, Connor
