name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: We have so little time left to get these judges confirmed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
These last few weeks are our last chance to appoint and confirm judges who will defend the role of law and our right to vote before opponents of voting rights take control again and target any vacancy they can.
Please -- sign on today to push the Senate forward on judicial confirmations and give us the judges we need to defend our democracy >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112924_1&amount=25]
Team,
With Donald Trump set to take office in January, the Senate must act swiftly to confirm President Biden’s judicial nominees.
Securing these appointments is one of the most productive actions supporters of voting rights can take to protect the judiciary from a right-wing shift and preserve progress on key issues like voting rights, reproductive rights, and environmental protections.
Currently, more than a dozen Biden judicial nominees are awaiting confirmation, including federal district and appeals court judges who are crucial to upholding constitutional rights and balanced justice . If these seats are left open, Trump will have the opportunity to pack the courts with judges who could dismantle decades of progress.
The time is now — let’s not lose this critical opportunity: Tell the Senate to confirm these judges now >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
Senator Elizabeth Warren put it bluntly in a recent op-ed: " [We] need to act like the clock is running out—because it is ."
We call on the Senate to immediately confirm all pending judicial nominees. This is our chance to protect the judiciary from an extremist shift and to ensure that our courts reflect the values of fairness, justice, and equality for all Americans.
Add your name to urge the Senate to prioritize judicial confirmations and stand firm for a fair and balanced judiciary >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112924_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112924_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112924_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112924_1&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. clean_body: These last few weeks are our last chance to appoint and confirm judges who will defend the role of law and our right to vote before opponents of voting rights take control again and target any vacancy they can. Please -- sign on today to push the Senate forward on judicial confirmations and give us the judges we need to defend our democracy >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] Voter Action Project Logo [] Team, With Donald Trump set to take office in January, the Senate must act swiftly to confirm President Biden’s judicial nominees. Securing these appointments is one of the most productive actions supporters of voting rights can take to protect the judiciary from a right-wing shift and preserve progress on key issues like voting rights, reproductive rights, and environmental protections. Currently, more than a dozen Biden judicial nominees are awaiting confirmation, including federal district and appeals court judges who are crucial to upholding constitutional rights and balanced justice . If these seats are left open, Trump will have the opportunity to pack the courts with judges who could dismantle decades of progress. The time is now — let’s not lose this critical opportunity: Tell the Senate to confirm these judges now >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] Senator Elizabeth Warren put it bluntly in a recent op-ed: " [We] need to act like the clock is running out—because it is ." We call on the Senate to immediately confirm all pending judicial nominees. This is our chance to protect the judiciary from an extremist shift and to ensure that our courts reflect the values of fairness, justice, and equality for all Americans. Add your name to urge the Senate to prioritize judicial confirmations and stand firm for a fair and balanced judiciary >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. subject: Support DJT’s Push for 50-State Concealed Carry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=607b4fa7061b442b93e188dab2bf9a5d&_e=uzFHjV41lDjoLZh6HrpFkqEFJDovgELSYwVZmSB7xUOpUaUT_z4T-vUeTL_UYXfwfDIq5L0aX1Sa5rFjBzmUkFGY9B85B8I_T27cpS56BLSWi9Fb7isUKqwZRLTw91HdnRlmyIoEsxMjSb0TKQqMo8ZdzbaNNxEkUvO8J3kMuFdYBbplbWe5tFWtZF2cK4-4Db1MnBURC7Y25p3PbDbcNnWnoTNFBBYtdL0M6Qeps47fAjjmh4IjiuVA5DYcNxeDS3dL8hLNkvjtw8iHBz2mOYhed7feycr-9VMQl5XA-T_BpgHvYVUDBcZlomqjTjcryr06rG79Ib9_rRRkYwQABlJEQN54Xu4hy8TO_MK81T4%3D)

Patriot,

Short on time? **[Watch my quick video message here>>>](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=607b4fa7061b442b93e188dab2bf9a5d&_e=uzFHjV41lDjoLZh6HrpFkqEFJDovgELSYwVZmSB7xUOpUaUT_z4T-vUeTL_UYXfwfDIq5L0aX1Sa5rFjBzmUkFGY9B85B8I_T27cpS56BLSWi9Fb7isUKqwZRLTw91HdnRlmyIoEsxMjSb0TKQqMo8ZdzbaNNxEkUvO8J3kMuFdYBbplbWe5tFWtZF2cK4-4qtuC3BShg0rCAfVzKe2wltJTdsKHCMVnndGfiiB5kQ5VgSPUuSZix31tGUijkGlFR9EzERhjWiz_hfXijo_HISxokxYVXLfJUjdv0kxucq36FJ5gfh3IyGO3cGMBcowghOG9Fk1k303B6KTLhtAl7f8Qz_jM7Z8aU_vBIuNTynM%3D)**

I'm a believer in Constitutional Carry.

But there's the way that it should be, and the way that it is, and our job is to eliminate the gap between the two.

Supporting President Trump's push for 50-state concealed carry reciprocity is a great first step. It means standing up for the rights of law-abiding citizens across the country by ensuring that your rights don't disappear at state lines.

**[Add your name here to support President Trump's push for 50-state concealed carry reciprocity.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=607b4fa7061b442b93e188dab2bf9a5d&_e=uzFHjV41lDjoLZh6HrpFkqEFJDovgELSYwVZmSB7xUOpUaUT_z4T-vUeTL_UYXfwfDIq5L0aX1Sa5rFjBzmUkFGY9B85B8I_T27cpS56BLSWi9Fb7isUKqwZRLTw91HdnRlmyIoEsxMjSb0TKQqMo8ZdzbaNNxEkUvO8J3kMuFdYBbplbWe5tFWtZF2cK4-4cffKF5bYR3139Db8vdMjdEDgp8FxS3CqzCJovUAcGEFn-Q_vUzAEGaOjNtOnBCrir5899fyCiCSt3aihvTi1HoUd2wpsWpdIPYq4ZSskZq04L8Xz4IxKtbYATUh7dQDTjOdpdHTvgbCLRBQspv6QiVUNygKQ5OYKwPPgiPP1zyU%3D)**

I'll be right there with President Trump as he backs a policy that respects the freedom of responsible gun owners nationwide, while moving us towards a more perfect and intended experience of our 2nd Amendment rights.

Thank you, [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=607b4fa7061b442b93e188dab2bf9a5d&_e=uzFHjV41lDjoLZh6HrpFkqEFJDovgELSYwVZmSB7xUOpUaUT_z4T-vUeTL_UYXfwfDIq5L0aX1Sa5rFjBzmUkFGY9B85B8I_T27cpS56BLSWi9Fb7isUKqwZRLTw91HdnRlmyIoEsxMjSb0TKQqMo8ZdzbaNNxEkUvO8J3kMuFdYBbplbWe5tFWtZF2cK4-4vu3Gd7vf2-CLXaQXGbJfG4T9vzAVqPAh4rSLtdWTbSGMzmXzQyoVb2APuGHcwhdPWYLtg5PlDQH9NxC_RT2SWh8pgos2J8cIaz5ySQb8tPRM7QB3BRNteqr2Y9htmvfyBuXaBrGsslQqatPIrZpelc1GOHCXtmf7QUnoL6hL-P4%3D)

_Pat Harrigan_

| Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee

name: DLCC Membership Team
subject: Here is how we fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers. | | |
---
| |
---|---
| 🛑**There’s no sugarcoating it: Our party faced major setbacks on Election Day. But if you want to keep fighting for our democracy, our rights, our freedoms, and our future, please keep reading.** 👇
---
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers.

Without Congress, these majorities will provide a much-needed check to oppose the worst of the incoming administration.

**Expanding Democratic power in statehouses across the country is the best way to counteract the damage of a second Trump presidency.**
---
We’re committed to building our largest membership team in DLCC history to fight back against the dangerous extremism of Trump and his allies by building Democratic majorities from the ground up.

As one of our most dedicated supporters, we need you on this team standing alongside us.

Donations from our members each year directly fuel our work to:

✅ Compete in majority-making special elections
✅ Chip away at Republican supermajorities
✅ Identify and flip vulnerable GOP-held seats
_And so much more..._
---

clean_body: When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers. | | | | | ---|--- | 🛑There’s no sugarcoating it: Our party faced major setbacks on Election Day. But if you want to keep fighting for our democracy, our rights, our freedoms, and our future, please keep reading. 👇 When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers. Without Congress, these majorities will provide a much-needed check to oppose the worst of the incoming administration. Expanding Democratic power in statehouses across the country is the best way to counteract the damage of a second Trump presidency. We’re committed to building our largest membership team in DLCC history to fight back against the dangerous extremism of Trump and his allies by building Democratic majorities from the ground up. As one of our most dedicated supporters, we need you on this team standing alongside us. Donations from our members each year directly fuel our work to: ✅ Compete in majority-making special elections ✅ Chip away at Republican supermajorities ✅ Identify and flip vulnerable GOP-held seats And so much more... | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Let’s hit the ground running. name: Texans for Vaccine Choice
subject: Giving Tuesday!
body:
| |
---
Support TFVC this Giving Tuesday! | [View in browser](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNjI0MTUwMDgyNTcxNzM3ODAxJmM9azBrNiZlPTAmYj0xMzkwODcyMjM2JmQ9aDhhMHUweQ==.u1FSN9Zb10KorS1aLMg920CBG8iSadErgp8ADt3hl4s)
| | |
---
|
---
---
| | |
Greetings, friend. I hope that this email finds you full of joy and a wonderful Thanksgiving feast. We are winding down a year of countless blessings, and I pray you feel the same. In the spirit of the season, I want to tell you about [Giving Tuesday](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNjI0MTUwMDgyNTcxNzM3ODAxJmM9azBrNiZlPTAmYj0xMzkwODcyMjY5JmQ9cjNkN3cwag==.N3rNLjSSizVUkH0g8xtiHDXkt24labmnqLPzflvDBVs), which is a worldwide effort to inspire generosity toward non-profits that work all year to strengthen our communities. This year, Giving Tuesday is on December 3, and the Texans for Vaccine Choice Education Foundation is asking that our supporters participate by [contributing](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNjI0MTUwMDgyNTcxNzM3ODAxJmM9azBrNiZlPTAmYj0xMzkwODcyMjkxJmQ9eTFrNmQ0dQ==.e725tEqKUjDLrFEjkGORrEgAWJtpoVIWYY-JRNG0kJg) to our mission to educate Texans about their rights regarding medical privacy, vaccine choice, and informed consent. We know that in the next few weeks, it will be easy to get swallowed up in the chaos of the season, so we are reaching out now to ask you to consider [making a tax-deductible donation](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNjI0MTUwMDgyNTcxNzM3ODAxJmM9azBrNiZlPTAmYj0xMzkwODcyMzE0JmQ9ejBwOXUzbw==.gz6Md10KXVC-BQ1IjwXRsgLn0KY-jrLSiNUX9e4n8qQ) ahead of Giving Tuesday! Remember, 2024 will be over before you know it. I humbly ask for your financial support on Giving Tuesday or any day!

---
| |
---
| | [Give Today!](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNjI0MTUwMDgyNTcxNzM3ODAxJmM9azBrNiZlPTAmYj0xMzkwODcyMzU5JmQ9djdnNHQ2Yg==.AoAJHK2MfVnf0E9BV4irwruFzqcmjTEf1VBhRRMyZvE)
---
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| Gratefully,
---
| Rebecca Hardy
---
---
President, TFVC
---
| |
---
| Texans for Vaccine Choice
---
---
| | 1540 Keller Parkway, Ste 108, #166, Keller
TX 76248 United States
---

I humbly ask for your financial support on Giving Tuesday or any day! | | | | | | | | | | Gratefully, | Rebecca Hardy President, TFVC | | | Texans for Vaccine Choice | | 1540 Keller Parkway, Ste 108, #166, Keller TX 76248 United States | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us.

name: American Patriot Daily
subject: Israel Calendars Are Here!
body:
No other place on earth has captured the world’s heart like Israel. And... [unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmb8icvorwpio8nuy6vl1cv63df3sc6r9jwbh7eyct5gvnms1m2xuhc1km4phks7bibaavsfsvzf8jw0q4ttehx9pejt9f8fkaq5s8pr&__stmp=snq0fa&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| | | | | |
---
| | | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4662vgwbpsfk2cixstbuv20th5kwdgauh5v4e2h054fxky5w0861slx11nn3jtpdisqo072ytpoxl1v80mdhap5uxel02pt3bh2lxf1ymjs7wuge4ft0dg8j4jym3rn5pypo47ozr2vggpdljcuptdo3gkgy309cubnbau8swupg63j6&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snq0fa&__onlt=h)
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4662vgwbpsfk2cixstbuv20th5kwdgauh61z9t5o3e7j4yf086ijd75v5nmc2bjq4bggdici2olbe2azvdkiiudw3cz7xionq3bqu8aultlediohvh94jhhsy08rxjquvjk6p13ks3hpyy9pbkyx2vkp1etihduayfd8qu9anw5alz19&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snq0fa&__onlt=h)
| | Dear Friend, **No other place on earth has captured the world’s heart like Israel.** And in these difficult days, Israel greatly needs our help. The Scriptures tell us that **God Himself sets watchmen over Israel** , and we believe part of the way He does this is through the brave and ever-vigilant EMTs and paramedics of **MAGEN DAVID ADOM** , Israel’s Red Cross organization. To express our appreciation for your generous support, we**** will send you the **Dwell in the Land** **calendar** — a beautiful **work of art** that features stunning photography of Israel, including breathtaking images of biblical sites and modern landscapes. The powerful Scriptures and breathtaking photographs will inspire you and be a daily reminder to pray for Israel and the peace of Jerusalem (Psalm 122:6) — and to pray for the lifesaving work of **Israel’s emergency medical system**.
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4662vgwbpsfk2cixstbuv20th5kwdgauh6w5chra2ry8mzsss5zg1qc19nmo7kt0olnpvyr5zoyfx3g3395k4apxxanr5r7v2onfqanra2vpl9gkkj193ju032gx4rthc9v0xgh9t56iqgcdu6cezowy8y57audyck6d4umi2xjvf65g&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snq0fa&__onlt=h)
**Created and produced in Israel,** the charts and graphs in this beautiful calendar also walk you through the festivals and holidays that are celebrated in Israel and around the world. **MAGEN DAVID ADOM** ’s 35,000 paramedics and EMTs, 90% of whom are volunteers, safeguard the lives of every man, woman, and child in Israel. Your support makes their work possible. **** **When you help save lives in Israel** with****[**a gift of any amount**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4662vgwbpsfk2cixstbuv20th5kwdgauh72a89c0130vsa3ia4qcnymvpn9kp70yx8dino3r8o9jq4luycoloflz3xlyak2ccwk8n3kooz2l6zp2pkfp9l4vw5scyjx8ix3ggaywu6ur7385mqh0856hrreutm0wh2y9guo3fzbqyb97&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snq0fa&__onlt=h), we will send you this beautiful **Israel calendar** as our gift of appreciation.
[DONATE NOW TO GET YOUR CALENDAR ►](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4662vgwbpsfk2cixstbuv20th5kwdgauh7x6ba0nlcqgyadoi35yxfh1tn9wurw8fu8r31dafnj1764k67w0wlxaxvzg8sjkqfwz7vx917ywq0h5f0xts0d3182i5ray2iab3uphv7fjlnbv2yl7ejf4y9rfm19ul71ewupnwbt9s8pa&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snq0fa&__onlt=h)
**Even more importantly, the people of Israel need your help today! Every terrorist** attack, every rocket attack, every car accident, every heart attack, and every baby delivered by a medic requires immediate help. Please support **MAGEN DAVID ADOM** : protecting, saving, and giving life.
| | [PLEASE GIVE NOW ►](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4662vgwbpsfk2cixstbuv20th5kwdgauhe5c1vtytcn9nqfpcb1tk8z5jmg6njok00x9hwco4jx9ss67fnppz83oukw7jrytoqt78j1wo1q4x0kkulg45fec04b0bvr93dgmiwc4aayfod0grzzyicvo77nf8n7rw4mxsvbjyaru9sf9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snq0fa&__onlt=h)
---
| |
---
| | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=x488qlvnsrsxdqbuyczr1kk0s0jma02zxsib5hte6rqak8vkabju2m2frx2nqi53qihx9irrstty58k7luyomp4e916anxy2itk1hxri5o1jf19g3xaea3g0u35xdawoybuh1f9n2s527zy7tzvpqb3vfbroa7me6a0jozenhhsnjb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snq0fa&__onlt=h)
---
| | |
---
MAGEN DAVID ADOM, Israel’s emergency medical services, provides emergency medical care and ambulance services for victims of terror, natural disasters, automobile accidents, and other emergencies in Israel. It is also responsible for Israel’s national blood supply. MAGEN DAVID ADOM is saving lives in Israel every day. Become a [Lifeline Partner](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=243ii3ipw19g2jgnpudoy6o2lecu1dp8x3esjul7lk06awxbixtbjp5kag7irxfh41xvd6gj4rt54x6nnlrhdhg0p5i391oyjmrb9bnirc2n0fat9v0mmgb0qawszlrvw7yxltcwx5tk27qsoqpfhqnosb27o56awxhmulgvjp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snq0fa&__onlt=h) now.

[Privacy Policy](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=r17finc8qt1jiizwi5qtbb1jmwosouy524f6s6o0wk4itxs2200dtj68dxefodzorfpt0xwk9gw4wwf9oksg5icbqadzrutcr4kndjey768mxr0yh9tzercq3nfwr9118gks48acodgsfjzoe1c1zr7f1p3myb4brjy4a7vvmxv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snq0fa&__onlt=h) / [Advertise with us](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=7ymfdu605bovzarwwdch7iyor1ah6u8stlfup3pxfwnhxwm24e6olq6k1mmidxd41xbh8y1l0guvz2c12bxwx88wr28fax5qnsduj9r7pc9emx3zsme0f8vhg8s0tg12k22rbwbw5ngyhv9vgv4afc25d7tf89f2zjuxo&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snq0fa&__onlt=h)

HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).

name: Indiana GOP
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**Happy Thanksgiving!**_
---
---
Friends, We hope your Thanksgiving was truly wonderful—a time filled with laughter, love, and cherished moments with family and friends. It’s such a special time to celebrate the traditions that bring us together and reflect on the many blessings we share.

Let’s carry that spirit of togetherness and gratitude with us through the entire holiday season. Whether you’re spending time with loved ones, supporting your community, or simply enjoying a well-deserved break, we hope it’s filled with joy and meaning.

Thank you for all that you do to make our Republican family here in Indiana strong. Your hard work and dedication continue to make our communities thrive and our state a great place to call home.

Wishing you a wonderful weekend surrounded by those who matter most. Thank you for all that you do!
---
| |
---
| | Chairman Randy Head
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Happy Thanksgiving! Friends, We hope your Thanksgiving was truly wonderful—a time filled with laughter, love, and cherished moments with family and friends. It’s such a special time to celebrate the traditions that bring us together and reflect on the many blessings we share. Let’s carry that spirit of togetherness and gratitude with us through the entire holiday season. Whether you’re spending time with loved ones, supporting your community, or simply enjoying a well-deserved break, we hope it’s filled with joy and meaning. Thank you for all that you do to make our Republican family here in Indiana strong. Your hard work and dedication continue to make our communities thrive and our state a great place to call home. Wishing you a wonderful weekend surrounded by those who matter most. Thank you for all that you do! | | | | Chairman Randy Head | | | | | | Governor-Elect Mike Braun Wishes Hoosiers a Happy Thanksgiving Governor-elect Mike Braun all Hoosiers a Happy Thanksgiving! What's he saying : "Happy Thanksgiving, Hoosiers! This Thanksgiving, I’m thankful to be with my family here in Jasper. They also received a special welcome from our grandson!” \- Sen. Braun said via To stay up-to-date, follow Sen. Team -- _We need your help._

Preparations to flip the Senate are already underway, but we can _only_ make the Senate blue again if we hear from top Democrats in Pennsylvania -- including you!

We need to know what works, what doesn't, and what you're seeing in your own community. Your guidance will be crucial from start to finish, and the decisions we make _right now_ will have a massive impact as we get ready to defeat MAGA extremism.

**The Senior Leadership Team needs to hear from you by midnight, so please -- answer our Post-Election Strategy Survey immediately to help inform our future campaign strategy.**

**Here's your personal link:[www.dscc.org/PostElectionSurvey#dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.dscc.org/go/20768?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241129-InputNeeded-PostElectionStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241129-InputNeeded-PostElectionStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=19015%2E9716520%2EG2Mtor)**

Team DSCC

body:
Here’s why... Democrats were getting ready to flip Indiana blue, but nearly two million Hoosiers stood up and delivered a RED WAVE! | | | [](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=1023b10d2c574b73b65327b7448af995&_e=tl39zebEd_ur06-Q_obvuD0vK60k6b5H4WmbOksc1CM6GMuE31hgfe6NACRM0qh6kZzUg1D7KTnrjPVdyRkiKQ1xG4926C-fQQ84GRQkILeGD8zn5XAOjuZXlg39DdkwAQpiPvThHLXNgZryNSTX6Z7yWG2bRTsLkpG7WJm2F1aQ3OmKhQMkUIfgkQTTuKX1tKuo8w4-aPvOkaQjgVdM4VIsHzW2OxGN7I_MMDaQOhO9g5mopPSqA7xFJoE0qaMgF8HTr9-RAOqwPVK26j4tY6txuUgl11PV3M7OTKac4jCj1FTDCx2IOaD0TBacu6AmEZR8jYF83b7-4B0bkAQ9VhYqK0j6DqvQxS7e2VRV0tPFqN-CO5sT3T4RpAGUdNr1)
---
Friend, Democrats were getting ready to flip Indiana blue, but nearly two million **[**Hoosiers stood up and delivered a RED WAVE!**](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=1023b10d2c574b73b65327b7448af995&_e=tl39zebEd_ur06-Q_obvuD0vK60k6b5H4WmbOksc1CM6GMuE31hgfe6NACRM0qh6kZzUg1D7KTnrjPVdyRkiKQ1xG4926C-fQQ84GRQkILeGD8zn5XAOjuZXlg39DdkwAQpiPvThHLXNgZryNSTX6Z7yWG2bRTsLkpG7WJm2F1aQ3OmKhQMkUIfgkQTTuKX1tKuo8w4-aPvOkaQjgVdM4VIsHzW2OxGN7I_MMDaQOhPFbFNLVWT0ctCh1QG7yLqP03HJHwid5SE-DxNz6XqUzKnH4ElyV0c0ACk9Dc0uQGhQRUtuvgHrLN9kgpupYRAzyTMTcKDNitXjIiyv3JB-uFeyUOAMmkUmb3dAAValZXeE3Tu0nMPMDkiJdE43Q33B)** **Now, they’re furious and gearing up to fight President-Elect Trump and Governor-Elect Mike Braun’s agenda in 2025.** _They don’t care if they lost the popular vote, and they don’t care if Republicans have a mandate to govern._ **The far-left Democrat party will do anything they can to stall and sabotage the agenda that millions voted for on Election Day.** That’s why we’re humbly asking for supporters of President Trump and the Republican Party to help us prepare to fight back. We succeeded in delivering a red wave because grassroots conservatives chipped in $10, $15, and $25 at a time to help us turn out voters. **[Today, we’re asking for just $5 to help us meet our first post-election fundraising deadline to help us get ready for 2025.](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=1023b10d2c574b73b65327b7448af995&_e=tl39zebEd_ur06-Q_obvuD0vK60k6b5H4WmbOksc1CM6GMuE31hgfe6NACRM0qh6kZzUg1D7KTnrjPVdyRkiKQ1xG4926C-fQQ84GRQkILeGD8zn5XAOjuZXlg39DdkwAQpiPvThHLXNgZryNSTX6Z7yWG2bRTsLkpG7WJm2F1aQ3OmKhQMkUIfgkQTTuKX1tKuo8w4-aPvOkaQjgVdM4WgwXRxCm8Z2iggo0GlB-Yb_MUe8ISuJTN6Mz6pbQE3hJCYQmE5vwxznH8ibO9esJVnB3c_XOoMyDQA4Z0q9j3e5PVe5X3HyhxnvFqoYQQ4jJ1WdL7JzN8Wpgs6IZ_XGK8lsXU2BaISgf27uBwvMHm7re08GBiCsVk_maafuDi_86_Yy98BdalgZBCn9EOJLBg%3D%3D)**
---
[**CONTRIBUTE $5**](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=1023b10d2c574b73b65327b7448af995&_e=tl39zebEd_ur06-Q_obvuD0vK60k6b5H4WmbOksc1CM6GMuE31hgfe6NACRM0qh6kZzUg1D7KTnrjPVdyRkiKQ1xG4926C-fQQ84GRQkILeGD8zn5XAOjuZXlg39DdkwAQpiPvThHLXNgZryNSTX6Z7yWG2bRTsLkpG7WJm2F1aQ3OmKhQMkUIfgkQTTuKX1tKuo8w4-aPvOkaQjgVdM4WgwXRxCm8Z2iggo0GlB-YZ7drwMYomJu3qYTNAc6S4mOdRnqB1d1Jd8T6LGUO9K5nx1_K1seAeEB39jWhHLSMa12wQzdmGZOYo5MBBWQ5DHOZBPDSIpAQSNsiWTdiSAXcpX_YDF2I7AKc0qXKkVfX8Huld8zGNTDr2Uo4vVAkTdK7GDJI5Wee28VYY_TOKjxQ%3D%3D)
---
A gift of $5 will go a long way toward helping the Indiana Republican Party prepare to support President Trump and Mike Braun as they implement the people’s agenda. **As the boots on the ground, we can organize the grassroots, inform the public, and rally voters when special elections are called next year.** Please chip in $5 or more today to help us meet our first post-election fundraising deadline so we can keep winning for Indiana Republicans.

[**CONTRIBUTE MORE**](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=1023b10d2c574b73b65327b7448af995&_e=tl39zebEd_ur06-Q_obvuD0vK60k6b5H4WmbOksc1CM6GMuE31hgfe6NACRM0qh6kZzUg1D7KTnrjPVdyRkiKQ1xG4926C-fQQ84GRQkILeGD8zn5XAOjuZXlg39DdkwAQpiPvThHLXNgZryNSTX6Z7yWG2bRTsLkpG7WJm2F1aQ3OmKhQMkUIfgkQTTuKX1tKuo8w4-aPvOkaQjgVdM4VIsHzW2OxGN7I_MMDaQOhMxbxx0SewPUdcUV3m75rMnhG_fsnEJGEK4ZkQ-uhiuc1aO41AUqHFYqCPgn1bVbZP4NncRE0xK25iHGnuhoL2CBGXfBcHUJa97PWHv7HXCqVUM2_rI6nMNn3bvI6-On1jBSQCqHrNrSVqf_yT5M0e6)

body:

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97857464/514804712/779512579?contactdata=6b8O/xS9nZW8c20IiSIMvsRclnDSUyTqzAYgBvoibXTAAvkMgoiM5UWxFmSV+jNxkzL4X3ckRj8CJTChx/gbuFwBgQh210NLeOTsRSSc/HumauP4ci3esNHa59G3O8MiwZJTaTodpCgBJqLLu4P6YJflzpEk6oHfiJFMuG0Vcrk=&sourceid=1166159&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1MGIyYzc4LTcxYWUtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sMzew-Tu_2zYMOShj-T3AUUTReA-lUAnfgFdh2qsStA=&emci=0976b642-90a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f50b2c78-71ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=1504551)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97857465/514804713/1341550938?fn=Peter&ln=&ms=GT24_EM2_Img1&sourceid=1166159&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1MGIyYzc4LTcxYWUtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sMzew-Tu_2zYMOShj-T3AUUTReA-lUAnfgFdh2qsStA=&emci=0976b642-90a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f50b2c78-71ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=1504551)
Dear Peter,
Among the redwoods has always been the perfect place to unwind and reconnect with nature. Below these ancient, towering giants, a sense of calm helps to melt stress away.
**And today is the perfect day to spend in the great outdoors! After all the delicious food and excitement, we encourage you to opt outside today.** Give your mind a break and unwind among nature. Even if you can’t make it to a redwood park take a moment to reflect on what makes the redwoods we all love so special.
We want to know, what is your answer to the blank in this statement:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97857466/514804714/1341550938?fn=Peter&ln=&ms=GT24_EM2_Img2&sourceid=1166159&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1MGIyYzc4LTcxYWUtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sMzew-Tu_2zYMOShj-T3AUUTReA-lUAnfgFdh2qsStA=&emci=0976b642-90a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f50b2c78-71ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=1504551)
Gratitude is infectious, especially in the redwoods. After we see the responses from this community, we’ll share them out so you can see what your redwood friends think about when they are walking among the giant trees.
Do you like to hike or bike? Explore? Relax and refresh your mind? Maybe you like to catch glimpses of some of the native wildlife that calls these forests home! Or perhaps looking up at a thousand year old tree gives you calm and perspective in these busy times.
However you like to explore and connect with redwoods, today is a good time to remind ourselves that the redwoods give us so much. One intangible benefit is the incredible mental health benefits of these lush and green spaces. Redwood forests give us space to relax, calm our minds, and rejuvenate our spirits. And that is priceless.
[**Let us know how you would fill in the blank and why you are grateful for the redwoods!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97857467/514804715/1341550938?fn=Peter&ln=&ms=GT24_EM2_Link1&sourceid=1166159&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1MGIyYzc4LTcxYWUtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sMzew-Tu_2zYMOShj-T3AUUTReA-lUAnfgFdh2qsStA=&emci=0976b642-90a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f50b2c78-71ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=1504551)
Thank you for loving and cherishing the redwood forests and for being part of our incredible Save the Redwoods League community.
With gratitude,
Save the Redwoods League

body:
Palestinians have a right to self-determination in their homeland. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWDFlqPLdtQYTJwzUWH5PizzC4iEXC1C4xNgzVqCCGJnym-toQjQq8XC2962FuH5aBrvc4HDoIrWKAhbUgvK__raxfAhe6SOVp5QPNPFW6jUWZOfBd3bDRrt5lfl1_ixroEZJ8CQsnrGGbxueTnjskQFhELiuNosZcUsQ3qMA66ZpHE2FPRrHUJHrnxnKVTlKXM_Z8Zaj2n45jKGgY6wF09w/4bv/Sbx8KkSMRs28XHU_Y5h8Wg/h0/h001.NNjVyygXOQaACsDhV1myssgXzUFv_8cS6C0XFnw5Uls)

Friend, On November 29, 1947, the United Nations voted to split up Palestine and displace Palestinians from their land, transferring rich agricultural land and important seaports to new immigrants and violating the UN’s own charter on self-determination. This marked the first stage of the Nakba, with Zionist militias ethnically cleansing 750,000 Palestinians. The ethnic cleansing, apartheid, and oppression of the Palestinian people has lasted for over 77 years. Thirty years later on November 29, 1977, the UN called for the creation of the International Day of Solidarity with the Palestinian People to recognize the fundamental and inalienable rights of Palestinians. Now the vast majority of member countries in the UN have voted to end Israel’s occupation of the Palestinian territories and end the escalated genocide that Israel’s government has carried out over the past year. The U.S. continues to block UN resolutions for a ceasefire and Palestinian sovereignty, including measures to make Palestine a full voting member of the UN. However, in September of this year, Palestine was seated among United Nations “member states” for the first time, not able to vote on resolutions but able to introduce them. In September, 124 UN member countries voted for a resolution introduced by UN Palestinian representatives, which demands Israel’s immediate military withdrawal from occupied Palestine as required by international law that affirms Palestinians’ right to self-determination in their homeland. This widely supported resolution also demands the right of return and reparations for Palestinians (also required by international law), and calls on UN Member States like the U.S. to comply with international law by implementing sanctions and withholding weapons and assistance to Israel. Clearly, the United States is violating international law by continuing to support Israel, even after the International Criminal Court has issued arrest warrants for Israel’s Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and former Defense Minister Yoav Gallant for war crimes and crimes against humanity. **It’s up to us as residents of the United States to continue to push our government to end its illegal clean_body: Palestinians have a right to self-determination in their homeland. | | | Friend, On November 29, 1947, the United Nations voted to split up Palestine and displace Palestinians from their land, transferring rich agricultural land and important seaports to new immigrants and violating the UN’s own charter on self-determination. This marked the first stage of the Nakba, with Zionist militias ethnically cleansing 750,000 Palestinians. The ethnic cleansing, apartheid, and oppression of the Palestinian people has lasted for over 77 years. Thirty years later on November 29, 1977, the UN called for the creation of the International Day of Solidarity with the Palestinian People to recognize the fundamental and inalienable rights of Palestinians. Now the vast majority of member countries in the UN have voted to end Israel’s occupation of the Palestinian territories and end the escalated genocide that Israel’s government has carried out over the past year. The U.S. continues to block UN resolutions for a ceasefire and Palestinian sovereignty, including measures to make Palestine a full voting member of the UN. However, in September of this year, Palestine was seated among United Nations “member states” for the first time, not able to vote on resolutions but able to introduce them. In September, 124 UN member countries voted for a resolution introduced by UN Palestinian representatives, which demands Israel’s immediate military withdrawal from occupied Palestine as required by international law that affirms Palestinians’ right to self-determination in their homeland. This widely supported resolution also demands the right of return and reparations for Palestinians (also required by international law), and calls on UN Member States like the U.S. to comply with international law by implementing sanctions and withholding weapons and assistance to Israel. Clearly, the United States is violating international law by continuing to support Israel, even after the International Criminal Court has issued arrest warrants for Israel’s Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and former Defense Minister Yoav Gallant for war crimes and crimes against humanity. It’s up to us as residents of the United States to continue to push our government to end its illegal support of Israel. ** | We will never give up in our demands to save lives and secure human dignity for Palestinians and all people. In love and solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Dear Patriot,
---
The Democrat Deep State wants **$146 MILLION** from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections.
---
To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up **_everything_** I own – including my dignity.
---
That’s why I have **officially _APPEALED_** this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets.
---
_As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us._
---
Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_ more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.”
---
**And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too!**
---
_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Patriot._
---
Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t!
---

clean_body: I will continue to fight this injustice. I will continue to fight this injustice. | Dear Patriot, The Democrat Deep State wants $146 MILLION from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections. To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up everything I own – including my dignity. That’s why I have officially APPEALED this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets. As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us. Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth infinitely more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.” And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too! But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Patriot. Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Team Keith
subject: Our job
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

As the People’s Lawyer, we can count on Keith to have our back in the courts no matter what Donald Trump throws our way next year. But it’s our job to keep up the ground game.

Only your support allows us to consistently reach out to and engage people and communities that other campaigns often overlook in communities all across the state.

Our work activating communities and bringing people together around shared values will be needed more than ever over the next four years. But to make sure we can keep it up, we need your help.

Our next fundraising deadline is at 11:59 pm tomorrow, and right now, we’re still $8,702 away from reaching our goal. That means it’s going to take an all-hands-on-deck effort to make up the difference.

According to our records, you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you can donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and receive a full refund from the state of Minnesota.

Peter, will you make your FULLY REFUNDABLE $75 donation right now to help us reach our goal so we can be prepared to defend our rights and freedoms in the New Year?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241129ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241129ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]

OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241129ke?refcode=other]

Thank you,

Team Keith

You can now use your 2024 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

Donald Trump’s “Government Efficiency" co-czar is chomping at the bit to gut the middle class, screw over seniors, and force **massive cuts to programs like Social Security and Medicare.**

But the only saving grace here is that Republicans in Congress have the THINNEST of margins in the House. With enough pressure, we can stop these devastating cuts from ever happening.

**We have to stand together against Elon Musk & Donald Trump’s disastrous plans that would harm hundreds of thousands of vulnerable seniors. So we’re asking:**
[**Peter, will you sign this petition to add your support for social security immediately? This is too important to ignore or stand on the sidelines. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97858567/514808112/-1812100472?refcode=MTFC_20241129_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTkxNzk2Zi03M2FlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qnuW297vEN7rswHU7PQnLLh7jteUP93cy9pH0MmBKGE=&emci=f9896565-d1ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=2a91796f-73ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=18839602)

www.marktakano.com

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. name: Working Families Party
subject: The long haul
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, On January 20, 2025, Donald Trump will once again be sworn in as president. It might seem tempting to throw up our hands and give in to despair — but for the sake of our country, for the sake of our communities, for the sake of ourselves, we know that’s not an option. **We are gearing up for the long haul to fight back against Trump and the authoritarian threat posed by Republicans — and that starts by being clear-eyed about what’s in store over the next four years.** Donald Trump campaigned on a radical agenda to cut taxes for his billionaire friends, separate families and deport millions of immigrants, impose tariffs that will increase the cost of goods for working families, and cut healthcare for the poor and working class. We have no reason to think he won’t try to do all of this — and more. With Republicans in control of all three branches of government, it won’t be easy for us to block their agenda. But we’ve seen what happens when millions of working people join together across our differences and rise up in radical solidarity when our families and communities come under attack. And that’s exactly what we plan to do for the next four years. **We are in this fight for the long haul, Peter.** But to win, it will take all of us. **[Will you become a dues-paying member of the Working Families Party with a monthly donation of $10 or more today? Your recurring contribution will help give us the resources we need to fight back against Trump and build our own movement over the next four years.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvWFGVwfoZo8BR_MKq4-IhekPMCF0pmAnsmxAaQXToH6Y0KhqHwSos0RgGeptKn_Rh97y2dlOtXMj_u7oeM5v0aOOpcIUANxx9C3FmfLusPMWvWXz2TkjlAo86ZRaYzfRBFwB5woye_fAuhblTKHALkhNcTd9rRyzpKJBfd-a2CpvB_kzcaHKj1lvpKlszjJM0IelJDaCRR-Ce6wU_ADO42xYLqLndPi2FiRmZtPglgoh3Zu0KtnDUJ0REzDm9QG0uNExFckSVCt8Aw65Wka5yc3JosZ7_enSzyrjfkJjG8vDa2Kpn0DFv0UvKGMkBB4Oh4qZlP7ClIRiAdf2GgSI8M/4bv/qfGHkvg_RVCQfI4XsB4BmA/h0/h001.9sPyhZn7MAzE54O29HlWti98AbiSYmV5U9xE0aVTKqs)** **[Become a dues-paying member »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvWFGVwfoZo8BR_MKq4-IhekPMCF0pmAnsmxAaQXToH6Y0KhqHwSos0RgGeptKn_Rh97y2dlOtXMj_u7oeM5v0aOOpcIUANxx9C3FmfLusPMV3wjX-QRpeBd9BLlHabSPFFJDGfxPnAxBOC9_3Atzvruj9N5aR3KWv9cpHK8cC_nnWooepUC8hvg8JtX4Y3g9MzAR18iFpSnyOiEFlVNXXAb5coCIkqAtLknELMsFp38C40DbOvZhBx5crhjLcy-Cn9-eoOLFib3j3gG442SaB1xueV-xy76KDjRCbtd5l3-ZxHgvghVbbevAekczGBySjtI0XCt59W65UrpAIY1dom/4bv/qfGHkvg_RVCQfI4XsB4BmA/h1/h001.gxjBl64PyA0OjOfhbS5MIp2dnfexPP7hxUUS3oviPK4)** Just about eight years ago, millions of us took to the streets to protest Trump — and we kept that energy sustained through all four years of Trump’s first term. We were able to stave off some of the worst parts of his agenda, including his attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act. **But we know that what worked in 2016 won’t necessarily work this time around.**
* First, we need to defend against hopelessness and cynicism. That’s exactly what the authoritarians are hoping to make us feel.

* Then, we need to build a true multiracial working class movement, and slow down, thwart, and ultimately defeat Trump’s Project 2025 agenda.

* Finally, we need to win back power in 2026 and 2028 — because we know that Trump and Republicans have no solutions to the pain many of their own working class supporters are feeling right now.

Whether it is through mobilizing to defend our communities, growing our movement, electing more champions who will resist MAGA at the state and local level, or laying the groundwork to retake Congress in 2026 — we are in all of this for the long haul. Are you with us, Peter? **We’ve defied the odds before, and we can do it again.[Will you help sustain this movement by becoming a dues-paying member of the Working Families Party with a monthly donation of $10 or more?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvWFGVwfoZo8BR_MKq4-IhekPMCF0pmAnsmxAaQXToH6Y0KhqHwSos0RgGeptKn_Rh97y2dlOtXMj_u7oeM5v0aOOpcIUANxx9C3FmfLusPMcLusyXsNT0QIT061kIbytkxkoRVrvnUFV7hDhcV5O0AFeoFIPOe4aog3qM6LPblpAMyM_ysiXzmvuTBat1FKAv5f6soEshGAxaFKvvszAJepyyYHt4RlByzTOKpgPR_PLI9ELwN8v_JCBDNxKAPILqVMoidz7jnujCUxYqcFuP_V0F1LE8DmmU9NEBXYQeNbLJKgVOhfXfKYcSPeFP2Bf1Nve6Eg7cnfvIOnDIHNKML/4bv/qfGHkvg_RVCQfI4XsB4BmA/h2/h001.1ntdHmlb4qXtAFiEnuTa8uBPrtMT7y1tUwrGHT_vBMM)** clean_body: | | | Peter, On January 20, 2025, Donald Trump will once again be sworn in as president. It might seem tempting to throw up our hands and give in to despair — but for the sake of our country, for the sake of our communities, for the sake of ourselves, we know that’s not an option. We are gearing up for the long haul to fight back against Trump and the authoritarian threat posed by Republicans — and that starts by being clear-eyed about what’s in store over the next four years. Donald Trump campaigned on a radical agenda to cut taxes for his billionaire friends, separate families and deport millions of immigrants, impose tariffs that will increase the cost of goods for working families, and cut healthcare for the poor and working class. We have no reason to think he won’t try to do all of this — and more. With Republicans in control of all three branches of government, it won’t be easy for us to block their agenda. But we’ve seen what happens when millions of working people join together across our differences and rise up in radical solidarity when our families and communities come under attack. And that’s exactly what we plan to do for the next four years. We are in this fight for the long haul, Peter. But to win, it will take all of us. Just about eight years ago, millions of us took to the streets to protest Trump — and we kept that energy sustained through all four years of Trump’s first term. We were able to stave off some of the worst parts of his agenda, including his attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act. But we know that what worked in 2016 won’t necessarily work this time around. First, we need to defend against hopelessness and cynicism. That’s exactly what the authoritarians are hoping to make us feel. Then, we need to build a true multiracial working class movement, and slow down, thwart, and ultimately defeat Trump’s Project 2025 agenda. Finally, we need to win back power in 2026 and 2028 — because we know that Trump and Republicans have no solutions to the pain many of their own working class supporters are feeling right now. Whether it is through mobilizing to defend our communities, growing our movement, electing more champions who will resist MAGA at the state and local level, or laying the groundwork to retake Congress in 2026 — we are in all of this for the long haul. Are you with us, Peter? We’ve defied the odds before, and we can do it again. With love and radical solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . Thank you, Team Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Team Fetterman HQ
subject: We might not make it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Despite a ton of hard work and support, it looks like we’re still behind on our November fundraising goal.
#
Derek,
This isn’t the email we wanted to send you a day after Thanksgiving and three weeks after an election. Despite a ton of hard work and support, it looks like we’re still behind on our November fundraising goal.
**As it stands, we’re about $10,000 shy of where we really want to be at this point in the month.**
Occasional slowdowns in fundraising are pretty normal for campaigns, especially during this time of year. But we were really hoping to reach our goal and start next year as strong as possible, since we’re going to have our work cut out for us to keep PA 🔵.
Now, we might not make it unless we see some more donations soon.
**[Derek, do you think you could chip in before our big deadline? Any amount would help us close this shortfall — whether you can afford $5 or any other amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241129?refcode=em20241129-9633&refcode2=9633_434096_2G9ISn&akid=9633%2E434096%2E2G9ISn)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241129?amount=5&refcode=em20241129-9633&refcode2=9633_434096_2G9ISn&akid=9633%2E434096%2E2G9ISn)**
No matter what happens when the clock strikes midnight tomorrow night, we’re deeply grateful to this team. Thanks to yinz, we’re supporting John’s work with grassroots funding instead of prioritizing mega-donor checks.
Thank you, truly, for being part of this.
💛 Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241129-9633-footer&t=1&refcode2=9633_434096_2G9ISn&akid=9633%2E434096%2E2G9ISn)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9633%2E434096%2E2G9ISn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9633%2E434096%2E2G9ISn)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Major General Paul Eaton, U.S. Army, Ret.
subject: An effort to bend the United States Military to Trump’s will
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
You can be sure that if I still served in uniform, Trump’s Purity Board would slate me for separation, to be replaced by someone unwaveringly loyal to Trump above all else.
#
Peter,
I served for over 33 years in the United States Army on Active Duty and retired as a Major General. I deployed around the world in defense of our nation. I upheld my oath to support and defend the Constitution.
And in all my years of service I never thought that the President of the United States would use his power as Commander in Chief to impose Purity Boards to bend the Military to his will.
But now, with Trump set to retake office, that is the reality we face.
Trump aims to destroy the apolitical nature of the Military, purge our most seasoned and effective officers, and replace them with loyalists who will follow his every command — whether they are Constitutionally legal or not.
You can be sure that if I still served, Trump’s Purity Board would slate me for relief, to be replaced by someone who demonstrates fealty to Trump above all else.
I ask you to consider a three things as we approach Trump’s inauguration:
First, the Supreme Court of the United States granted Trump complete immunity for “official actions” as President. Something not granted to our Military. A chilling thought as Trump works to eliminate anyone who would stand in his way.
Second, Joseph Stalin purged the Soviet Army as he rose to power, eliminating career officers, professionals with experience and capability, for disloyalty. The Russian Army never recovered, and the effects continue to play out — most recently in the Russian invasion of Ukraine.
And third, the Military exists as an apolitical servant of the Constitution above all else, to be guided by elected civilian leadership of all political stripes. This is essential to the stability of our nation. If senior ranks are loyal only to Trump, there is significant danger that they may not follow another leader after he leaves office (or if he refuses to do so).
We have to fight this with everything we have. But what tools are at our disposal as we work to resist Trump’s Purity Boards?
The first step is to speak with one united voice in opposition. The tough truth is that Trump has everything he needs to carry out his plans under his authority as Commander in Chief. But if we make this position politically untenable — if we cause him political damage, if we slow him down, if we convince others to take our side against him — we have a chance at stopping him.
I will not sit idly by as Trump readies a purge of good, decent, honorable leaders from the Military. We may not be able to stop him, but at the very least we will not be silent.
I need you with me.
[**Join me, join VoteVets, and join the thousands of others who have already added their voice to speak out against Trump’s Purity Boards and his purge of the United States Military. Add your name here, and then tell everyone you know that Trump is deadset on destroying our Military and making each of us less safe.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/241113_vv_em_purity_boards/?refcode=em241129-1-30&akid=34003%2E3013755%2EARlYT-)**
| [ADD YOUR VOICE](https://act.votevets.org/signup/241113_vv_em_purity_boards/?refcode=em241129-1-30&akid=34003%2E3013755%2EARlYT-)
---
These next four years will not be easy. But together, we will do everything we can to defend our democracy.
Thank you for joining us.
Very respectfully,
Paul Eaton
Senior Advisor, VoteVets
Major General, U.S. Army, Retired

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=34003%2E3013755%2EARlYT-).

Elon Musk's agenda is crystal clear; he only cares about increasing his own power and wealth at the expense of middle-class families.** That's why he owns a non-union auto manufacturer in the US. That's why he's jumped at the chance to help Donald Trump slash programs that Ohioans rely on. And that's why he spent so much money trying to replace one of our strongest champions for working communities. He knows Marcy has spent her entire tenure in Congress delivering for us. Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97860879/514816501/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjM2MTMyMi03NmFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YwtgvKIhmxItKAWzBvz7Lzst5sI2kSzMJ02hANSKVJw=&emci=7e7c1bdb-73ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=cb361322-76ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=4925535)_ ****
_Wishing You a Happy Thanksgiving Weekend_
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97860880/514816502/-360457383?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjM2MTMyMi03NmFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YwtgvKIhmxItKAWzBvz7Lzst5sI2kSzMJ02hANSKVJw=&emci=7e7c1bdb-73ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=cb361322-76ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=4925535)**
[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97860881/514816503/-360457383?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjM2MTMyMi03NmFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YwtgvKIhmxItKAWzBvz7Lzst5sI2kSzMJ02hANSKVJw=&emci=7e7c1bdb-73ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=cb361322-76ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=4925535) With the holidays here already, we wanted to wish you a safe and happy Thanksgiving weekend, wherever you may be reading this. We hope you enjoy the time spent with family and friends, and wishing safe travels. We are thankful for your continued commitment to progress in Indiana. Hoosiers deserve better than one party control — we deserve the highest wages, best healthcare, and best childcare in the Midwest. If you’d like to leave feedback about your thoughts on the latest election, [you can do so here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97860882/514816504/212246689?refcode=241117feedback&nvep=&hmac=&emci=2cdbb160-0ea5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjM2MTMyMi03NmFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YwtgvKIhmxItKAWzBvz7Lzst5sI2kSzMJ02hANSKVJw=) ****_Supermajority Pours Cold Water on Property Tax Reform This Session_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97860883/514816505/435394557?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjM2MTMyMi03NmFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YwtgvKIhmxItKAWzBvz7Lzst5sI2kSzMJ02hANSKVJw=&emci=7e7c1bdb-73ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=cb361322-76ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=4925535)**[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97860884/514816506/435394557?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjM2MTMyMi03NmFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YwtgvKIhmxItKAWzBvz7Lzst5sI2kSzMJ02hANSKVJw=&emci=7e7c1bdb-73ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=cb361322-76ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=4925535) The bottom line is that Hoosiers may not be seeing relief this year on their property taxes, say Republicans. The supermajority poured cold water on promises to lower 2025 tax bills, and are skeptical of other parts of Mike Braun’s plan. Now, the legislature isn’t planning to replace the needed revenue for police, fire, and public safety, but instead requires counties and cities to raise income taxes on their own, if they pass any reforms to the property tax system. It’s another way to shift the blame down to local officials for rising tax bills. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97860885/514816507/-1951648854?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjM2MTMyMi03NmFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YwtgvKIhmxItKAWzBvz7Lzst5sI2kSzMJ02hANSKVJw=&emci=7e7c1bdb-73ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=cb361322-76ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97860886/514816508/-1951648854?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjM2MTMyMi03NmFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YwtgvKIhmxItKAWzBvz7Lzst5sI2kSzMJ02hANSKVJw=&emci=7e7c1bdb-73ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=cb361322-76ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=4925535) There is broad support across the political spectrum in Indiana to legalize and regulate cannabis among Hoosiers. However, that has not been the belief of the Republican supermajorities at the Statehouse. Under their control, Indiana remains on an island of backward cannabis policy. Every legislative session is a chance to end the wasted resources on enforcement and the revenue and time lost to other states as Hoosiers travel out of state to purchase legal cannabis in every surrounding state. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Wishing You a Happy Thanksgiving Weekend With the holidays here already, we wanted to wish you a safe and happy Thanksgiving weekend, wherever you may be reading this. We hope you enjoy the time spent with family and friends, and wishing safe travels. We are thankful for your continued commitment to progress in Indiana. Hoosiers deserve better than one party control — we deserve the highest wages, best healthcare, and best childcare in the Midwest. If you’d like to leave feedback about your thoughts on the latest election, = Supermajority Pours Cold Water on Property Tax Reform This Session The bottom line is that Hoosiers may not be seeing relief this year on their property taxes, say Republicans. The supermajority poured cold water on promises to lower 2025 tax bills, and are skeptical of other parts of Mike Braun’s plan. Now, the legislature isn’t planning to replace the needed revenue for police, fire, and public safety, but instead requires counties and cities to raise income taxes on their own, if they pass any reforms to the property tax system. It’s another way to shift the blame down to local officials for rising tax bills. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. There is broad support across the political spectrum in Indiana to legalize and regulate cannabis among Hoosiers. However, that has not been the belief of the Republican supermajorities at the Statehouse. Under their control, Indiana remains on an island of backward cannabis policy. Every legislative session is a chance to end the wasted resources on enforcement and the revenue and time lost to other states as Hoosiers travel out of state to purchase legal cannabis in every surrounding state. Survey after survey show Hoosiers want a change. ** RSVP for IDP’s Holiday Party = Reserve your spot at our annual Holiday Party to hear from Democratic leaders from across Indiana. = Get Involved! Opportunities After the Election As we move past the 2024 Election, it is imperative that we unite together to create a better future for our state. One of the best ways to do that is to help us rebuild our party and grow in the coming months and years. Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Thursday, December 5th from 1-2 pm ET for Recruiting and Supporting Candidates to Run for Office , to develop actionable strategies for finding great candidates to run in your community. INDems IN the News WISH TV: WANE: NWI Times: Post Tribune: The Center Square: Deseret News: Courier and Press: Indy Recorder: [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: COURIER
subject: When Morning Joe met Trump: A warning for democracy
body:
Trump’s actions follow a well-worn authoritarian playbook: Undermine the free press. Spread fear. Silence dissent.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97861151/514817116/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmMxY2Y3MTMtNzdhZS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ztLdJ4YSpFy7avoJDjrSX7SB6LeJXgRrCnH2i-mlCmk=&emci=f8505aaf-48ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=fc1cf713-77ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=14016711)
Peter **–**
Last week, _Morning Joe_ hosts Joe Scarborough and Mika Brzezinski made a pilgrimage to Mar-a-Lago.
Why? Reports say the MSNBC hosts, who have often criticized Trump, were afraid of possible retaliation from his new administration. While they defended the meeting as “diplomacy,” it underscores how authoritarian threats can instill fear, prompting even vocal critics to change course in an effort to protect themselves.
This isn’t just about one meeting—it’s yet another warning sign of how Trump’s authoritarianism is chilling the free press. Trump frequently threatens to jail reporters, revoke broadcast licenses, and strip legal protections for journalists. These calculated moves aim to intimidate, silence, and erode free speech, putting the independence of the press—and democracy itself—at risk.
[**If you believe in fearless, independent media that won’t bend to Trump’s authoritarian tactics, chip in $25 now to support COURIER’s critical work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97861152/514817117/-593472309?refcode=20241129-EM-MediaFearResend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmMxY2Y3MTMtNzdhZS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ztLdJ4YSpFy7avoJDjrSX7SB6LeJXgRrCnH2i-mlCmk=)
**Trump’s actions follow a well-worn authoritarian playbook: Undermine the free press. Spread fear. Silence dissent.**
This is the same strategy perfected by leaders like Vladimir Putin. Putin doesn’t need to send every dissenter to a gulag like Stalin did—he only needs to target a handful of high-profile journalists publicly. The fear he generates ensures others fall in line – dissent comes with consequences.
Trump, who has openly praised strongmen like Putin, is borrowing directly from that playbook. His allies in Congress are working to block the PRESS Act, a bipartisan bill designed to protect journalists from government surveillance. He’s vowed to take control of independent agencies like the FCC to punish critical voices. And his “jokes” about exacting violence on journalists mirror the chilling tactics used by authoritarian regimes to keep opposition in check.
**The strategy is already working. You can see it in the behavior of Scarborough and Brzezinski, and you can see it in Jeff Bezos’ decision to pull the _Washington Post_ ’s endorsement of Kamala Harris during the election.**
As fear spreads, the press becomes less willing to challenge those in power, clearing the path for unchecked authoritarianism.
**We can’t let that happen. Here’s how COURIER is fighting back:**
* **Standing firm against intimidation:** While others might be afraid to call out Trump’s authoritarianism, we won’t.
* **Reaching voters where it matters:** On social media, in email, and beyond, we bring factual reporting directly to the places where right-wing hate and propaganda spreads.
* **Delivering what voters need:** From exposing propaganda to empowering communities with the truth about the real issues impacting their lives, our work ensures voters have the facts to do their part to protect our democracy.

[**If you believe in protecting democracy and standing up to authoritarianism, chip in $25 to help COURIER expand our reach and continue delivering fearless journalism.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97861153/514817118/-593472309?refcode=refcode=20241129-EM-MediaFearResend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmMxY2Y3MTMtNzdhZS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ztLdJ4YSpFy7avoJDjrSX7SB6LeJXgRrCnH2i-mlCmk=)

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: An explanation of what’s ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
We’re stronger than MAGA extremism, folks

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=rBfwNsmDQ1xZAXcqEK5SsC0oot2liyG2wCbtXJRVJBlTrCYTHSd5FzpXJGdy5%2BK5hJuaWg0wsOn%2BaCJoSYwGYkaXwcVqHAGAk%2F5j%2B3KC4HYJlNteuEC7nWCSOpp9ZQhWpAo5CNJsuhbbe%2Fb2xRZOlIjCtw3nRNJKk72%2BvJkhp6oDTZGNzYutyufdebJFvxaLyXbPgTOrDVmayojTQIWtXWyHNN9bOVYFfurXAEjINHoac2gozNX00QiqflR%2FkjzgGy7qmFrByUscnzHIxZSjahHMamxz3iS5xualeKUNnvFCU5spZJ%2FbGRHrXVfykU0BBrOhd%2FOaSlLHAupZcmPhSXQ2eTK1QNIaTKwuizhcpYmP9ZxSKkYkRT%2FV2LyJLmXbRB1ERTSdKLgV%2FA2o%2FBo3mzs15%2FCOI2POJ8PF9UIjTxE%3D)

Saludos, I hope you’re enjoying the holidays with your loved ones. As we close out the Thanksgiving festivities, we’re also coming close to the end of November, and that means we’re coming up against our first major test since the election — our November fundraising deadline. [At the end of this email, I’m going to ask you to chip in $10 but I want to take a moment to explain why first:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97861193/514817196/246296706?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_112924_1_1_EOM_INTRO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTVhYmEzNy03N2FlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6CMX3k8p_JiK9_nyDGwT-6qBAOmJ5vUaZGGrjnROnlY=) We’re at a crossroads right now. This is a critical transition period as we gear up for what a second term under Donald Trump will look like in 2025. Here in New Mexico, we made significant wins in Congress by holding NM-02, NM-01 and our U.S. Senate seat in the face of massive outside spending by Republicans. But the work is nowhere near over. After Inauguration Day, we will officially be led by a Republican trifecta in Washington, and it’s going to be up to all of us to keep fighting back against MAGA extremism. But we need to start getting ready to defend our freedoms right now. Here’s the thing: National Republicans are preparing to launch attacks on our rights as we speak — and our district is one of their TOP targets. As the first Democrat to hold this seat blue for consecutive terms in over 40 years, they’re going to give all they’ve got to take me down. But we’re stronger than them. And if we want to show them that, we need to start gearing up for the road ahead right now. Tomorrow night, we’re going to be up against the first test of Team Vasquez’s strength since Election Day, and there’s too much on the line for us to falter. [That’s why I’m asking today: Can I count on you to chip in $10 or any amount possible to help defend New Mexico, democracy, reproductive freedom and our public lands before tomorrow’s deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97861194/514817197/246296706?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_112924_1_1_EOM_INTRO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTVhYmEzNy03N2FlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6CMX3k8p_JiK9_nyDGwT-6qBAOmJ5vUaZGGrjnROnlY=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

We cannot waste any time in fighting back.

**Here in Ohio, we’ve seen what happens when unchecked power puts personal interests over the public good – including a massive corruption scandal involving Governor MikeDeWine. It’s not good.**

We reelected five Democratic incumbents to the U.S. House in 2024, but the news about Donald Trump’s cabinet nominees proves we don’t have time to rest before the next fight.

clean_body: We cannot waste any time in fighting back. | = Team, Donald Trump hasn’t wasted any time showing us what we’re up against. He’s nominating his friends and allies to his cabinet – rewarding loyalty over qualifications. This isn’t just politics as usual – it’s corruption, plain and simple. There have even been reports that Trump may try to use recess appointments to bypass the Senate confirmation process and unilaterally install his cabinet nominees. Here in Ohio, we’ve seen what happens when unchecked power puts personal interests over the public good – including a massive corruption scandal involving Governor MikeDeWine. It’s not good. We reelected five Democratic incumbents to the U.S. House in 2024, but the news about Donald Trump’s cabinet nominees proves we don’t have time to rest before the next fight. Our rights – abortion rights, voting access, and more – are under constant attack, and we know these assaults will only increase with the incoming administration. We must stay vigilant, stay organized, and stay ready to fight back against Trump and his Republican allies. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = The corruption we’re already seeing is only the beginning. Trump hasn’t even taken office yet, and it’s already started. But together, we can push back and fight for the values we believe in. Let’s get to work. In solidarity, Ohio Democrats = | Ohio Democratic Party PO Box 130 Columbus, Ohio 43216 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

name: Kari Lake

body:
