#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d417543c3e7e43aa8f3215591484faf8&_e=CtHEnmabX4XgJ20g_JFzAcO1veDqfqMGQS2tv_ccP-jwMIW6QvQ-jdl5HDPKC_eqCTVu8RD5cu68Txbstb1spIxo0AXHfWQ8unLXU9r7iyTY-yz75QwLXY5-wKETsWhbQ8k3IC3YZtVOrN49alo4z6D6t1ggvag5yPpwJmUNE-zJcqjDyBCbKkAxgwvzhBpf2W-rfu-LlfGyA55EzYsIXLkZpEtidFfoidYnl1_N73zGgTKGtm6qAFUKX5AhwFvQ5zWAAb2M45Jxgd1RWqgVVyxuzO1Me_5-lg3ruQn0K24AqniZhipMFLujgRqgFBo7uSl7NYPg7j9aV9-X8xGLfnPbakdRzBlIBvIVqYR5grwDmK05faNmQ6gBbL-vnS-1ooiyuaDOtC1MwUT7m05YWi8u1avhbDY64s2y82PIFes%3D)**

---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d417543c3e7e43aa8f3215591484faf8&_e=CtHEnmabX4XgJ20g_JFzAcO1veDqfqMGQS2tv_ccP-jwMIW6QvQ-jdl5HDPKC_eqCTVu8RD5cu68Txbstb1spIxo0AXHfWQ8unLXU9r7iyTY-yz75QwLXY5-wKETsWhbQ8k3IC3YZtVOrN49alo4z6D6t1ggvag5yPpwJmUNE-zJcqjDyBCbKkAxgwvzhBpf2W-rfu-LlfGyA55EzYsIXLkZpEtidFfoidYnl1_N73zGgTKGtm6qAFUKX5AhwFvQpNsps1yxfK-Jte2XSjpQ8LcNcpVWnz8NKYroX4tW6lpHELuBYNByM7fYJPrgCg-PHjPjCKHuYBYx8qQlktgP8iDKvUxiPbQqQIVDC4U72jGkl79UU4b0vOm1n0XytOdYD3KrHLlSNT_xpbb1u9w7Zt-7gu97HVHppCMyivp0FJI%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d417543c3e7e43aa8f3215591484faf8&_e=CtHEnmabX4XgJ20g_JFzAcO1veDqfqMGQS2tv_ccP-jwMIW6QvQ-jdl5HDPKC_eqCTVu8RD5cu68Txbstb1spIxo0AXHfWQ8unLXU9r7iyTY-yz75QwLXY5-wKETsWhbQ8k3IC3YZtVOrN49alo4z6D6t1ggvag5yPpwJmUNE-zJcqjDyBCbKkAxgwvzhBpf2W-rfu-LlfGyA55EzYsIXLkZpEtidFfoidYnl1_N73zGgTKGtm6qAFUKX5AhwFvQnZhHzSA_dkDKW_XIYppMtqtJ81b_7iFA1uI7q45_3R84D_dqHTAOIzZUNYEntGWn-4gA2nWK3Zhx9HuE00XFSJSUM0AH7wU7gD2857YJkPgi-uyzfZybwLj_46L-C6Og2_NmI0GAj3GKata7D5f4eZb9ORv4H6gXwCbG77amd2s%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d417543c3e7e43aa8f3215591484faf8&_e=CtHEnmabX4XgJ20g_JFzAcO1veDqfqMGQS2tv_ccP-jwMIW6QvQ-jdl5HDPKC_eqCTVu8RD5cu68Txbstb1spIxo0AXHfWQ8unLXU9r7iyTY-yz75QwLXY5-wKETsWhbQ8k3IC3YZtVOrN49alo4z6D6t1ggvag5yPpwJmUNE-zJcqjDyBCbKkAxgwvzhBpf2W-rfu-LlfGyA55EzYsIXLkZpEtidFfoidYnl1_N73zGgTKGtm6qAFUKX5AhwFvQtBDSVv7pAQ-6rhqDdg5v-5Pmg2kwjjYAZEIATlULim2De4r7VPu1OshPWWiQgtSloBk0U4gKcq8Eh7aiHsPSafp2mrWnbY3EKwGTXivS3U5GAQdBqeczMCK4q1tXBTKEwbWSYdyc7419drJvxnVKW0tDTYGC4kO0KzEOqy1qqkU%3D)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

Kari Lake

Arrested Pro-Life protestors. **And sued me for defamation.** Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d417543c3e7e43aa8f3215591484faf8&_e=CtHEnmabX4XgJ20g_JFzAcO1veDqfqMGQS2tv_ccP-jwMIW6QvQ-jdl5HDPKC_eqCTVu8RD5cu68Txbstb1spIxo0AXHfWQ8unLXU9r7iyTY-yz75QwLXY5-wKETsWhbQ8k3IC3YZtVOrN49alo4z6D6t1ggvag5yPpwJmUNE-zJcqjDyBCbKkAxgwvzhBpf2W-rfu-LlfGyA55EzYsIXLkZpEtidFfoidYnl1_N73zGgTKGtm6qAFUKX5AhwFvQsTDs6AFAZjQMNB5odQvh_fBkwkDynq_FhtTPvrhb57Ls5B6OjdeAys8DzSnAeX1sdZ_6WDagm9obrVNwoH7qCPAaAIGPtmEyBCNKfHMsV6_djFhHo4Vzbg1MXhHU3eM72fnG-zjaDaEoJa8kqM9yyw3nTa-2oU8QQ9CTdUcVkpg%3D)**

name: Team McBride
subject: Electing Sarah was just the first step
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
This is important!
#
Hi,
We hope you had a restful Thanksgiving filled with good food, cozy moments, and time with loved ones. As November comes to a close, we want to express our gratitude to this grassroots team!
Thanks to your support, we made history together. But electing Sarah was just the first step — the real work of bringing bold, compassionate leadership to Congress is about to begin.
Sarah will be sworn in in just a few weeks, and to ensure our movement has the resources to amplify her voice, respond to the challenges ahead, and keep our campaign operating, we’re focused on hitting our November goal of $20,000.
**This is Sarah’s _first_ end-of-month deadline since winning her election, so it’s important we hit this goal.** [**Right now, we’re $6,500 short, and we need your help to close the gap by midnight tomorrow. Can you pitch in?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241129?refcode=em20241129-1586&amount=5&refcode2=1586_21716_mm8cJ5&akid=1586%2E21716%2Emm8cJ5)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241129?amount=5&refcode=em20241129-1586&refcode2=1586_21716_mm8cJ5&akid=1586%2E21716%2Emm8cJ5)**
Thank you for your continued support,
Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20241129&t=1&refcode2=1586_21716_mm8cJ5&akid=1586%2E21716%2Emm8cJ5)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1586%2E21716%2Emm8cJ5)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1586%2E21716%2Emm8cJ5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1586%2E21716%2Emm8cJ5)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Is It Way Too Soon For This?!?
body:
I hope you had a GREAT Thanksgiving celebration yesterday and enjoyed all the time with family and friends while hopefully eating too much food. Now
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9540.1.bc53016e056bbceb16b043f3bfdb9a27) |
---
I hope you had a **GREAT** Thanksgiving celebration yesterday and enjoyed all the time with family and friends while hopefully eating too much food. Now it is time for the **BIG question**... It is the day after Thanksgiving and is it too soon to put up the [Christmas Tree](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9541.1.8f3937f072eb7eaef7ab7cb9d7dd2c6c)? _Some say yes and others say no._ I may not know the answer to that question but I do know the answer to another question that some Christians struggle with: **[IS THE CHRISTMAS TREE PAGAN?](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9542.1.b230e10a31dcb935e1e1829d0ae490f2)** **Jeremiah 10:3-4** says, _"For the practices of the peoples are worthless; they cut a tree out of the forest, and a craftsman shapes it with his chisel. They adorn it with silver and gold; they fasten it with hammer and nails so it will not totter."_ From a quick read **it would seem the Bible is against[Christmas Trees](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9543.1.4f91924e188394727f15418885744839)**... I took _6 minutes_ to address that claim in this video below: Watch it here: [https://youtu.be/K6md5Jz15eU](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9544.1.9e7686468a124c37a58f28ceeb985d10)
---
| | [ WATCH: Is The Christmas Tree Pagan? ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9545.1.ab6e7c96af385384226351e7d62aa8f0)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9546.1.c17e4441895d5f1e86bf944e08e362a4)
---
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9547.1.94862c0e5db1fddf1b4f5db458f18831), I started a _mini-series_ within our _WKND series_ over the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9548.1.0d9ab2cfa22909a116fae5dc98536761). In **Acts 17** , the **Apostle Paul** spent 3 weeks in Thessalonica **reasoning** , **explaining** and **proving** **Jesus** from the Old Testament Scriptures. Therefore, I took the **Book of Genesis** and _reasoned_ , _explained_ and _proved_ **Jesus as Messiah** from those 50 chapters in the 1st book of the Bible. The next Sunday, we looked at Jesus in the **Book of Exodus**. I believe these sermons will really teach you some things that maybe you have never seen before from the _*Torah_. Watch "[Jesus In The Torah | Genesis](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9549.1.7ac7852f658d465a141faba63360debb)" here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=634OIj06ZbU](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9550.1.d825e2566b20b8a1e59b0cf39e007501) **Upcoming Events At Sheridan.Church** -Saturday, December 7 @6pm: **Christmas Gala w/Mayor Giuliani** (6 tickets left) | RSVP: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1453870](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9551.1.a3035120dd310777a6dd3b4206179862) -Sunday, December 22 @10am: **Sheridan Christmas Concert** -Sunday, January 12 @10am: **Erick Stakelbeck** -Wednesday, February 26 @7pm: **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** Please consider partnering with the mission of [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9552.1.93295d2259eea98cacd9fefe4fe3b186): [https://sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9553.1.754be6cf5e46430e04c8423c8aaa6f2b) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9554.1.c11db99e6b015fb47455744e5d952672)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9555.1.ceb4d047153f7e1e0fe4d860a6218fe5)
---
The response to [Sheridan's 1st Annual Christmas Dinner Gala](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9556.1.79f17488f98af2fe5aeade75ce99736d) has been **HUGE**! _This event is nearly sold out_. If you have not got your ticket or reserved your table yet, now is the time. Keynote speaker: **Mayor Rudy Giuliani** Comedy Performance: **Brad Stine** Live Auction Items Include: **Signed Donald Trump Painting** and more... Silent Auction as well. I will also be sharing about **Operation 2025 at Sheridan.Church** that evening. This is a black tie event. Please join us for what will be an incredible experience to close out 2024 and to look into 2025. Kindly RSVP here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1453870](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9557.1.2f39d191805a4964e9f83866067f3a0a) **Date** \- Saturday, December 7, 2024 **Time** \- 6:00-8:00pm **Address** \- 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

Over the last year at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9559.1.61154ff4e357999f9b0187fd34e71bc2), we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. Including: [Perry Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9560.1.42dfac678fb30303105052f124aeb25d), **Tim Tebow** , [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9561.1.2fc3a11670e1a81f14cfddb92ea74b09)., [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9562.1.a52881ce4ab3376cd9c1b78319564461), [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9563.1.b4ba7e249b7cb7845a818e020b32eb32), [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9564.1.7f62e8bf99b12ad96a82c0a4abf0dbd4), [Darryl Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9565.1.9a07161b8bbd01b4ee835ecf14f554a0), **General Michael Flynn** , [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9566.1.922cf3319e7fce2bad1d5bc52707ff0f), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9567.1.1cbdd02caf449e0e03ef9118b87fece8), [Dr. Randy Caldwell](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9568.1.ea8288aaeffc6358a7df41faa9879c12), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9569.1.db55803b549b9aad895b11935cc84943), Rodney Howard-Browne and so many others...
But our first guest speaker of 2025, I am very excited about!
Mark your calendars for **Erick Stakelbeck** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17655110.9570.1.0bb42559e99357708d17a91bd417f5d4) on Sunday, January 12 at 10am CT.
Erick's show on **TBN** is _phenomenal_ and that Sunday in January will be just as great!

subject: Dance for Coffee, Christmas Wrapathon, Mom's Texts
body:
Coffee Milano in Middleborough, Massachusetts, went viral after [offering free coffee to customers who danced](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8j7GOtCAUhZ8GOo1cEKSg-Bu6-dstDXIvIxuUiZIx8_Yb9wG2OzknOV--r8f8CLnk_fk_bOTSM80t1RkGUJ0QHdgZQy6fWXF0iQhIcnLCSLCDVAPw1dEkMQYxYUgqCJrEREbrNGqkEXEyPLv7TQiwwox2FD0oG1DqRVtDZoyWqYEwt3r03zXvbaVUPvVNRx_rxotbW3udTP5j4Bn467r6uJw7Xee9M_BLPVvdGfi7Y-BjTYmo23IJe-1iSHdGLLTUozLw_HD4unIp-dSGqeG5hVx-We0v_7eDnwAAAP__57Ffgw) for five seconds upon entering.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LHOozAQBOCnMV0QXhubLVycFKXLtVdaDl5gTzYg7OSUtz-R4i9T76fVzPy5-3vgxOv8O2Ry0zz5Om0eOtAXKS-APgZOb6-b6CYiINWQk1YBdkp30CxuQCMf9EAc-xHNpI1USg04TL0ZehvHht35TUpAaXvsZQsaQ1TmYdCS7UcUuqPIdTvavxuvdaEpvbcXHe245Sa5pda9CPVLwE3AjdcXldpWzrSnUOqJzou6PWv2ZXseIwl1jfn4ISmskdd5DzMJMCfLFPmZhbru4agrHWXhXQ7dRUvlP60FmLqGTOWL8dBJtNZqxKE5XNz_cUpcjBW6m3Pg9Mlfv236cvA_AAD__9TeeN8) | |
# Friday, November 29, 2024
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** We hope your Thanksgiving was fabulous, but if a day with family and in-laws left you a little exhausted or stressed... _Feel Good Flyover_ is here to cheer you up. Today, we're covering a tale about a Massachusetts coffee shop spreading joy through dance. And remember, whether there's coffee involved or not, a little dancing can brighten any day. Happy weekend! Today's edition is sponsored by [Timeplast](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LHOozAQBOCnMV0QXhubLVycFKXLtVdaDl5gTzYg7OSUtz-R4i9T76fVzPy5-3vgxOv8O2Ry0zz5Om0eOtAXKS-APgZOb6-b6CYiINWQk1YBdkp30CxuQCMf9EAc-xHNpI1USg04TL0ZehvHht35TUpAaXvsZQsaQ1TmYdCS7UcUuqPIdTvavxuvdaEpvbcXHe245Sa5pda9CPVLwE3AjdcXldpWzrSnUOqJzou6PWv2ZXseIwl1jfn4ISmskdd5DzMJMCfLFPmZhbru4agrHWXhXQ7dRUvlP60FmLqGTOWL8dBJtNZqxKE5XNz_cUpcjBW6m3Pg9Mlfv236cvA_AAD__9TeeN8), offering an investment opportunity in their groundbreaking technology.
|
---
## Message in a Bottle Links Generations After 26 Years
In 1998, fourth-grader Makenzie Morris wrote a letter as part of a class project, [sealed it in a bottle, and tossed it](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80D2OpDAQxfHTQFYtu4B2OyDYhGw23RBV4zLUrj-Q7RnUt19NH2Dyn570_n8-1g-SIGn_TZFnv_u1-byiwhG0BrSrIwmvdezd7JmRh55nbQa0ahgV9ses_DBMyln3fOBI1uDm2WvzcMabbRq5l_l7TWu02kx20jccLbnh_rxbw2babDcqdtJyuf3NktrBPrzyF5fblmMf5qO1s3bDrw6XDpfrum41SjtqTkIp0v7NOlxqpNIg8VU7XAiCtBYYdikBXMnnyQ4IItdKO4MkIHjmN5HUMhAE-sdwcAFHn_vRuFTYAtUaqTH4_JkcSAO8w4upVAjUuIB-KPuYJjV1uPRlduclIUi9m25UeyQJ7w_tp65fM_4PAAD__8F6fhc) into Ontario's Lake St. Clair. Twenty-six years later, the bottle was found by a kindergartner, River Vandenberg, who attends the same school Makenzie did. River's discovery led to the letter being read aloud in a classroom, where Makenzie's daughter, Scarlet, recognized her mother's maiden name. The find brought Makenzie's childhood memory full circle and reminded everyone of the enduring magic of simple gestures. Watch [how the story unfolded here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z8FuhCAUheGngd0Y7gVlWLBoMnFnk67anQEBpUGZKKPx7Rv7ALM9J_mS_7vrOxNTXMZPM3sdxtCXkHtkKG4AN1S9MzGdvaBOB-_Rc-o1SI6KccGQTlqauwweIAz3ECxjDqG2srZWcWiU4DTqSwNABbJWNVQolHG8sY2SXtaDIoJ5F0teq98clzL5kM68-7Ua8kyTnkp5boR_EGwJtsdxVGd-lZf1138tpgwT4e1O-OMrDMsx2R-3dwSbQvgDYKOrds8jphS3RhLBxtnE9I-Xd8G7xr8AAAD__3-lWDI).
## Coffee Shop Gives Free Drinks for Dance
Coffee Milano in Middleborough, Massachusetts, went viral after [offering free coffee to customers who danced](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8j7GOtCAUhZ8GOo1cEKSg-Bu6-dstDXIvIxuUiZIx8_Yb9wG2OzknOV--r8f8CLnk_fk_bOTSM80t1RkGUJ0QHdgZQy6fWXF0iQhIcnLCSLCDVAPw1dEkMQYxYUgqCJrEREbrNGqkEXEyPLv7TQiwwox2FD0oG1DqRVtDZoyWqYEwt3r03zXvbaVUPvVNRx_rxotbW3udTP5j4Bn467r6uJw7Xee9M_BLPVvdGfi7Y-BjTYmo23IJe-1iSHdGLLTUozLw_HD4unIp-dSGqeG5hVx-We0v_7eDnwAAAP__57Ffgw) for five seconds upon entering. Held monthly and announced through cryptic social media posts like "Dance party tomorrow," the promotion has [delighted patrons and racked up](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLFu7CAURL8Gd1hwwWYpKF7jbl-b0mLhYpNgswLW1v595Ehp084ZjUbn4z7fbUxxX_7bDU1YwtxCnoGBpJxT0LO3Mb1n2XkTEAFFh4YrAZoJyaBbDSD628D8TUsRQAmumdRaCa2cGPX46KK51jgHzdWgB96D1NaL8TFqhWpwmkiGPrZc-s8c97ZiSO98YOld3rpk1taelYh_BCYC03me_Vd9nBckMNnSoktIYNrxrPREmvKBdLO1Wre-KrZWqcshINK65iddMlZ6xGITDbnQi5S4LzQUxN9iy9Tb3V2xe9WWNyyVwDSC1gMD3hXjn2dMKdZREcmWzcb0c7b9JfAw8B0AAP__iB91wQ) over sixty million social media views. Owner Josh Rashid says the goal is simple: bring smiles, joy, and a little rhythm to everyone's day. Watch a [compilation of the customers dancing here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z8FurCAUxvGngd0YzoERWbC4yY1pF9NumnZpUA5Ki8PEYTT26Rv7AN1-X_JL_h-X7uJiitfxxc1kwxi6EnKHAtUJ4ISm8y6mvVPc20CEJDlZ0BKNkEognyx534gG6wCugQZA9AYNSYG6lgKk59EeGgAa0GdzhgqVcV7WfW006fNgmBLkY8lL9ZnjtUwU0p5XWqohzzzZqZTbncl_DFuG7bZt1Z4f5dHT8R-LK8PEZLsy-f_tqbyO5b39fv7ii_W3LaYU77VmSoyzi-mXLH9lrhZ_AgAA__-Zt1Sw).
## Chiefs' Tershawn Wharton Saves Falling Fan with Heroic Catch
Kansas City Chiefs defensive lineman Tershawn Wharton made [an unforgettable save](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z7FuwyAQgOGngQ0LDmzMwNDFW7p2tAjcxdeSOLJRrLx95T5A51_6pe_rMl8SV37cPtMdI91obrTOoMEpYxSEuSSu79nJEgkR0EqMxlsI2joNconaZJ298d5YPfbXK0EII43Uj2RSKoPkeN6MgWB8H3rTgQup2OE6BI--z0E4jYXbunXfKz_aglTf6wu3Lq93WePS2nMX9kPAJGA6jqPb-UwCpgdVAVNeGGlXz5reuKmcWl5wV5TqyVI_XOQWy_PgWnkfvHD6dk9c_-7tP_Erwm8AAAD___rwWdQ) on Sunday--but not on the field. As players were leaving for the locker room, a young fan leaned over the railing to greet them and suddenly tumbled forward. Wharton, standing just below, caught the child in an incredible moment of quick reflexes and compassion, gently helping him back to his family. See the [moment captured on video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kT2P3CwUhX8N7jyCy4cvhYtX78bdpogipbQwXMYkeDwyzDrz7yN7Nm2qi845fDycH-_ju0s53a5f3UJ9vMaxxnUEDqoVogU7Bpfyc1RN6CMRkGyoF50Ey6Xi0Mz9RHEKZFTnMWqJQXUcLAbjEdFFa5vUH6cJAVZ02mpxAWVdkGYytqNOe8sUp5Dqul1-rulWZ4r5uX7QdvHr0uR-rvVemPyPwcBg-H2oDIbv4_jtUQqDoVRXH8dCoOGI2holFGoLyCWTw0ZxLJtn8q3uxwStv9S4M9Dd_3X3brm_pJ2o0jJR-HQqbcvpCDQCBFoUWlvLAVB8Rq7bGYjRqUl7bzi3mk8OCITzqBA7UjGSJBIAHv5eud7ObQVGBuZ43mPLTL69OEEfpPpg1TDs-34p6YWsYbjFfE4_J4qlvWf3pK31rvqZShtdPopsf6XQbH247ynnVEzHFL8uLuXzP-u_Ov7o4U8AAAD__xIToAI).
| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LHOozAQBOCnMV0QXhubLVycFKXLtVdaDl5gTzYg7OSUtz-R4i9T76fVzPy5-3vgxOv8O2Ry0zz5Om0eOtAXKS-APgZOb6-b6CYiINWQk1YBdkp30CxuQCMf9EAc-xHNpI1USg04TL0ZehvHht35TUpAaXvsZQsaQ1TmYdCS7UcUuqPIdTvavxuvdaEpvbcXHe245Sa5pda9CPVLwE3AjdcXldpWzrSnUOqJzou6PWv2ZXseIwl1jfn4ISmskdd5DzMJMCfLFPmZhbru4agrHWXhXQ7dRUvlP60FmLqGTOWL8dBJtNZqxKE5XNz_cUpcjBW6m3Pg9Mlfv236cvA_AAD__9TeeN8) **" Big Plastic" Hates Them** Whether it's water bottles or shrink wrap, traditional plastic suppliers should be worried. That's because [Timelplast](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LHOozAQBOCnMV0QXhubLVycFKXLtVdaDl5gTzYg7OSUtz-R4i9T76fVzPy5-3vgxOv8O2Ry0zz5Om0eOtAXKS-APgZOb6-b6CYiINWQk1YBdkp30CxuQCMf9EAc-xHNpI1USg04TL0ZehvHht35TUpAaXvsZQsaQ1TmYdCS7UcUuqPIdTvavxuvdaEpvbcXHe245Sa5pda9CPVLwE3AjdcXldpWzrSnUOqJzou6PWv2ZXseIwl1jfn4ISmskdd5DzMJMCfLFPmZhbru4agrHWXhXQ7dRUvlP60FmLqGTOWL8dBJtNZqxKE5XNz_cUpcjBW6m3Pg9Mlfv236cvA_AAD__9TeeN8) invented a new type of plastic that can dissolve in water, completely eliminating plastic waste. Even more impressive, their plastic can be programmed to dissolve at a precise time, whether it's in 60 seconds or 60 years. With the plastic markets worth _over $1.3 trillion_ , [**Timeplast 's breakthrough is a game changer. **](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LHOozAQBOCnMV0QXhubLVycFKXLtVdaDl5gTzYg7OSUtz-R4i9T76fVzPy5-3vgxOv8O2Ry0zz5Om0eOtAXKS-APgZOb6-b6CYiINWQk1YBdkp30CxuQCMf9EAc-xHNpI1USg04TL0ZehvHht35TUpAaXvsZQsaQ1TmYdCS7UcUuqPIdTvavxuvdaEpvbcXHe245Sa5pda9CPVLwE3AjdcXldpWzrSnUOqJzou6PWv2ZXseIwl1jfn4ISmskdd5DzMJMCfLFPmZhbru4agrHWXhXQ7dRUvlP60FmLqGTOWL8dBJtNZqxKE5XNz_cUpcjBW6m3Pg9Mlfv236cvA_AAD__9TeeN8) Even better? You can own a stake in the company as they expand globally. [**Learn more about the opportunity to invest in Timeplast stock here.**](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LHOozAQBOCnMV0QXhubLVycFKXLtVdaDl5gTzYg7OSUtz-R4i9T76fVzPy5-3vgxOv8O2Ry0zz5Om0eOtAXKS-APgZOb6-b6CYiINWQk1YBdkp30CxuQCMf9EAc-xHNpI1USg04TL0ZehvHht35TUpAaXvsZQsaQ1TmYdCS7UcUuqPIdTvavxuvdaEpvbcXHe245Sa5pda9CPVLwE3AjdcXldpWzrSnUOqJzou6PWv2ZXseIwl1jfn4ISmskdd5DzMJMCfLFPmZhbru4agrHWXhXQ7dRUvlP60FmLqGTOWL8dBJtNZqxKE5XNz_cUpcjBW6m3Pg9Mlfv236cvA_AAD__9TeeN8)****

We hope your Thanksgiving was fabulous, but if a day with family and in-laws left you a little exhausted or stressed... Feel Good Flyover is here to cheer you up. Twenty-six years later, the bottle was found by a kindergartner, River Vandenberg, who attends the same school Makenzie did. River's discovery led to the letter being read aloud in a classroom, where Makenzie's daughter, Scarlet, recognized her mother's maiden name. The find brought Makenzie's childhood memory full circle and reminded everyone of the enduring magic of simple gestures. Watch . Coffee Shop Gives Free Drinks for Dance Coffee Milano in Middleborough, Massachusetts, went viral after for five seconds upon entering. Held monthly and announced through cryptic social media posts like "Dance party tomorrow," the promotion has over sixty million social media views. Owner Josh Rashid says the goal is simple: bring smiles, joy, and a little rhythm to everyone's day. Watch a . Chiefs' Tershawn Wharton Saves Falling Fan with Heroic Catch Kansas City Chiefs defensive lineman Tershawn Wharton made on Sunday--but not on the field. As players were leaving for the locker room, a young fan leaned over the railing to greet them and suddenly tumbled forward. Wharton, standing just below, caught the child in an incredible moment of quick reflexes and compassion, gently helping him back to his family. Proposals to cut Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid are looming, and their impact would be devastating, especially for people with disabilities. Individuals with disabilities often rely on these programs as their lifeline, with over 70% depending on Social Security for their primary income. Additionally, Medicare and Medicaid provide essential healthcare services that many with disabilities cannot afford otherwise. **The loss of these benefits endangers people’s lives and put them at risk of homelessness!** **[Act now and sign the petition to say NO cuts to Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid! name: AOC
subject: Mosaics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Just because we didn’t see the big picture at first doesn’t mean we weren’t part of one.
#
Sometimes people will ask me, “There is so much happening in the world and in the country, and it all feels so big and overwhelming - what can I even do as one person?” What I try to convey every time is that no action is too small, and if you feel so moved, you can and should start with whatever is within arm’s reach or in your backyard. You can even start with yourself.
We live in a culture of grand gestures and big ambitions, but that also means we should be wary of how much “get-rich-quick” thinking can perpetuate beyond money schemes and into the idea that any/all major, impactful shifts happen suddenly and in dramatic fashion with a handful of major figures. The fact is, that couldn’t be further from the truth. Revolutionary and transformative changes, from the inside out, happen more like mosaics.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241129.D-mxov&refcode=em20241129-7668-P_ENG_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7668%2E2526796%2E2J_iqS)
Think of it like this: no matter who we are, how visible or invisible or big or small, each one of us is just one tile. Whether you see that as liberating or disempowering is a matter of perspective. When you have your eye pressed all the way up to the single tile of a mosaic, it can look quite meaningless. A single piece of shattered glass could look worthless. Or perhaps a piece of small painted porcelain could seem beautiful, but too small to “be” anything. Or maybe a stunning rare slab of stone may think itself as the biggest piece when it is really a corner tile. The secret is, it’s all significant.
**The two secrets of mosaics are:**
1. Each piece (us + our small actions) is far more powerful and meaningful than we know, and
2. Each piece (we) need each other far more than we realize.

When we are able to step back from thinking our own broken, unfinished pieces are not enough, and start to see how all the other little pieces glistening alongside us start to form eyes and ears and abstract beauty and landscapes and symbols and more, we realize that just because we didn’t see the big picture at first doesn’t mean we weren’t part of one.
So just do the small thing - for yourself and others. Choose your actions with humility, love, and enthusiasm. **It means more than you know, and the world thanks you for it**.
Take heart,
Alexandria
Alexandria is fighting for a powerful set of policies that will reshape our economy, shrink inequality, and address the climate crisis.
Our campaign is 100% people-powered. In fact, we are the #1 small-dollar funded campaign in Congress. [If you can, please consider making a donation today to keep Alexandria fighting for our agenda in Congress.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241129.D-mxov&refcode=em20241129-7668-P_ENG_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7668%2E2526796%2E2J_iqS)

clean_body: Just because we didn’t see the big picture at first doesn’t mean we weren’t part of one. Sometimes people will ask me, “There is so much happening in the world and in the country, and it all feels so big and overwhelming - what can I even do as one person?” What I try to convey every time is that no action is too small, and if you feel so moved, you can and should start with whatever is within arm’s reach or in your backyard. You can even start with yourself. We live in a culture of grand gestures and big ambitions, but that also means we should be wary of how much “get-rich-quick” thinking can perpetuate beyond money schemes and into the idea that any/all major, impactful shifts happen suddenly and in dramatic fashion with a handful of major figures. The fact is, that couldn’t be further from the truth. Revolutionary and transformative changes, from the inside out, happen more like mosaics. Think of it like this: no matter who we are, how visible or invisible or big or small, each one of us is just one tile. Whether you see that as liberating or disempowering is a matter of perspective. When you have your eye pressed all the way up to the single tile of a mosaic, it can look quite meaningless. A single piece of shattered glass could look worthless. Or perhaps a piece of small painted porcelain could seem beautiful, but too small to “be” anything. Or maybe a stunning rare slab of stone may think itself as the biggest piece when it is really a corner tile. The secret is, it’s all significant. The two secrets of mosaics are: 1. Each piece (us + our small actions) is far more powerful and meaningful than we know, and 2. Each piece (we) need each other far more than we realize. When we are able to step back from thinking our own broken, unfinished pieces are not enough, and start to see how all the other little pieces glistening alongside us start to form eyes and ears and abstract beauty and landscapes and symbols and more, we realize that just because we didn’t see the big picture at first doesn’t mean we weren’t part of one. So just do the small thing - for yourself and others. Choose your actions with humility, love, and enthusiasm. It means more than you know, and the world thanks you for it. Take heart, Alexandria Alexandria is fighting for a powerful set of policies that will reshape our economy, shrink inequality, and address the climate crisis. Our campaign is 100% people-powered. In fact, we are the #1 small-dollar funded campaign in Congress. | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

As partners, Northeast Arizona Native Democrats and the Arizona Democratic Party are committed to working together to get out the vote on sovereign lands. Here are just a few highlights from this cycle:
* Over 80% of voters on sovereign land voted for Vice President Harris, over 83% voted for Gallego and nearly 90% of tribal voters voted for Jonathan Nez
* NEAZ led meaningful dialogues this cycle on reproductive rights and voters on tribal lands voted to codify abortion rights **_at a rate over 8% higher than the rest of the state_**
* **Nearly 100%** of tribal voters cast votes in county-level races
* We successfully increased turnout on White Mountain Apache Lands, thanks to the work of long-time organizers who have built relationships with voters over time

**Mobilizing in and investing in native voters is how we’ll continue to secure victories up and down the ballot and make sure that Indigenous issues are represented at the highest seats of government.[Will you make a grassroots contribution right now to help us invest in native voters in Arizona?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97864887/514827330/472954119?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20241129_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2NhNGU3MzMtN2VhZS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=y_yQr_r1B4xevX-Bn_ugDlSm05qlFI7d_lSpcaPUwec=)**

Dear Friend, Do you feel motivated by the Word of God every time you read your Bible?

How comfortable are you with reading Scripture? Does it energize you or overwhelm you?

[Take this 5-question quiz to see how well you study the Bible >>](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=e4df93acc74845819d9ea2a5468b4831&_e=E5nFNovOYcYJo8Qg0UjhulWmlP4UgK6kw-TE11bHAY-FjsaLtOr2SfSY5nTuwjjIaiI4cAYI1hRoewGVQzZe3EAV4U92jKNK-6wTdIV2iojFHW3Slrr4dQwXHeYGwI2e4mSGkKfrcDLKiRH9tKatlMarbd9JFQ2tN3p5BPVFO4eTiK0V40X0bSHJXRrqPH7kPeyh4Wm2XZ01GWAovF8PwI6DOimeMNKkmXTiITydVQiM_nSyX9bEMAEQI4bNJuDuppoAVQJ7shrJUP2hf2TH_Iv0bt71HgUplnvNWAn10x5Ff3YCKlKtwHqdu9YhaEezF_2LtQNxjGjMxdcmTcDvW9aVy7WnAwi41q2VDHb5ctQ%3D)

Studying the Bible is hard and time-consuming. You may find it confusing, difficult, or dry. Please let me encourage you and offer you some guidance:

1\. God loves it when you read His Word.
**2\. The goal of studying the Bible is not information --it's transformation.**

No matter what is happening in your life, the Word responds to your deepest needs. It is alive and powerful.

Reading Scripture affects our minds and souls. We are transformed to be people who resist temptation and are resilient in crisis. Understanding the Word helps us be more like Christ and model that for others.

[Wondering how your approach to understanding the Bible can grow? This quiz will help guide you toward a more intentional, fulfilling Bible study experience.](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=e4df93acc74845819d9ea2a5468b4831&_e=E5nFNovOYcYJo8Qg0UjhulWmlP4UgK6kw-TE11bHAY-FjsaLtOr2SfSY5nTuwjjIaiI4cAYI1hRoewGVQzZe3EAV4U92jKNK-6wTdIV2iojFHW3Slrr4dQwXHeYGwI2e4mSGkKfrcDLKiRH9tKatlMarbd9JFQ2tN3p5BPVFO4eTiK0V40X0bSHJXRrqPH7kPeyh4Wm2XZ01GWAovF8PwDe7ZaErP-ZZu8PvSEBzID3Le89681fNnlqwlD3YGe-y1PbnjuFJu22NSd3fAMhMHKuWZWDV0n_BVQZQaxrMJt86zhV3pO76gBNSKqW-Uw2pX03rhjIiFibL0b-S1Oknaq2_W7U7CobrQ-LOwLkA-a8%3D)

Once you answer the questions, and if you want to grow stronger in your faith and spiritual maturity as you read the Bible, we'll share a free online course to help you. __

Blessings, [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=e4df93acc74845819d9ea2a5468b4831&_e=E5nFNovOYcYJo8Qg0UjhulWmlP4UgK6kw-TE11bHAY-FjsaLtOr2SfSY5nTuwjjIaiI4cAYI1hRoewGVQzZe3EAV4U92jKNK-6wTdIV2iojFHW3Slrr4dQwXHeYGwI2e4mSGkKfrcDLKiRH9tKatlMarbd9JFQ2tN3p5BPVFO4eTiK0V40X0bSHJXRrqPH7kPeyh4Wm2XZ01GWAovF8PwICSBVll3kEqfuqkCt6mjy-TVtloiTCNoaBnT0Y2NAW92fMxQniXENNGUsMsXf-Lc-LTWdGE-tEseyoQe6aRIQFP-XVmYF7B_Qf2B4X77VOfKeTq6yP4-qO7A_wY9yRNYNIE7lS9rd3RVPNFwpPVQ2A%3D) [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=e4df93acc74845819d9ea2a5468b4831&_e=E5nFNovOYcYJo8Qg0UjhulWmlP4UgK6kw-TE11bHAY-FjsaLtOr2SfSY5nTuwjjIaiI4cAYI1hRoewGVQzZe3EAV4U92jKNK-6wTdIV2iojFHW3Slrr4dQwXHeYGwI2e4mSGkKfrcDLKiRH9tKatlMarbd9JFQ2tN3p5BPVFO4eTiK0V40X0bSHJXRrqPH7kPeyh4Wm2XZ01GWAovF8PwLgIehy7RFiL5ncIjchUPBVSbHCGlGTCmDqCCmZq2xPOqyVjR-tFX0xrz0JWrP0v2Fh5xo2L91HoAfi6IT5bOw-lnWL1oZYXcrvMJm5t7vuO79kWk2wZDCMAlQ9neGTgnz5qiwlHRJntkJ2_Uo9n1CM%3D) **Mark M. name: Ritchie Torres
subject: not backing down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| Donald Trump made it crystal clear that when re-elected, he’d try to repeal the Affordable Care Act... And Peter, it gets worse: **_House Republicans are joining him in this fight!_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97865561/514828511/-607451297?refcode=RTFC_20241129_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGY3YzAwNC04MGFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y6-H2ZtClWNiev0Pb0xbJdGRl6JXpcnUT4WvcKWeZaw=&emci=eae8acc3-f2ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=28f7c004-80ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=34594689) **Let me be clear:** Out-of-touch folks like Donald Trump should not be denying people healthcare when he's never had to worry about being able to afford an appointment, procedure, or medication in his life.

The truth is, nearly 3.8 million people in New York _ALONE_ rely on Medicare — and it’s no secret that the Bronx would be _especially_ hard-hit by this type of legislation.

**Repealing the Affordable Care Act is telling, Peter: It shows us _exactly_ where Republican priorities lie.**

Medicare is a lifeline for Americans, and I will fight like hell to protect (and expand!) it, but I need to know you’re with me: [**Do you support Republican plans to gut the Affordable Care Act?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97865562/514828519/-607451297?refcode=RTFC_20241129_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGY3YzAwNC04MGFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y6-H2ZtClWNiev0Pb0xbJdGRl6JXpcnUT4WvcKWeZaw=&emci=eae8acc3-f2ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=28f7c004-80ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=34594689) | [YES, I DO »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97865563/514828525/-607451297?refcode=RTFC_20241129_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGY3YzAwNC04MGFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y6-H2ZtClWNiev0Pb0xbJdGRl6JXpcnUT4WvcKWeZaw=&emci=eae8acc3-f2ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=28f7c004-80ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=34594689)

clean_body: | Donald Trump made it crystal clear that when re-elected, he’d try to repeal the Affordable Care Act... And Peter, it gets worse: House Republicans are joining him in this fight! Let me be clear: Out-of-touch folks like Donald Trump should not be denying people healthcare when he's never had to worry about being able to afford an appointment, procedure, or medication in his life. The truth is, nearly 3.8 million people in New York ALONE rely on Medicare — and it’s no secret that the Bronx would be especially hard-hit by this type of legislation. Repealing the Affordable Care Act is telling, Peter: It shows us exactly where Republican priorities lie. Medicare is a lifeline for Americans, and I will fight like hell to protect (and expand!) it, but I need to know you’re with me: | **800 RESPONSES REQUESTED BY MIDNIGHT We’re in this together, Peter. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Take back the libraries
body:
Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.| | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.

| | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=352ad38f97af400998021b784b29e70e&_e=0l1tcy-qjPCs7exG_sR6oCXEZZbvRajTvme1Ap4e4zX298cIAcr00yr-vTD3zJUCd7ZYhkFkDeDHJah6olpVz6SuIpCZMnqag0EWql5_AetvJEaccfu_LLWBjKN7GxsNRNVo046yZ5yZwMJifGZ88jRzhQanJVTk-G8_LJBFNfsSCYN2mxvPh_t7ZWpqxX-49Wf71mThL3mNCv066iq7hebSMs94qNB1cUZssMNer2UFTC5dB0l3MydSMml39G-4om1EqJ1fPCNK_2mMvFf--JtpWn41SEnn7n0Nhd1fvQ5HzQ6oPPme1ZPOIOAkSfff3YhYXgcvIOY-xOgw4sDrvFubhWTiPuEqnN0hnFsf63IWsz2XjKqz-LvDuXuIZm7KdznvWv-dn1R2I_7_7pZSRg%3D%3D)

| | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=352ad38f97af400998021b784b29e70e&_e=0l1tcy-qjPCs7exG_sR6oCXEZZbvRajTvme1Ap4e4zX298cIAcr00yr-vTD3zJUCd7ZYhkFkDeDHJah6olpVz6SuIpCZMnqag0EWql5_AetvJEaccfu_LLWBjKN7GxsNRNVo046yZ5yZwMJifGZ88jRzhQanJVTk-G8_LJBFNfsSCYN2mxvPh_t7ZWpqxX-49Wf71mThL3mNCv066iq7hebSMs94qNB1cUZssMNer2UFTC5dB0l3MydSMml39G-403xxOidGnURbjt3IqbwWHg2Tet7hxhPBw4RsHTbmp5sp5T36xZlWif0yeLeZqi4o2nQG2bEgyDlTeJ1_UmRz9DcS5cQmZWzxTwGduGmWtAPlGSEzHeo30SExyvTXTVjKjpJELVVt3tmun9Zih-YfHw%3D%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $150 or more today._..](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=352ad38f97af400998021b784b29e70e&_e=0l1tcy-qjPCs7exG_sR6oCXEZZbvRajTvme1Ap4e4zX298cIAcr00yr-vTD3zJUCd7ZYhkFkDeDHJah6olpVz6SuIpCZMnqag0EWql5_AetvJEaccfu_LLWBjKN7GxsNRNVo046yZ5yZwMJifGZ88jRzhQanJVTk-G8_LJBFNfsSCYN2mxvPh_t7ZWpqxX-49Wf71mThL3mNCv066iq7hebSMs94qNB1cUZssMNer2UFTC5dB0l3MydSMml39G-4ZrXPUnP69nUnGmfduRpIblpZSQtq9rk0km0xVhhAm9X1CW1_0D7dNadNNzDY7obpgbm5nfcEbFtakyeJpRFGfJEModUKWdjwL94tr2TRKmg6XDWanuTwEA29w0v3reazb1SgM1Y3SqcbgqqbTzyi6g%3D%3D)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **_[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $175._](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=352ad38f97af400998021b784b29e70e&_e=0l1tcy-qjPCs7exG_sR6oCXEZZbvRajTvme1Ap4e4zX298cIAcr00yr-vTD3zJUCd7ZYhkFkDeDHJah6olpVz6SuIpCZMnqag0EWql5_AetvJEaccfu_LLWBjKN7GxsNRNVo046yZ5yZwMJifGZ88jRzhQanJVTk-G8_LJBFNfsSCYN2mxvPh_t7ZWpqxX-49Wf71mThL3mNCv066iq7hebSMs94qNB1cUZssMNer2UFTC5dB0l3MydSMml39G-4WtxEXpemj4Z-hdk2LKcNXjlnEgX-l3LAbWONkI3654-yUzo9SlPzh_maLmxNt-7Ylfl18HGeJBLpibWAjwBSzCU19_qgNGVcin2ENsWjyyJGzd06ZYc2BjKM-0mFGir7vccXj6PS1xSxAi1SLjLH1A%3D%3D)_** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=352ad38f97af400998021b784b29e70e&_e=0l1tcy-qjPCs7exG_sR6oCXEZZbvRajTvme1Ap4e4zX298cIAcr00yr-vTD3zJUCd7ZYhkFkDeDHJah6olpVz6SuIpCZMnqag0EWql5_AetvJEaccfu_LLWBjKN7GxsNRNVo046yZ5yZwMJifGZ88jRzhQanJVTk-G8_LJBFNfsSCYN2mxvPh_t7ZWpqxX-49Wf71mThL3mNCv066iq7hebSMs94qNB1cUZssMNer2UFTC5dB0l3MydSMml39G-4miDLlTUF5_77qbE4Jo0B6O9p8yxOeICdHr8gC_NPKmanCaYa8ebKNd0q4RZPr3pIVYPmTup6HfoJoLOeqOl8XLSgBTj8mKheZR3GJ9HDv4T_TEKuapWtDyIJHlmz9D8G2u5qy2trUar0tBfr4sr-mw%3D%3D)_**

clean_body: Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.| | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. | | | | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true.<\- this is a man leading “drag queen story hour.”< p style="box-sizing: border-box;"> | | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. name: Letitia James
subject: Help me stop these bad actors once and for all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97865657/514828883/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1755-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjRiMmZiNy04MGFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CE4a5mewTp4M1QxDi7WSdOfkcu-E78QfSelq6Ma_Sd8=)
---
Peter, throughout my career, I've seen firsthand how bad actors can take advantage of unsuspecting people and their families.
When I took office as the first Black woman elected as New York attorney general, I swore that I'd stop at _nothing_ until these corrupt corporations and crooked individuals were brought to justice.
**And while I've stuck by my promise to fight against these malicious forces, they've only gotten more aggressive with their tactics.[With so much hanging in the balance next year, I need your help to _hold them accountable_ with your $5 donation before my $10,000 end-of-month fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97865658/514828884/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1755-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjRiMmZiNy04MGFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CE4a5mewTp4M1QxDi7WSdOfkcu-E78QfSelq6Ma_Sd8=)**
**• Hold them accountable** for cheating workers and exploiting families.
**• Hold them accountable** for trying to take away our reproductive rights.
**• Hold them accountable** for attempting to dismantle our democracy.
It's up to fearless fighters like us to take on these bad actors and **hold them accountable** for their crimes against the vulnerable and voiceless.

If we don't, then we run the risk of an unrecognizable future – one where our rights, livelihoods, and our very democracy are on the chopping block.
**Brave advocates like you have always stepped up in moments like this, Peter. And with my end-of-month deadline coming up, I'm calling on you to stand by my side so that I have the resources I need to stop these corrupt, powerful forces.**

body:
What happened this year proves every vote matters.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97865934/514829695/1328794144?refcode=ea.1c51e422-81ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.1c51e422-81ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjNTFlNDIyLTgxYWUtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G-eyr-3_nNzWfEgT9vz7M616u1vXfBxI57Y3gbMRuNA=&emci=71dbf4a2-40ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=1c51e422-81ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=4823105)
---
Ever hear someone say, “Eh, one vote won’t make a difference”? Well, spoiler alert: those people are dead wrong. This year, JanePAC helped elect 96 climate champions at every level of government throughout the country. Many of these endorsed climate champions secured major wins by _razor-thin_ margins. These victories prove just how powerful every single vote can be. If you need a reminder of why this fight matters, keep reading. We hope these victories inspire you to keep pushing forward. **[And if you’re ready to keep building this momentum and elect more climate champions, chip in today to power the movement that makes it all possible.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97865935/514829696/2105508926?refcode=ea.1c51e422-81ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.1c51e422-81ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjNTFlNDIyLTgxYWUtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G-eyr-3_nNzWfEgT9vz7M616u1vXfBxI57Y3gbMRuNA=)** | [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97865936/514829697/2105508926?refcode=ea.1c51e422-81ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.1c51e422-81ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjNTFlNDIyLTgxYWUtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G-eyr-3_nNzWfEgT9vz7M616u1vXfBxI57Y3gbMRuNA=)
---
We’ve got big work ahead, and we need you with us.
— The JanePAC Team

**\----Original Message----**
**From:** JanePAC
**Date:** Nov 26, 2024
**Subject:** 5️⃣ reasons why your vote makes a difference
> Some people might tell you your vote doesn’t matter at all, or it only matters if you live in a “swing state.” Here’s why they’re wrong.
> In this year’s elections, some of the most consequential victories for climate action were decided by the thinnest of margins. We want to highlight five of our endorsed champions who proved that every single vote matters — and we hope you’ll feel as inspired as we do.
> 1️⃣ **In Nebraska, Ashlei Spivey made history. She secured her Senate seat in District 13 by only 150 votes and will become the first Black woman to serve in the legislature since 2016.**
> 2️⃣ **In California, Marcus Bush’s victory was razor-thin. By just 254 votes, he won his seat on the National City Council in District 4.**
> 3️⃣ **In New Mexico, Carrie Hamblen’s re-election in Senate District 38 came down to just 298 votes.**
> 4️⃣ **Just 647 votes decided Charlotte Little’s re-election in New Mexico’s House District 68.**
> 5️⃣ **In Michigan, Reggie Miller won re-election in House District 31 with 698 votes.**
> As a bonus, we’d be remiss not to mention **Anthony Broadman, who won his Oregon State Senate seat in District 27.** While his race wasn’t as close as the others mentioned here, his victory gives the Oregon Senate a Democratic supermajority — effectively putting a stop to Republican walkouts that have long stymied climate legislation. It’s a game-changer for Oregon and a reminder of what’s possible when we organize and elect climate champions.
> So, the next time someone tells you voting doesn’t matter, tell them about Ashlei, Marcus, Carrie, Charlotte, Reggie — and Anthony, too. Because if this election taught us anything, it’s that opting out doesn’t cut it when our planet is on the line.
> Thank you for showing up, for believing in change, and for being part of this movement. Together, we’re unstoppable.
> [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97865937/514829698/2105508926?refcode=ea.1c51e422-81ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.1c51e422-81ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjNTFlNDIyLTgxYWUtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G-eyr-3_nNzWfEgT9vz7M616u1vXfBxI57Y3gbMRuNA=)
> ---
> With gratitude,
> The team at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97866028/514829879/-401668678?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM2_241129_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTllYjRkNS04MWFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yDxgInS_jLkCQaWFNV9d6NQy4N4KmHDlF4kSP6DgHjs=) Derek,

When Donald Trump took office in 2017, he had roughly 100 open judicial seats waiting for him to fill thanks to Mitch McConnell's record obstruction.

**McConnell then worked at a record pace to confirm 234 of Trump's judicial nominees. Well... Democrats are one big step closer to TYING that record before the end of the year despite ongoing Republican obstructionism.**

Here's why this matters:
* Leaving judicial seats open means backlogs of important cases that decide on YOUR freedoms – we're talking about everything from the freedom to form a union to making your own medical decisions.

* Most federal judicial seats are lifetime appointments. The average length of service for a Supreme Court justice is 16 years. That's 4x a presidential term or 2.67x how long I serve. (The longest term a Supreme Court justice served was 34 years.)

I know stuff like this can seem a bit wonky – but the impact on our lives is real. After all, it was Donald Trump's 3 Supreme Court justices who overturned _Roe_ and with it the national protection of our reproductive freedom.

I'm proud to be part of a Democratic Senate Majority that is still delivering for you.

But before I close out, I do need to ask for your help and support – because while I’m working for you in the Senate, I also still have fundraising goals I need to hit this month. [_**Can you pitch in $5 to help raise the last bit we need before November is over?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97866029/514829880/-401668678?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM2_241129_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTllYjRkNS04MWFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yDxgInS_jLkCQaWFNV9d6NQy4N4KmHDlF4kSP6DgHjs=)

Thank you,

Mark Warner
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97866030/514829881/-401668678?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM2_241129_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTllYjRkNS04MWFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yDxgInS_jLkCQaWFNV9d6NQy4N4KmHDlF4kSP6DgHjs=)****

| | | [](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=5e64c02edabf4081853498c64324ca98&_e=HHRU0yobRDPbxRVrnME9XTmOubJ4LJ_WymMEdPxz6iTLRIVChvyfn6NgM_mBPRkGpeottRnmoqABj1IJXeQHWXqhdL1IqOoF96F7rT8rg0evelIeC85R8iamUWlQBGJ9PMZbBNLOloz75NyL_2Y69et2g-e6e8HwXtjIpP3sfUC13wHXeV_PE0ftjRnX7QkGCyLnZbpVflcQlK9mdoSxAa2cP773X47ycX8YsXCugM5GWmMwwgVOXAQTDcPj4cqJRYuT-u8hFEqeZi3X7RWz_9I0IFQViUbIWCHc4FBLnh6LIBqb4fRn8fBQZi4C2uIQxfMlkSNhu5ev2YJCS_2rYPmdvLznTKQG3fo3_8g0WvYt3C1obp4z-ZD8YHQD65PzYJ2YlS5cwYucRBug2iSttg%3D%3D)
Dear Fellow American, Imagine, for a moment, a society where expressing your faith is met with threats, fines, or even court cases?

Sounds far-fetched, doesn't it?

Well, it's happened with...

Jack Phillips, owner of Masterpiece Cakeshop. He was first sued for declining to create a custom cake celebrating a same-sex wedding because it violated his religious beliefs.

Bethel Christian Academy. The state government revoked a church-run school's eligibility to participate in a voucher program to benefit low-income students and demanded the school pay back thousands of dollars for previous participation in the program because of the school's beliefs about marriage and sexuality.

Yakima Union Gospel Mission. Washington law prohibits the Mission from hiring only those employees who share and live out the Mission's Christian beliefs.

Government officials are jeopardizing your religious liberties. In more and more settings, Christians and other citizens are fired, publicly shamed, and even sued for their faith.

It's no wonder we receive thousands of legal requests each year, including from many individuals who say the government is threatening their freedoms, like the right to exercise their religious beliefs.

We would like to know if you're concerned about the future of religious freedom in the United States.

Will you take the **National Survey on Religious Freedom in America?**

[By participating in our survey, you're taking a step to ensure your voice and the voices of countless others get heard loud and clear.](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=5e64c02edabf4081853498c64324ca98&_e=HHRU0yobRDPbxRVrnME9XTmOubJ4LJ_WymMEdPxz6iTLRIVChvyfn6NgM_mBPRkGpeottRnmoqABj1IJXeQHWXqhdL1IqOoF96F7rT8rg0evelIeC85R8iamUWlQBGJ9PMZbBNLOloz75NyL_2Y69et2g-e6e8HwXtjIpP3sfUC13wHXeV_PE0ftjRnX7QkGCyLnZbpVflcQlK9mdoSxAa2cP773X47ycX8YsXCugM4tITIhniry2RLbtTl_vAmTtJMGkuLHJITtk-oqHfqfXDARqMo-FwZlVPP3nKY11xvp58vk9FfFIQWyJkFyVCfgenYThdqfNe8SRqDXUXpvH1MXaKLWY9lV3Nwwwy0VG-wzO1ijSOWaZ_WVDmGnfqEGgiszHZ4LxJwyFpUSuhcdlw%3D%3D)

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: I’m not backing down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
Our end-of-month deadline is tomorrow.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=yn72Aef5n7rors2R15yA1o85nteyeu2dSZt8i4MWlaAC8WGaxrs3vyMKQ5OKDT0n0TTuHPFaU%2BqBjQsJQHpwfvy5vMjXLy3q%2FO1hXRJxesKqnTa47bRtvRoFWs5fimhY%2B2SL9VmeyUY8SZOXxysSHq2ZQvHJqg0MmO%2FpvozI6L0ZchYO7ZUsr73OUBfAKqOyp0rfkcSIf2KDVsq%2FjpYqFO9ansF37Td6CL6s8EdDGEcEUjsRAg6urBZ8j64aXJPM3NOTOWjTv126p5SjWhLPu7FxRChsSyjtgS%2B9I0zUu500ygImS6lpp%2FKG0NZb9w7uGb4ZlcguDSBb%2BD%2FPsdyIH9hqD72AklxAyuEoZzidULqMOp4uJVs2Wa3pA0lleaCDRk7mKnIjdHSemWhiQj0VclTV0DLvjFbIn7uWFP98GMQ%3D)
---
| |
---
Hi Peter, I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving and spent time with those who matter most. November is drawing to a close, and I’m feeling reflective. Soon, we will enter the final month of 2024 and close out this whirlwind of a year. There’s no denying the results of this election were far from what we hoped for. With a Democratic minority in the House and the Senate, it’s normal to feel discouraged and anxious about what’s on the horizon. But, I want you to rest assured knowing that I am committed to fighting day in and day out to defend our rights, expand Democratic progress, and uplift the common good. **I have never backed down from adversity, and I won’t start now, Peter.** [But, I can’t do this alone. Your support has always been the cornerstone of my mission, and I need it more than ever. Tomorrow at midnight marks our first end of month deadline since Election Day, so my team has set an ambitious $10,000 goal. If you can, will you please chip in $5 or any amount to help us hit it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97866203/514830362/397693209?amount=5&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_112924_1_1_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2VmODE0My04MmFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VMRxQxbo8DeCngHKQPlcX-zSpjn1CgSrOwG25STUxVQ=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: Our end-of-month deadline is tomorrow. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter, I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving and spent time with those who matter most. November is drawing to a close, and I’m feeling reflective. Soon, we will enter the final month of 2024 and close out this whirlwind of a year. There’s no denying the results of this election were far from what we hoped for. With a Democratic minority in the House and the Senate, it’s normal to feel discouraged and anxious about what’s on the horizon. But, I want you to rest assured knowing that I am committed to fighting day in and day out to defend our rights, expand Democratic progress, and uplift the common good. I have never backed down from adversity, and I won’t start now, Peter. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Valerie | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, You can also =.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: His roadmap shows us how to fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Agenda 47 and Project 2025 give opponents of voting rights a roadmap to try and restrict our right to vote. But they also give us unique access to their playbook and provide us our own way to fight back against their dangerous initiatives.
We have to start moving forward again. RUSH $25 or more today to help us fight in Congress and state legislatures to defend voting rights and so much more >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112924_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112924_2&amount=25]
Democracy Docket: Trump’s Agenda 47 — What It Means for Democracy [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112924_2&amount=25]
Listen, Team, we know that the election's over. But post-election polling has consistently shown two things: That people voted to show their displeasure economically, and that voters don't truly know what is in the agendas put forward by the candidate that won .
That's why we keep spreading the word about Project 2025 -- the extremist Heritage Foundation's plan to reshape America, especially after Project 2025's authors have been given prominent positions in the upcoming administration -- and "Agenda 47" -- which is a close parallel that Trump's campaign used as their blueprint for the future.
Both plans are a danger to our democracy. We need your help to spread the word.
Even without an election on the horizon, Team, we've got to make sure people know what's at stake and what bills and initiatives may be coming that will impact their ability to vote. Chip in $25 or whatever you can today and help us spread the word about these dangers to our democracy >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112924_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112924_2&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112924_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112924_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112924_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112924_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112924_2&amount=35]
One of the central tenets of Trump’s Agenda 47 is securing the nation’s elections: “ We will implement measures to secure our Elections, including Voter ID, highly sophisticated paper ballots, proof of Citizenship, and same day Voting. We will not allow the Democrats to give Voting Rights to illegal Aliens ,” the agenda says.
Let's be clear -- no one is advocating for illegal aliens to vote. Voter ID has been proven again and again to be a suppressive deterrent to voting in multiple studies. Non-citizen voting has been against the law for decades, and despite the millions of taxpayer dollars that have been spent searching for voter fraud, very few problems have been found -- 20 formerly incarcerated voters who voted in 2020 when they weren't yet eligible to vote again in Florida, for example, or the Trump voter who filled out his deceased mother's mail-in-ballot in Pennsylvania.
But those 20 votes didn't change anything among Florida's 13 million eligible voters, nor did that one ballot have an impact with Pennsylvania's 9 million voters. And none of the issues found in these elections showed any non-citizen voting. This is an entire agenda concocted to control our elections and codify their power for the future , not to address any real problems.
Fuel our efforts to spread the word and inform voters with $25 or however much you can right now as we work to protect our right to vote in state legislatures and Congress for 2025 and beyond >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112924_2&amount=25]

clean_body: Agenda 47 and Project 2025 give opponents of voting rights a roadmap to try and restrict our right to vote. But they also give us unique access to their playbook and provide us our own way to fight back against their dangerous initiatives. We have to start moving forward again. RUSH $25 or more today to help us fight in Congress and state legislatures to defend voting rights and so much more >> [] Voter Action Project Logo [] Democracy Docket: Trump’s Agenda 47 — What It Means for Democracy [] Listen, Team, we know that the election's over. But post-election polling has consistently shown two things: That people voted to show their displeasure economically, and that voters don't truly know what is in the agendas put forward by the candidate that won . That's why we keep spreading the word about Project 2025 -- the extremist Heritage Foundation's plan to reshape America, especially after Project 2025's authors have been given prominent positions in the upcoming administration -- and "Agenda 47" -- which is a close parallel that Trump's campaign used as their blueprint for the future. Both plans are a danger to our democracy. We need your help to spread the word. Even without an election on the horizon, Team, we've got to make sure people know what's at stake and what bills and initiatives may be coming that will impact their ability to vote. Chip in $25 or whatever you can today and help us spread the word about these dangers to our democracy >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] One of the central tenets of Trump’s Agenda 47 is securing the nation’s elections: “ We will implement measures to secure our Elections, including Voter ID, highly sophisticated paper ballots, proof of Citizenship, and same day Voting. We will not allow the Democrats to give Voting Rights to illegal Aliens ,” the agenda says. Let's be clear -- no one is advocating for illegal aliens to vote. Voter ID has been proven again and again to be a suppressive deterrent to voting in multiple studies. Non-citizen voting has been against the law for decades, and despite the millions of taxpayer dollars that have been spent searching for voter fraud, very few problems have been found -- 20 formerly incarcerated voters who voted in 2020 when they weren't yet eligible to vote again in Florida, for example, or the Trump voter who filled out his deceased mother's mail-in-ballot in Pennsylvania. But those 20 votes didn't change anything among Florida's 13 million eligible voters, nor did that one ballot have an impact with Pennsylvania's 9 million voters. And none of the issues found in these elections showed any non-citizen voting. This is an entire agenda concocted to control our elections and codify their power for the future , not to address any real problems. Fuel our efforts to spread the word and inform voters with $25 or however much you can right now as we work to protect our right to vote in state legislatures and Congress for 2025 and beyond >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
